Its prerequisites are these bytes support protocol or log identification only and lack a complete object graph, target classpath, and readObject call chain. Migration quality requires every encoding decodes to the expected stream header or class name with clear provenance and purpose tags, and the tool never executes truncated objects; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于这些字节只可用于协议或日志识别，没有完整对象图、目标类路径和 readObject 调用链，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“流魔数、编码形式和序列化类名如何用于识别 Java 对象流，同时避免把截断样本当作有效 gadget”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on these bytes support protocol or log identification only and lack a complete object graph, target classpath, and readObject call chain, after which the commands or signatures may examine how stream magic, encoding forms, and serialized class names identify Java object streams without presenting truncated samples as working gadgets. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 逐行执行 Base64/Hex 解码并解析 STREAM_MAGIC 与类描述符，在 web-deserialization 中标记截断长度和“仅特征、非生成器载荷”用途。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: Decode every Base64 or hex line, parse STREAM_MAGIC and class descriptors, and tag truncation plus signature-only, non-generator use inside web-deserialization. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 仅迁入 web-deserialization，并把这些截断签名与完整 gadget 生成命令明确分栏；应用使用对象输入过滤、签名数据或纯数据格式替代 Java 原生反序列化。工具卡回归需要确认原字节可复制、特征标签准确且没有向生成器工具重复收录。
mitigation.en: Move only into web-deserialization and separate these truncated signatures from complete gadget-generation commands; applications should use object-input filters, signed data, or data-only formats instead of native Java deserialization. Tool regression must confirm original bytes remain copyable, signature labels are accurate, and generator tools receive no duplicate copy.

title.zh: 核对“Java 序列化头与类名特征字典”来源与角色
title.en: Verify Java Serialization Header and Class-Name Signature Dictionary provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“这些字节只可用于协议或日志识别，没有完整对象图、目标类路径和 readObject 调用链”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: these bytes support protocol or log identification only and lack a complete object graph, target classpath, and readObject call chain.

title.zh: 逐行标注“Java 序列化特征识别”适用性
title.en: Tag Java Serialization Signature Identification applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“每行编码可解码为预期流头或类名，来源和用途标签明确，工具不会尝试执行截断对象”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: every encoding decodes to the expected stream header or class name with clear provenance and purpose tags, and the tool never executes truncated objects.

title.zh: 迁移“Java 序列化头与类名特征字典”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original Java Serialization Header and Class-Name Signature Dictionary commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：逐行执行 Base64/Hex 解码并解析 STREAM_MAGIC 与类描述符，在 web-deserialization 中标记截断长度和仅特征用途，不向生成器工具复制。完整保留原命令并只在离线只读解析器验证。
description.en: Decode every Base64 or hex line, parse STREAM_MAGIC and class descriptors, and tag truncation plus signature-only use in web-deserialization without copying into generator tools. Preserve the original command in full and validate it only with an offline read-only parser.

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“仅迁入 web-deserialization，并与完整 gadget 生成命令分栏；应用改用对象输入过滤、签名数据或纯数据格式”后，确认特征入口、复制、版本标签与导航正确，且生成器工具没有重复副本。
description.en: After moving only into web-deserialization, separating signatures from complete gadget-generation commands, and adopting object-input filters, signed data, or data-only formats, verify signature access, copying, version labels, navigation, and the absence of duplicates in generator tools.

review.rationale: Java 序列化头与类名特征字典是截断识别样本而非 gadget 生成命令，仅迁入 web-deserialization，保留原始字节、来源和适用前提，避免向 ysoserial 工具重复收录。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“Java 序列化头与类名特征字典”是纯特征字典，唯一目标 Tool web-deserialization 存在，并记录来源、版本及前提：这些字节只可用于协议或日志识别，没有完整对象图、目标类路径和 readObject 调用链。
prerequisites.en: The Java Serialization Header and Class-Name Signature Dictionary is signature-only data, the sole destination web-deserialization exists, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: these bytes support protocol or log identification only and lack a complete object graph, target classpath, and readObject call chain.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用每行编码可解码为预期流头或类名，来源和用途标签明确，工具不会尝试执行截断对象检查迁移完整性。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be checked in a disposable host or offline parser, using every encoding decodes to the expected stream header or class name with clear provenance and purpose tags, and the tool never executes truncated objects for migration completeness.

analysis.zh: 本条阳性是命令/字典被准确迁移，原字节、来源和每行编码可解码为预期流头或类名，来源和用途标签明确，工具不会尝试执行截断对象保留；它不确认目标漏洞。命令可运行、已有 Shell 回连、字典命中或签名相似均不能证明“流魔数、编码形式和序列化类名如何用于识别 Java 对象流，同时避免把截断样本当作有效 gadget”对应的初始漏洞。
analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and every encoding decodes to the expected stream header or class name with clear provenance and purpose tags, and the tool never executes truncated objects; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to how stream magic, encoding forms, and serialized class names identify Java object streams without presenting truncated samples as working gadgets.

opsecTips.zh: Java 序列化头与类名特征字典停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“流魔数、编码形式和序列化类名如何用于识别 Java 对象流，同时避免把截断样本当作有效 gadget”。
opsecTips.en: Java Serialization Header and Class-Name Signature Dictionary stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is how stream magic, encoding forms, and serialized class names identify Java object streams without presenting truncated samples as working gadgets.

opsecTips.zh: Java 序列化头与类名特征字典清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Java Serialization Header and Class-Name Signature Dictionary cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: .NET BinaryFormatter 特征样本

description.zh: 四行是 BinaryFormatter 风格 Base64 对象流样本，用于识别 System、System.Data 与集合类型，不包含明确 gadget 行为，应迁入反序列化工具。
description.en: Four BinaryFormatter-style Base64 streams identify System, System.Data, and collection types without a defined gadget effect, so they belong in deserialization tooling.

overview.zh: .NET BinaryFormatter 特征样本是工具命令或参考字典，不是独立 Payload。维护目标为Base64 流中的程序集和类型元数据如何用于识别 BinaryFormatter 数据，而不声称样本可以直接执行。其适用前提为：样本只包含类型流特征，缺少目标反序列化入口、gadget 链和副作用证明。迁移质量以每行可离线解析出预期程序集/类型并保留哈希，工具分类与 ysoserial.net 生成载荷明确分开为准，不能把工具命令可运行或字典命中自动报告为目标漏洞。
overview.en: .NET BinaryFormatter Signature Samples is tool command or reference data rather than an independent payload. It maintains how assembly and type metadata in Base64 streams identify BinaryFormatter data without claiming the samples execute directly. Its prerequisites are the samples contain type-stream signatures without a target deserialization entry, gadget chain, or side-effect proof. Migration quality requires every line can be parsed offline into the expected assembly or type with a retained hash, clearly separated from ysoserial.net-generated payloads; a runnable tool command or wordlist hit is not automatically a target finding.

vulnerability.zh: 该条目本身不建立漏洞。真实风险取决于样本只包含类型流特征，缺少目标反序列化入口、gadget 链和副作用证明，随后才可能用这些命令或特征审查“Base64 流中的程序集和类型元数据如何用于识别 BinaryFormatter 数据，而不声称样本可以直接执行”。必须把前置执行入口、目标环境和工具结果分开记录，避免把后渗透能力倒置成初始攻击链。
vulnerability.en: The entry does not establish a vulnerability. Risk depends on the samples contain type-stream signatures without a target deserialization entry, gadget chain, or side-effect proof, after which the commands or signatures may examine how assembly and type metadata in Base64 streams identify BinaryFormatter data without claiming the samples execute directly. Keep the prerequisite execution entry, target environment, and tool result separate so post-exploitation capability is not inverted into an initial chain.

exploitation.zh: 在隔离分析器中 Base64 解码并只读解析头部，不调用 BinaryFormatter.Deserialize；标记类型、长度和截断状态。迁移时逐行保留字节、来源、平台或版本标签与副作用说明，执行验证仅限一次性环境和固定无害标记；不支持、失效或仅用于识别的行必须显式标注。
exploitation.en: decode Base64 and parse headers read-only in an isolated analyzer without BinaryFormatter.Deserialize, tagging type, length, and truncation state. Preserve bytes, provenance, platform or version tags, and side effects line by line; execute only in disposable environments with fixed harmless markers, and explicitly label unsupported, invalid, or signature-only lines.

mitigation.zh: 仅迁入 web-deserialization，并把这些 BinaryFormatter 特征样本与完整 gadget 生成命令明确分栏；应用删除 BinaryFormatter 等危险格式并迁移到显式数据契约序列化器。工具卡回归必须确认原字节和类型标签保留，生成器工具没有重复副本。
mitigation.en: Move only into web-deserialization and separate these BinaryFormatter signature samples from complete gadget-generation commands; applications should remove BinaryFormatter and migrate to explicit data-contract serializers. Tool regression must preserve original bytes and type labels without duplicating them in generator tools.

title.zh: 核对“.NET BinaryFormatter 特征样本”来源与角色
title.en: Verify .NET BinaryFormatter Signature Samples provenance and role

description.zh: 确认该记录是命令或字典而非漏洞数据流，记录来源、平台、版本和前提“样本只包含类型流特征，缺少目标反序列化入口、gadget 链和副作用证明”。
description.en: Confirm the record is command or dictionary data rather than a vulnerability flow, recording provenance, platform, version, and prerequisites: the samples contain type-stream signatures without a target deserialization entry, gadget chain, or side-effect proof.

title.zh: 逐行标注“.NET 序列化特征识别”适用性
title.en: Tag .NET Serialization Signature Identification applicability line by line

description.zh: 按实现、运行时、传输或识别用途分类，记录失效语法、副作用与证据要求“每行可离线解析出预期程序集/类型并保留哈希，工具分类与 ysoserial.net 生成载荷明确分开”。
description.en: Classify by implementation, runtime, transport, or signature use and record invalid syntax, side effects, and evidence requirements: every line can be parsed offline into the expected assembly or type with a retained hash, clearly separated from ysoserial.net-generated payloads.

title.zh: 迁移“.NET BinaryFormatter 特征样本”原始命令
title.en: Migrate original .NET BinaryFormatter Signature Samples commands

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在隔离分析器中 Base64 解码并只读解析头部，不调用 BinaryFormatter.Deserialize；标记类型、长度和截断状态。完整保留原命令并只在一次性环境用固定标记验证。
description.en: decode Base64 and parse headers read-only in an isolated analyzer without BinaryFormatter.Deserialize, tagging type, length, and truncation state. Preserve the original command in full and validate only with fixed markers in a disposable environment.

title.zh: 建立目标 Tool 回归
title.en: Regress the destination tool

description.zh: 实施“仅迁入 web-deserialization，与完整 gadget 生成命令分栏；应用删除 BinaryFormatter 并迁移到显式数据契约序列化器”后，确认特征入口、复制、版本标签与导航正确，且生成器工具没有重复副本。
description.en: After moving only into web-deserialization, separating signatures from complete gadget-generation commands, and replacing BinaryFormatter with explicit data-contract serializers, verify signature access, copying, version labels, navigation, and the absence of duplicates in generator tools.

review.rationale: .NET BinaryFormatter 特征样本是截断识别数据而非 gadget 生成命令，仅迁入 web-deserialization，保留原始字节、来源和适用前提，避免向 ysoserial-net 重复收录。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“.NET BinaryFormatter 特征样本”是纯特征数据，唯一目标 Tool web-deserialization 存在，并记录来源、版本及前提：样本只包含类型流特征，缺少目标反序列化入口、gadget 链和副作用证明。
prerequisites.en: The .NET BinaryFormatter Signature Samples are signature-only data, the sole destination web-deserialization exists, and provenance, version, and prerequisites are recorded: the samples contain type-stream signatures without a target deserialization entry, gadget chain, or side-effect proof.

prerequisites.zh: 可在一次性主机或离线解析器逐行验证，并用每行可离线解析出预期程序集/类型并保留哈希，工具分类与 ysoserial.net 生成载荷明确分开检查迁移完整性。
prerequisites.en: Every line can be checked in a disposable host or offline parser, using every line can be parsed offline into the expected assembly or type with a retained hash, clearly separated from ysoserial.net-generated payloads for migration completeness.

analysis.zh: 本条阳性是命令/字典被准确迁移，原字节、来源和每行可离线解析出预期程序集/类型并保留哈希，工具分类与 ysoserial.net 生成载荷明确分开保留；它不确认目标漏洞。命令可运行、已有 Shell 回连、字典命中或签名相似均不能证明“Base64 流中的程序集和类型元数据如何用于识别 BinaryFormatter 数据，而不声称样本可以直接执行”对应的初始漏洞。
analysis.en: A positive means accurate migration with original bytes, provenance, and every line can be parsed offline into the expected assembly or type with a retained hash, clearly separated from ysoserial.net-generated payloads; it does not confirm a target vulnerability. Runnable commands, callbacks from an existing shell, wordlist hits, or signature similarity do not prove an initial vulnerability related to how assembly and type metadata in Base64 streams identify BinaryFormatter data without claiming the samples execute directly.

opsecTips.zh: .NET BinaryFormatter 特征样本停止条件：默认离线解析；执行时只用一次性自有地址和固定标记。指向公共地址、生成真实载荷、打开交互 Shell 或触碰非测试文件时立即停止。 本条重点观察“Base64 流中的程序集和类型元数据如何用于识别 BinaryFormatter 数据，而不声称样本可以直接执行”。
opsecTips.en: .NET BinaryFormatter Signature Samples stop condition: Prefer offline parsing; use disposable owned destinations and fixed markers if execution is needed. Stop on public destinations, real payload generation, interactive shells, or non-test files. The entry-specific focus is how assembly and type metadata in Base64 streams identify BinaryFormatter data without claiming the samples execute directly.

opsecTips.zh: .NET BinaryFormatter 特征样本清理条件：迁移后关闭监听器，删除 FIFO、生成文件、下载脚本和测试字典副本，销毁环境并核对目标 Tool 无重复或未标记失效行。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: .NET BinaryFormatter Signature Samples cleanup condition: Close listeners, remove FIFOs, generated files, downloads, and wordlist copies, destroy the environment, and verify destination tools have no duplicates or untagged invalid lines. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: node-serialize 函数字符串反序列化

description.zh: 使用 _$$ND_FUNC$$_ 前缀恢复 JavaScript 函数并调用 child_process，验证旧 node-serialize 风格对象是否执行不可信函数源码。
description.en: Uses the node-serialize function prefix to restore JavaScript functions invoking child_process, testing whether legacy node-serialize-style objects execute untrusted function source.

overview.zh: node-serialize 函数字符串反序列化检查反序列化器是否识别 _$$ND_FUNC$$_ 并通过 eval 或 Function 恢复可调用代码对象。成立前提为：服务对不可信 JSON 使用支持函数恢复的旧库或自定义 reviver，随后自动调用恢复对象。反序列化风险必须通过库版本、reviver 路径、恢复后的值类型、固定无害函数结果和 worker 日志能够关联进行确认；仅识别到流头、类名或标签，不足以证明对象图已被加载或产生副作用。
overview.en: Node-Serialize Function-String Deserialization checks whether a deserializer recognizes the node-function prefix and reconstructs callable code through eval or Function. It applies when the service uses a legacy library or custom reviver that restores functions from untrusted JSON and later invokes the reconstructed object. Deserialization risk requires library version, reviver path, reconstructed value type, fixed harmless function result, and worker logs correlate; a stream header, class name, or tag alone does not prove object loading or side effects.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是服务对不可信 JSON 使用支持函数恢复的旧库或自定义 reviver，随后自动调用恢复对象，不可信数据因此可能触发“反序列化器是否识别 _$$ND_FUNC$$_ 并通过 eval 或 Function 恢复可调用代码对象”。真实影响由加载 API、允许类型、依赖版本、对象生命周期和服务权限共同决定，必须区分格式识别、对象实例化、gadget 触发与最终副作用四个阶段。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is the service uses a legacy library or custom reviver that restores functions from untrusted JSON and later invokes the reconstructed object, allowing whether a deserializer recognizes the node-function prefix and reconstructs callable code through eval or Function. Impact depends on the loader API, allowed types, dependency versions, object lifecycle, and service privileges, so format recognition, object construction, gadget triggering, and final side effects must remain separate.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性 Node worker 中先加载普通 JSON，再用只返回固定字符串的函数替换 child_process，逐行确认同步与异步形式是否实际被调用。在一次性 worker 中先验证正常对象基线，再将危险动作替换为固定临时标记；逐个格式或类加载并保存原始字节、解析日志和进程状态，不读取真实秘密、不访问外部网络。
exploitation.en: load ordinary JSON first in a disposable Node worker, replace child_process with a function returning a fixed string, and test whether synchronous and asynchronous forms are actually invoked. Establish a normal-object baseline in a disposable worker, replace dangerous behavior with a fixed temporary marker, and load one format or class at a time while preserving bytes, parser logs, and process state without real secrets or external network access.

mitigation.zh: 移除函数反序列化库与 eval reviver，输入只允许纯数据 schema，隔离旧会话迁移并使所有历史令牌失效。完成迁移后同时重放合法数据对象、类型越界对象和历史令牌，确认业务数据仍可读取，而语言对象、函数源码和未许可类均被稳定拒绝。
mitigation.en: remove function-deserialization libraries and eval-based revivers, allow only data schemas, isolate legacy-session migration, and invalidate historical tokens. After migration, replay valid data objects, out-of-schema types, and historical tokens to preserve business data while reliably rejecting language objects, function source, and unapproved classes.

title.zh: 确认“node-serialize 函数字符串反序列化”加载 API
title.en: Confirm the Node-Serialize Function-String Deserialization loader

description.zh: 定位真实反序列化函数、输入来源、允许类型与依赖版本，核对前提“服务对不可信 JSON 使用支持函数恢复的旧库或自定义 reviver，随后自动调用恢复对象”。
description.en: Locate the real deserializer, source, allowed types, and dependency versions, confirming that the service uses a legacy library or custom reviver that restores functions from untrusted JSON and later invokes the reconstructed object.

title.zh: 建立“Node.js 函数反序列化”正常对象基线
title.en: Establish the Node.js Function Deserialization object baseline

description.zh: 加载固定数据对象并记录类型、生命周期与副作用，再以“库版本、reviver 路径、恢复后的值类型、固定无害函数结果和 worker 日志能够关联”作为异常对象证据。
description.en: Load a fixed data object and record types, lifecycle, and side effects, accepting library version, reviver path, reconstructed value type, fixed harmless function result, and worker logs correlate as abnormal-object evidence.

title.zh: 隔离验证“node-serialize 函数字符串反序列化”对象
title.en: Validate the Node-Serialize Function-String Deserialization object in isolation

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在一次性 Node worker 中先加载普通 JSON，再用只返回固定字符串的函数替换 child_process，逐行确认同步与异步形式是否实际被调用。保持原字节不变用于引用，实际运行时将危险动作替换为一次性标记。
description.en: load ordinary JSON first in a disposable Node worker, replace child_process with a function returning a fixed string, and test whether synchronous and asynchronous forms are actually invoked. Preserve original bytes for reference while replacing dangerous runtime effects with one-time markers.

title.zh: 迁移到安全数据格式
title.en: Migrate to a safe data format

description.zh: 实施“移除函数反序列化库与 eval reviver，输入只允许纯数据 schema，隔离旧会话迁移并使所有历史令牌失效”并重放合法对象、未许可类型和历史令牌，确认数据兼容且对象代码不再加载。
description.en: Apply remove function-deserialization libraries and eval-based revivers, allow only data schemas, isolate legacy-session migration, and invalidate historical tokens, replay valid objects, unapproved types, and legacy tokens, and confirm data compatibility without loading object code.

review.rationale: node-serialize 函数字符串反序列化保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“node-serialize 函数字符串反序列化”的真实 loader、输入格式、依赖版本和允许类型，并满足：服务对不可信 JSON 使用支持函数恢复的旧库或自定义 reviver，随后自动调用恢复对象。
prerequisites.en: The real loader, format, dependency versions, and allowed types for Node-Serialize Function-String Deserialization are known, and the service uses a legacy library or custom reviver that restores functions from untrusted JSON and later invokes the reconstructed object.

prerequisites.zh: 可在无外网的一次性进程加载正常对象，并观察库版本、reviver 路径、恢复后的值类型、固定无害函数结果和 worker 日志能够关联。
prerequisites.en: A disposable no-network process can load a normal object and observe library version, reviver path, reconstructed value type, fixed harmless function result, and worker logs correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须证明输入到达 loader、对象或函数被构造、触发路径执行，并取得库版本、reviver 路径、恢复后的值类型、固定无害函数结果和 worker 日志能够关联。流头、Base64、类名、YAML 标签、解析异常或依赖中存在 gadget 均是假阳性，不能证明“反序列化器是否识别 _$$ND_FUNC$$_ 并通过 eval 或 Function 恢复可调用代码对象”。
analysis.en: A positive proves loader reachability, object or function construction, trigger execution, and library version, reviver path, reconstructed value type, fixed harmless function result, and worker logs correlate. Headers, Base64, class names, YAML tags, parser errors, or a gadget merely present in dependencies are false positives and do not prove whether a deserializer recognizes the node-function prefix and reconstructs callable code through eval or Function.

opsecTips.zh: node-serialize 函数字符串反序列化停止条件：将危险动作替换为一次性临时标记；若 loader 尝试联网、加载远程类、访问真实文件或启动非标记进程，立即杀死隔离进程。 本条重点观察“反序列化器是否识别 _$$ND_FUNC$$_ 并通过 eval 或 Function 恢复可调用代码对象”。
opsecTips.en: Node-Serialize Function-String Deserialization stop condition: Replace dangerous effects with a one-time marker; kill the isolated process on network access, remote class loading, real-file access, or a non-marker process. The entry-specific focus is whether a deserializer recognizes the node-function prefix and reconstructs callable code through eval or Function.

opsecTips.zh: node-serialize 函数字符串反序列化清理条件：每个对象使用新进程；测试后销毁进程、临时目录和缓存，轮换测试会话材料，并确认类、原型或全局状态无残留。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: Node-Serialize Function-String Deserialization cleanup condition: Use a fresh process per object; destroy processes, temporary directories, and caches, rotate test session material, and verify no class, prototype, or global state remains. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.

name.zh: PHP disable_functions 与 Shellshock 混合集（待拆分）
name.en: PHP Disable-Functions and Shellshock Mixed Set (Split Required)

description.zh: 前 15 行是 libc/pthread/libdl 路径字典，后 34 行是 Bash 函数环境变量与 PHP 函数名混合命令，并非一个可复现的 disable_functions Payload。
description.en: The first fifteen lines are libc, pthread, and libdl path dictionaries while the remaining lines mix Bash function environment syntax with PHP function names; this is not one reproducible disable-functions payload.

overview.zh: PHP disable_functions 与 Shellshock 混合集（待拆分）是跨格式或跨运行时混合集，不能继续作为一个 Payload。需要拆分的核心为库路径枚举、LD_PRELOAD 思路、PHP 禁用函数与 Bash Shellshock 环境解析应如何分别验证和归档。混合原因是源命令块混合文件路径、PHP API 名称和 Bash env 语法，且多行把 PHP 函数写进 Bash 函数体而不具备 PHP 执行上下文。完成审校必须达到每行均被标为路径字典、PHP 运行时、动态链接或 Shellshock 测试，并有目标条目与语法验证结果。
overview.en: PHP Disable-Functions and Shellshock Mixed Set (Split Required) is a cross-format or cross-runtime collection that cannot remain one payload. It must separate how library-path enumeration, LD_PRELOAD concepts, PHP disabled functions, and Bash Shellshock environment parsing should be validated and cataloged separately. The source is mixed because the source mixes file paths, PHP API names, and Bash env syntax, with many lines placing PHP functions inside Bash function bodies without a PHP execution context. Completion requires every line is tagged as path dictionary, PHP runtime, dynamic-linker, or Shellshock testing with a destination and syntax-validation result.

vulnerability.zh: 混合集会让成立条件、解析器、平台和证据标准互相污染。当前源命令块混合文件路径、PHP API 名称和 Bash env 语法，且多行把 PHP 函数写进 Bash 函数体而不具备 PHP 执行上下文，因此无法用一条攻击链说明“库路径枚举、LD_PRELOAD 思路、PHP 禁用函数与 Bash Shellshock 环境解析应如何分别验证和归档”。每个分段必须独立绑定目标 Tool 或 Payload，并明确哪些原 command index 继续保留。
vulnerability.en: Mixed collections conflate prerequisites, parsers, platforms, and evidence. Here the source mixes file paths, PHP API names, and Bash env syntax, with many lines placing PHP functions inside Bash function bodies without a PHP execution context, so one chain cannot explain how library-path enumeration, LD_PRELOAD concepts, PHP disabled functions, and Bash Shellshock environment parsing should be validated and cataloged separately. Each segment needs an independent tool or payload destination and explicit retained command indexes.

exploitation.zh: 逐行将 0-14 识别为动态库路径字典，第 15 行识别为无害 Shellshock 探针，16-48 经 Bash 语法核对后确认为跨运行时无效组合并退役。保留原始顺序和逐行结论；拆分前后严格比较命令字符串，不执行真实系统命令或外连。
exploitation.en: Classify lines 0-14 as dynamic-library path data, line 15 as a harmless Shellshock probe, and retire lines 16-48 after Bash syntax review confirms invalid cross-runtime combinations. Preserve source order and per-line decisions, compare command strings strictly, and execute no real system commands or callbacks.

overview.zh: Web Attack Cheat Sheet 多技术混合集（待拆分）是跨格式或跨运行时混合集，不能继续作为一个 Payload。需要拆分的核心为反连 CLI、PHP/JSP/ASP.NET 服务器脚本和 XXE 文档应如何按运行时、数据流与证据标准分配。混合原因是一个 execution 字符串把命令工具、可执行服务器脚本和 XML 实体输入拼在一起，名称中的 95 条与实际 50 行也不一致。完成审校必须达到全部 50 行按 0-15、16-40、41-46、47-49 分段建立去向，且每段使用对应工具或 Payload 的证据要求。
overview.en: Web Attack Cheat Sheet Multi-Tech Collection (Split Required) is a cross-format or cross-runtime collection that cannot remain one payload. It must separate how reverse-shell CLI commands, PHP or JSP or ASP.NET server scripts, and XXE documents should be assigned by runtime, data flow, and evidence standard. The source is mixed because one execution string combines command-line tools, executable server scripts, and XML entity inputs, while the claimed 95 items do not match the actual fifty lines. Completion requires all fifty lines receive destinations by ranges 0-15, 16-40, 41-46, and 47-49, with evidence requirements appropriate to each tool or payload class.

vulnerability.en: Mixed collections conflate prerequisites, parsers, platforms, and evidence. Here one execution string combines command-line tools, executable server scripts, and XML entity inputs, while the claimed 95 items do not match the actual fifty lines, so one chain cannot explain how reverse-shell CLI commands, PHP or JSP or ASP.NET server scripts, and XXE documents should be assigned by runtime, data flow, and evidence standard. Each segment needs an independent tool or payload destination and explicit retained command indexes.

exploitation.zh: 逐行核对行号与语言，反连命令只迁工具，PHP/JSP/ASP.NET 分别归入现有条目，XML 三行作为完整 XXE 文档顺序保留。逐行只做格式、语法和无害标记验证，保留原始顺序和缩进，建立行号到目标的审校表；拆分前后对命令字符串做严格比较，不执行真实系统命令、外连或远程类加载。

Perform only format, syntax, and harmless-marker checks line by line, preserving order and indentation in a line-to-destination ledger; compare command strings strictly and avoid real system commands, callbacks, or remote class loading.

description.zh: 混合 Java 流头、Log4Shell JNDI 变体、Fastjson/JdbcRowSet、Jackson 数组多态、TemplatesImpl 与 BCEL 提示，必须按漏洞和框架拆分。
description.en: Mixes Java stream headers, Log4Shell JNDI variants, Fastjson or JdbcRowSet, Jackson array polymorphism, TemplatesImpl, and BCEL hints and must be split by vulnerability and framework.

overview.zh: Java 序列化、JNDI 与 JSON 多框架混合集（待拆分）是跨格式或跨运行时混合集，不能继续作为一个 Payload。需要拆分的核心为Java 原生序列化识别、Log4j 消息查找、Fastjson/Jackson 多态反序列化和 BCEL 类加载应如何独立验证。混合原因是17 行分别依赖不同库、版本、输入解析器和网络回调，无法用一个 Java 反序列化前提或攻击链解释。完成审校必须达到每行绑定具体库和版本、解析入口、无害 DNS/对象标记、现有 Payload 或工具目标，并明确占位符不是可执行内容。
overview.en: Java Serialization, JNDI, and JSON Framework Mixed Set (Split Required) is a cross-format or cross-runtime collection that cannot remain one payload. It must separate how native Java serialization detection, Log4j message lookups, Fastjson or Jackson polymorphic deserialization, and BCEL class loading should be validated independently. The source is mixed because the seventeen lines depend on different libraries, versions, parsers, and network callbacks and cannot share one Java deserialization prerequisite or attack chain. Completion requires every line maps to a library and version, parser entry, harmless DNS or object marker, existing payload or tool target, and explicit placeholder status.

vulnerability.zh: 混合集会让成立条件、解析器、平台和证据标准互相污染。当前17 行分别依赖不同库、版本、输入解析器和网络回调，无法用一个 Java 反序列化前提或攻击链解释，因此无法用一条攻击链说明“Java 原生序列化识别、Log4j 消息查找、Fastjson/Jackson 多态反序列化和 BCEL 类加载应如何独立验证”。每个分段必须独立绑定目标 Tool 或 Payload，并明确哪些原 command index 继续保留。
vulnerability.en: Mixed collections conflate prerequisites, parsers, platforms, and evidence. Here the seventeen lines depend on different libraries, versions, parsers, and network callbacks and cannot share one Java deserialization prerequisite or attack chain, so one chain cannot explain how native Java serialization detection, Log4j message lookups, Fastjson or Jackson polymorphic deserialization, and BCEL class loading should be validated independently. Each segment needs an independent tool or payload destination and explicit retained command indexes.

exploitation.zh: 按流头、JNDI、Fastjson、Jackson/TemplatesImpl 与 BCEL 五组离线识别，只在隔离实例使用自有无害回调，不加载远程类。逐行只做格式、语法和无害标记验证，保留原始顺序和缩进，建立行号到目标的审校表；拆分前后对命令字符串做严格比较，不执行真实系统命令、外连或远程类加载。
exploitation.en: classify native stream, JNDI, Fastjson, Jackson or TemplatesImpl, and BCEL groups offline and use only owned harmless callbacks in isolation without remote class loading. Perform only format, syntax, and harmless-marker checks line by line, preserving order and indentation in a line-to-destination ledger; compare command strings strictly and avoid real system commands, callbacks, or remote class loading.

mitigation.zh: 分别迁入 rce-deserialize-java、log4j-rce、fastjson-rce 与 JNDI/反序列化工具，升级依赖、关闭危险多态和远程查找。拆分后逐个打开目标条目，验证教程、攻击链、引用和命令归属；原混合集从导航移除，所有原行必须有唯一主位置或明确的废弃理由。
mitigation.en: route into rce-deserialize-java, log4j-rce, fastjson-rce, and JNDI or deserialization tools, patch dependencies, and disable dangerous polymorphism and remote lookups. Open every destination after splitting to verify tutorial, chain, references, and command ownership; remove the mixed source from navigation and give every original line one primary home or explicit retirement reason.

description.en: The first five lines form a Pickle Exploit class and Base64 generator while the last is a PyYAML object/apply input; generator code and a YAML payload should not share one entry.

overview.zh: Python Pickle 生成器与 YAML 标签混合集（待拆分）是跨格式或跨运行时混合集，不能继续作为一个 Payload。需要拆分的核心为Pickle 对象生成脚本与 PyYAML 标签输入如何分别进入 pickle.loads 和 yaml loader，并由哪个目标条目维护。混合原因是一个命令块同时包含多行 Python 生成程序与独立 YAML 文档行，二者格式、加载 API 和证据完全不同。完成审校必须达到0-4 行作为完整生成程序迁入 Pickle 工具/条目，第 5 行迁入 Python YAML 条目，且缩进与行序保持不变。
overview.en: Python Pickle Generator and YAML Tag Mixed Set (Split Required) is a cross-format or cross-runtime collection that cannot remain one payload. It must separate how the Pickle object generator and PyYAML tag input reach pickle.loads and YAML loaders separately and which target entry owns each. The source is mixed because one command block combines a multi-line Python generator program with an independent YAML document line, using different formats, loader APIs, and evidence. Completion requires lines 0-4 remain one generator program routed to Pickle tooling or payloads, line 5 routes to Python YAML, and indentation plus order remain unchanged.

vulnerability.zh: 混合集会让成立条件、解析器、平台和证据标准互相污染。当前一个命令块同时包含多行 Python 生成程序与独立 YAML 文档行，二者格式、加载 API 和证据完全不同，因此无法用一条攻击链说明“Pickle 对象生成脚本与 PyYAML 标签输入如何分别进入 pickle.loads 和 yaml loader，并由哪个目标条目维护”。每个分段必须独立绑定目标 Tool 或 Payload，并明确哪些原 command index 继续保留。
vulnerability.en: Mixed collections conflate prerequisites, parsers, platforms, and evidence. Here one command block combines a multi-line Python generator program with an independent YAML document line, using different formats, loader APIs, and evidence, so one chain cannot explain how the Pickle object generator and PyYAML tag input reach pickle.loads and YAML loaders separately and which target entry owns each. Each segment needs an independent tool or payload destination and explicit retained command indexes.

Perform only format, syntax, and harmless-marker checks line by line, preserving order and indentation in a line-to-destination ledger; compare command strings strictly and avoid real system commands, callbacks, or remote class loading.

mitigation.zh: 生成流程归 web-deserialization/webshell-python-pickle-rce，YAML 标签归 webshell-ruby-yaml；应用改用数据格式与 SafeLoader。拆分后逐个打开目标条目，验证教程、攻击链、引用和命令归属；原混合集从导航移除，所有原行必须有唯一主位置或明确的废弃理由。

Open every destination after splitting to verify tutorial, chain, references, and command ownership; remove the mixed source from navigation and give every original line one primary home or explicit retirement reason.

name.zh: RubyGems YAML Gadget 对象图

description.zh: 构造 Gem、TarReader、Net::BufferedIO 与 Net::WriteAdapter 的 YAML 对象图，使 method_id 指向 Kernel.system，验证 Ruby 不安全对象加载。
description.en: Builds a YAML object graph across Gem, TarReader, Net::BufferedIO, and Net::WriteAdapter with method_id targeting Kernel.system to test unsafe Ruby object loading.

overview.zh: RubyGems YAML Gadget 对象图检查Ruby YAML/Psych 是否实例化 RubyGems 与 Net 类并在对象交互中调用 Net::WriteAdapter 指定的方法。成立前提为：应用对不可信 YAML 使用允许任意类的 load/unsafe_load，目标 Ruby/RubyGems 版本包含兼容 gadget 类并触发后续对象方法。反序列化风险必须通过Ruby/Psych/RubyGems 版本、实例化类图、触发调用栈和替代 Kernel 方法的固定无害标记能够关联进行确认；仅识别到流头、类名或标签，不足以证明对象图已被加载或产生副作用。
overview.en: RubyGems YAML Gadget Object Graph checks whether Ruby YAML or Psych instantiates RubyGems and Net classes and invokes the method selected by Net::WriteAdapter during object interaction. It applies when the application uses class-permissive load or unsafe_load on untrusted YAML, the Ruby and RubyGems versions contain compatible gadget classes, and later object methods trigger. Deserialization risk requires Ruby, Psych, and RubyGems versions, instantiated class graph, trigger stack, and a fixed harmless substitute for the Kernel method correlate; a stream header, class name, or tag alone does not prove object loading or side effects.

vulnerability.zh: 根因是应用对不可信 YAML 使用允许任意类的 load/unsafe_load，目标 Ruby/RubyGems 版本包含兼容 gadget 类并触发后续对象方法，不可信数据因此可能触发“Ruby YAML/Psych 是否实例化 RubyGems 与 Net 类并在对象交互中调用 Net::WriteAdapter 指定的方法”。真实影响由加载 API、允许类型、依赖版本、对象生命周期和服务权限共同决定，必须区分格式识别、对象实例化、gadget 触发与最终副作用四个阶段。
vulnerability.en: The root cause is the application uses class-permissive load or unsafe_load on untrusted YAML, the Ruby and RubyGems versions contain compatible gadget classes, and later object methods trigger, allowing whether Ruby YAML or Psych instantiates RubyGems and Net classes and invokes the method selected by Net::WriteAdapter during object interaction. Impact depends on the loader API, allowed types, dependency versions, object lifecycle, and service privileges, so format recognition, object construction, gadget triggering, and final side effects must remain separate.

exploitation.zh: 在一次性 Ruby 进程用 Psych.safe_load 验证拒绝，再通过受控允许类和替代无害方法检查对象图，不执行原 system id。在一次性 worker 中先验证正常对象基线，再将危险动作替换为固定临时标记；逐个格式或类加载并保存原始字节、解析日志和进程状态，不读取真实秘密、不访问外部网络。
exploitation.en: verify rejection with Psych.safe_load in a disposable Ruby process, then inspect the object graph with controlled permitted classes and a harmless substitute method without executing system id. Establish a normal-object baseline in a disposable worker, replace dangerous behavior with a fixed temporary marker, and load one format or class at a time while preserving bytes, parser logs, and process state without real secrets or external network access.

mitigation.zh: 对不可信 YAML 使用 safe_load 且不给 gadget 类许可，升级 Ruby/RubyGems，移除对象图反序列化并使历史缓存和会话失效。完成迁移后同时重放合法数据对象、类型越界对象和历史令牌，确认业务数据仍可读取，而语言对象、函数源码和未许可类均被稳定拒绝。
mitigation.en: use safe_load for untrusted YAML without permitting gadget classes, update Ruby and RubyGems, remove object-graph deserialization, and invalidate historical caches and sessions. After migration, replay valid data objects, out-of-schema types, and historical tokens to preserve business data while reliably rejecting language objects, function source, and unapproved classes.

title.zh: 确认“RubyGems YAML Gadget 对象图”加载 API
title.en: Confirm the RubyGems YAML Gadget Object Graph loader

description.zh: 定位真实反序列化函数、输入来源、允许类型与依赖版本，核对前提“应用对不可信 YAML 使用允许任意类的 load/unsafe_load，目标 Ruby/RubyGems 版本包含兼容 gadget 类并触发后续对象方法”。
description.en: Locate the real deserializer, source, allowed types, and dependency versions, confirming that the application uses class-permissive load or unsafe_load on untrusted YAML, the Ruby and RubyGems versions contain compatible gadget classes, and later object methods trigger.

title.zh: 建立“Ruby YAML Gadget 链”正常对象基线
title.en: Establish the Ruby YAML Gadget Chain object baseline

description.zh: 加载固定数据对象并记录类型、生命周期与副作用，再以“Ruby/Psych/RubyGems 版本、实例化类图、触发调用栈和替代 Kernel 方法的固定无害标记能够关联”作为异常对象证据。
description.en: Load a fixed data object and record types, lifecycle, and side effects, accepting Ruby, Psych, and RubyGems versions, instantiated class graph, trigger stack, and a fixed harmless substitute for the Kernel method correlate as abnormal-object evidence.

title.zh: 隔离验证“RubyGems YAML Gadget 对象图”对象
title.en: Validate the RubyGems YAML Gadget Object Graph object in isolation

description.zh: 测试步骤为：在一次性 Ruby 进程用 Psych.safe_load 验证拒绝，再通过受控允许类和替代无害方法检查对象图，不执行原 system id。保持原字节不变用于引用，实际运行时将危险动作替换为一次性标记。
description.en: verify rejection with Psych.safe_load in a disposable Ruby process, then inspect the object graph with controlled permitted classes and a harmless substitute method without executing system id. Preserve original bytes for reference while replacing dangerous runtime effects with one-time markers.

attackChain.payload:
--- !ruby/object:Gem::Installer
i: x
--- !ruby/object:Gem::SpecFetcher
i: y
--- !ruby/object:Gem::Requirement
requirements:
  !ruby/object:Gem::Package::TarReader
  io: &1 !ruby/object:Net::BufferedIO
    io: &1 !ruby/object:Gem::Package::TarReader::Entry
       read: 0
       header: "abc"
    debug_output: &1 !ruby/object:Net::WriteAdapter
       socket: &1 !ruby/object:Gem::RequestSet
           sets: !ruby/object:Net::WriteAdapter
               socket: !ruby/module 'Kernel'
               method_id: :system
           git_set: id
       method_id: :resolve

title.zh: 迁移到安全数据格式
title.en: Migrate to a safe data format

description.zh: 实施“对不可信 YAML 使用 safe_load 且不给 gadget 类许可，升级 Ruby/RubyGems，移除对象图反序列化并使历史缓存和会话失效”并重放合法对象、未许可类型和历史令牌，确认数据兼容且对象代码不再加载。
description.en: Apply use safe_load for untrusted YAML without permitting gadget classes, update Ruby and RubyGems, remove object-graph deserialization, and invalidate historical caches and sessions, replay valid objects, unapproved types, and legacy tokens, and confirm data compatibility without loading object code.

review.rationale: RubyGems YAML Gadget 对象图保留为 Payload，因为它描述具体输入到解析器、运行时或文件/进程能力的数据流，并有明确证据标准。

prerequisites.zh: 已确认“RubyGems YAML Gadget 对象图”的真实 loader、输入格式、依赖版本和允许类型，并满足：应用对不可信 YAML 使用允许任意类的 load/unsafe_load，目标 Ruby/RubyGems 版本包含兼容 gadget 类并触发后续对象方法。
prerequisites.en: The real loader, format, dependency versions, and allowed types for RubyGems YAML Gadget Object Graph are known, and the application uses class-permissive load or unsafe_load on untrusted YAML, the Ruby and RubyGems versions contain compatible gadget classes, and later object methods trigger.

prerequisites.zh: 可在无外网的一次性进程加载正常对象，并观察Ruby/Psych/RubyGems 版本、实例化类图、触发调用栈和替代 Kernel 方法的固定无害标记能够关联。
prerequisites.en: A disposable no-network process can load a normal object and observe Ruby, Psych, and RubyGems versions, instantiated class graph, trigger stack, and a fixed harmless substitute for the Kernel method correlate.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须证明输入到达 loader、对象或函数被构造、触发路径执行，并取得Ruby/Psych/RubyGems 版本、实例化类图、触发调用栈和替代 Kernel 方法的固定无害标记能够关联。流头、Base64、类名、YAML 标签、解析异常或依赖中存在 gadget 均是假阳性，不能证明“Ruby YAML/Psych 是否实例化 RubyGems 与 Net 类并在对象交互中调用 Net::WriteAdapter 指定的方法”。
analysis.en: A positive proves loader reachability, object or function construction, trigger execution, and Ruby, Psych, and RubyGems versions, instantiated class graph, trigger stack, and a fixed harmless substitute for the Kernel method correlate. Headers, Base64, class names, YAML tags, parser errors, or a gadget merely present in dependencies are false positives and do not prove whether Ruby YAML or Psych instantiates RubyGems and Net classes and invokes the method selected by Net::WriteAdapter during object interaction.

opsecTips.zh: RubyGems YAML Gadget 对象图停止条件：将危险动作替换为一次性临时标记；若 loader 尝试联网、加载远程类、访问真实文件或启动非标记进程，立即杀死隔离进程。 本条重点观察“Ruby YAML/Psych 是否实例化 RubyGems 与 Net 类并在对象交互中调用 Net::WriteAdapter 指定的方法”。
opsecTips.en: RubyGems YAML Gadget Object Graph stop condition: Replace dangerous effects with a one-time marker; kill the isolated process on network access, remote class loading, real-file access, or a non-marker process. The entry-specific focus is whether Ruby YAML or Psych instantiates RubyGems and Net classes and invokes the method selected by Net::WriteAdapter during object interaction.

opsecTips.zh: RubyGems YAML Gadget 对象图清理条件：每个对象使用新进程；测试后销毁进程、临时目录和缓存，轮换测试会话材料，并确认类、原型或全局状态无残留。 清理完成后再次确认该技术路径没有残留可触发状态。
opsecTips.en: RubyGems YAML Gadget Object Graph cleanup condition: Use a fresh process per object; destroy processes, temporary directories, and caches, rotate test session material, and verify no class, prototype, or global state remains. Recheck that no triggerable state remains for this technique.
